name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Don't Let Biden Get Away With It
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_get_away&n=1)
---
Peter \-- America is under a socialist takeover. What else do you call it when the President instructs the Dept of Labor to mandate vaccines on employees of private businesses?! **The rule of law and the Constitution does not matter to the political elite and their followers in the COVID cult. We're led to believe we need to trade in our health freedoms for their false sense of protection.** There's never been a more important time in our lives to stand up and fight against the political class than now. And we know exactly how to do that. Politicians said we would never be able to End Walz' Emergency Powers as long as Democrats were in charge. But we proved them wrong in June by being the only split legislature to remove a lockdown governor's powers. We accomplished this by creating overwhelming political pressure on politicians in St Paul! Over 55,000 phone calls were made and 40,000 doors were knocked in carefully targeted legislative district across Minnesota. This forced politicians to do the right thing, because they feared the costs to them at election time for not acting. **We can do this same thing again to Stop Vaccine Mandates in this state. Which is why I have my field team working around the clock, calling voters all across Minnesota right now.** We're also running digital ads to build our army... [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_get_away&n=2) But I'm afraid we will not be able to win this battle if we don't have the resources to keep our pressure campaign going. So I need your help. **Peter, can I count on you to make a donation to our pressure campaign so we can Stop Vaccine Mandates in Minnesota? Please help our organization fight in the trenches for your freedoms against the political elite who seek to destroy them!** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_get_away&n=3 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_get_away&n=3)
---
The political elite, from Walz up to Biden, want us to sit at home, complain and do nothing about it. They assume Republican legislators will be too cowardly to fight them on the vaccine mandates.
## But we aren't going to let that happen!
Politicians can ignore you and me. But they can't ignore tens of thousands of angry voters, all contacting them about passing the Rep Erik Mortensen's **Stop Vaccine Mandates** Amendment.
Help us get the message out to tens of thousands of more Minnesotans by [**donating today**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_get_away&n=4). And equip us with the resources to hire phone callers to keep the pressure on politicians.
[**Please make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 to Stop Vaccine Mandates and stand up to the Biden Administration. We simply can't afford to lose this battle**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_get_away&n=5)!
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_get_away&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_get_away&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_get_away&n=8), software for leaders.

name: YOUR SIGNATURE REQUESTED (via DCCC)
subject: RE: Texas’ abortion ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you CONDEMN Republican attacks on reproductive rights across the country? | | | **_BREAKING: Republicans in six states rush to mimic Texas anti-abortion law_ **

---
| **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE NEEDED:**

Republicans across the country are jumping into action to replicate Texas's abortion ban in their own states. _**NO!!**_

If we're going to STOP these anti-choice Republicans in their tracks, we'll need grassroots Democrats like you by our side every step of the way.**

[So we need to know: Do you CONDEMN Republican attacks on reproductive rights across the country?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_)
---|---|---

We can't believe what we're seeing.

When the far-right, anti-choice Supreme Court ruled in FAVOR of Texas' abortion ban...

... _Republicans in_ _Indiana, Mississippi, North Dakota, Florida, South Dakota, and Arkansas_ **LEAPED into action to restrict reproductive rights in their own states. N****O!!**

This flurry of anti-choice schemes can only mean one thing: _**Our Democratic House Majority just became even more important.**_

Our pro-choice House Democrats are a **CRUCIAL** line of defense against Republicans who could seek to impose these abortion bans on a national scale.

And if we're going to rise to the occasion, **DEFEND** our House Majority, and **STOP** these anti-choice Republicans in their tracks, we'll need you by our side every step of the way.
**[So we need to know: Do you CONDEMN Republican attacks on reproductive rights across the country? ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/34GVF3Nw_)**
| [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_)
---|---|---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45632265&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4Mzg0NDU0NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45632265&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4Mzg0NDU0NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Finchem calls for State-Wide Voter Roll Verification in Arizona
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Changes need to be made |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=67bb8324ea&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud America First State Representative in the State of Arizona who has been leading the vanguard in America’s Audit in Maricopa County.

**A few days ago, President Trump endorsed me to be the next Arizona Secretary of State**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8540e80334&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _I know this last week there has been bombshell after bombshell coming out of the Maricopa. And I know it’s a lot to keep track of._

This is why I am writing you today...

I have a big announcement –

**_I am officially calling for a State-Wide Door-to-Door Voter Roll Verification in Arizona – and[I need your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a946e67e53&e=44b8c466b0)._**

Such a massive endeavor does not come without a cost, and to get this done we need to take the Election Integrity movement to the NEXT LEVEL!

**I need all patriots to rally together. President Trump is standing behind us with his recent endorsement. Together we can take back Arizona.**

_[Can you show your support? We have an urgent fundraising goal of $75,000 by the end of the quarter, just a few weeks away!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e779015e50&e=44b8c466b0)_
[***Help us reach our fundraising goal!***](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=830e97c68c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c553c2c8b5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I was just on the One America News Network to talk about the terrifying results of a grassroots canvassing effort into the voter rolls. While this is not part of the Audit being conducted by the Senate, it does raise some worrisome implications.

The Executive Summary from the report reads:
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d23ca25f9d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| With 173,104 votes suspect, even if a small fraction of those were due to fraud, then it is absolutely clear that the Arizona election needs to be decertified IMMEDIATELY and strong work needs to be done to verify the voter rolls.

_We need a door-to-door verification of these voter rolls to ensure exactly which votes were not counted and WHY._

**And then we need to lock everyone responsible for this Democracy-Destroying fraud up in prison. For a very long time.**

But this will take a momentous effort. This is all hands on deck. And I need your urgent support to get us to the end of the quarter.

_[We need to raise $75,000 by the end of the quarter to keep the momentum going. My campaign to defend Election Integrity depends on you! Can you help out with a donate of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cbe3ab7365&e=44b8c466b0)_

**[I am still $65k SHORT of my goal and need your help right now.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=07eda03504&e=44b8c466b0)**

Friends and Patriots, this has been a long and illuminating journey for us all.

**When I first paid for the election integrity hearings out of pocket, I knew there were severe problems with the election in 2020. **

**_I had no idea the depths of corruption and fraud that these investigations could reveal._**

But I want to leave you with a message of hope. You may feel dismayed, threatened, and even silenced by the Democrats. You may feel like if they can steal the election in 2020, what’s the point?

**Here’s the point. It is not over, the fight is not yet lost. Every day we are winning battles for Election Integrity and the end of the war is in sight. The victor in this war will be determined by who is more persistent, louder, and more passionate.**

_[Will you let the Democrats voices be louder, pockets be deeper, and armies be more persistent?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=eb7d9e266f&e=44b8c466b0)_

**Of course not! We are Republicans. We are Conservatives. And we never back down from a fight.**

_[Show your support today so we can win the fight. And we WILL win the war for Election Integrity!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9c9a35f779&e=44b8c466b0)_
[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0d2aa70402&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,

body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a2660a419a014a84b133212a63200e2f&_e=t16m1h0Y8-gx9GqR0eSDcwsQkDKT-JYUcfndGGEa4v6noiVLF1X6npLbRmW_Nh1ebPz9HDpWUVSZWQETcko1Ca-10nEfrVfqYMik0LIP9uLZ0-jRkvOLBoNIS94XrIFsrLVwqWDGqwXLydkP9EX_9fnqQZDbc4rDEB0576Eqri45RcxIsPCacVgJJhr4Qrb0JLVcwx6f4Gt3ysRXofkg2NfW3yOM78ZmrCF3JBIV88ppRJA5iEs2uD2mj-Ivoc9xRkVxK2C6ivC1JXinBmaUwC6L4P8FlYlQMdMBMzISqYXzPfveWAGjIHRqRCy-K3hJteivR0V7IXN8NXBGTHJuP80BkbEE7VcaT3bKUyzQAsOo9Aq5WyaJICeAhdSMHu7xkPoKCJdDoMSYozZ5UA5Tje2SUuPCwiZ1N_T7DDbSiAKrY41ceGTkm23vCtRPOiGEw_gnmfHqNrVFl2cpi9M5eORfKZpRFBoIgbcljuwSl9GKKz9Kw9WOf-m4pmqBZTg-)

Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Hispanic,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Hispanic Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a2660a419a014a84b133212a63200e2f&_e=t16m1h0Y8-gx9GqR0eSDcwsQkDKT-JYUcfndGGEa4v6noiVLF1X6npLbRmW_Nh1ebPz9HDpWUVSZWQETcko1Ca-10nEfrVfqYMik0LIP9uLZ0-jRkvOLBoNIS94XrIFsrLVwqWDGqwXLydkP9EX_9fnqQZDbc4rDEB0576Eqri45RcxIsPCacVgJJhr4Qrb0JLVcwx6f4Gt3ysRXofkg2NfW3yOM78ZmrCF3JBIV88ppRJA5iEs2uD2mj-Ivoc9xRkVxK2C6ivC1JXinBmaUwJJfnJ4umDZd2xcy867aiucc_ywWmKmgSYgC8DOc--TAz5LdcDeE0koZFHWqJINVbcFQH13EDwT12FaGUPaARoVe-87hsQ97ONzilGZhsd9Qn6DF_vD-bFn7iYDfObt1milK1xJCWZYtYkJnldpL0zu9TZI4NY9zlQ3ounwOjTx117y_7xC3NmKWyaG2k8fBttL2rPwecLZt0q5v-zKbetoKqAznA4mbi05TW7MDJPJs)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanic's⇒ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a2660a419a014a84b133212a63200e2f&_e=t16m1h0Y8-gx9GqR0eSDcwsQkDKT-JYUcfndGGEa4v6noiVLF1X6npLbRmW_Nh1ebPz9HDpWUVSZWQETcko1Ca-10nEfrVfqYMik0LIP9uLZ0-jRkvOLBoNIS94XrIFsrLVwqWDGqwXLydkP9EX_9fnqQZDbc4rDEB0576Eqri45RcxIsPCacVgJJhr4Qrb0JLVcwx6f4Gt3ysRXofkg2NfW3yOM78ZmrCF3JBIV88ppRJA5iEs2uD2mj-Ivoc9xRkVxK2C6ivC1JXinBmaUwL-xK074f_MmHN6zXHDFzEJ_cEzAg3EDfFIREtj9GuBE3DTgPAKQrMwh_cYyT8x4MZJV95U_9D3xB7QeS26dVezLBJW35evkfbWMCVfr6VHYOf5uB1iKcvNFGaCz4Xti5_Ktr-cHKcKzfyN5-ZydVjMvhiR0LPUHj4iKTKjo2nKd1BxoYtaHGoZMO6m3X02aUq5Qlx9gBtc1RGm4hH2hzX6NhsHTfSb29FjFRM9pQdI5)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a2660a419a014a84b133212a63200e2f&_e=t16m1h0Y8-gx9GqR0eSDcwsQkDKT-JYUcfndGGEa4v6noiVLF1X6npLbRmW_Nh1ebPz9HDpWUVSZWQETcko1Ca-10nEfrVfqYMik0LIP9uLZ0-jRkvOLBoNIS94XrIFsrLVwqWDGqwXLydkP9EX_9fnqQZDbc4rDEB0576Eqri45RcxIsPCacVgJJhr4Qrb0JLVcwx6f4Gt3ysRXofkg2NfW3yOM78ZmrCF3JBIV88ppRJA5iEs2uD2mj-Ivoc9xRkVxK2C6ivC1JXinBmaUwG9BEEZcYnbiKag08SmS-8v8rOs1_sERxB5PgfvWERV3NvwK8L026HJtlac6dFcHU6gO8yfN1DO6dIF3HTFUittcNzE6BtsBIYO-_fpvz5JL2Z-QPpXUKIr12KLZ6nIwOHs6aJfbuzg4d0SLcG3FUcK670ddilzQNHHQ-3ug7M1X1SmSYyuJPLU4vYVNQvee5OTc2FHC9zwjWwLPnYGETdZGcIWf_M_VWbBwf0phO-X8)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanic's ⇒ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a2660a419a014a84b133212a63200e2f&_e=t16m1h0Y8-gx9GqR0eSDcwsQkDKT-JYUcfndGGEa4v6noiVLF1X6npLbRmW_Nh1ebPz9HDpWUVSZWQETcko1Ca-10nEfrVfqYMik0LIP9uLZ0-jRkvOLBoNIS94XrIFsrLVwqWDGqwXLydkP9EX_9fnqQZDbc4rDEB0576Eqri45RcxIsPCacVgJJhr4Qrb0JLVcwx6f4Gt3ysRXofkg2NfW3yOM78ZmrCF3JBIV88ppRJA5iEs2uD2mj-Ivoc9xRkVxK2C6ivC1JXinBmaUwDpYdKCOg5DJhjM1IRKs9_xSCasqnqOwAqdc_mMfmkxjbNttBdkb8C9PknUlP_PLtZLaOlFWojur_OqOjRaxvuLzAJ1pHlxc7_uO8qOm7lfZ3jtxK6-U5z8KemIAdmOB-LplR5S45wcra2HZXH7Qv8Pyjxekg7-hkZMymeq5JmvVeZ3FZqdKlgzqMNJYfCWW3XJ79cgRrR3Vcfq1IPESW1Ad0D5zTg8kYVqarSwAgGC_)
Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a2660a419a014a84b133212a63200e2f&_e=t16m1h0Y8-gx9GqR0eSDcwsQkDKT-JYUcfndGGEa4v6noiVLF1X6npLbRmW_Nh1ebPz9HDpWUVSZWQETcko1Ca-10nEfrVfqYMik0LIP9uLZ0-jRkvOLBoNIS94XrIFsrLVwqWDGqwXLydkP9EX_9fnqQZDbc4rDEB0576Eqri45RcxIsPCacVgJJhr4Qrb0JLVcwx6f4Gt3ysRXofkg2NfW3yOM78ZmrCF3JBIV88ppRJA5iEs2uD2mj-Ivoc9xRkVxK2C6ivC1JXinBmaUwOU-sEaBHqRulA2f5RFdZ6_fTcKMEPUVC_rkWdrhstb2xHPmIGZZGVI0yut6KBxfdfrjKaxk1tZdoyXGhF_Ip_Zp_WqVPKSKX1cDhVcFsMp6arR0RyuIAYRqkrOVhScCKBLpemYgPxCkYrl92LDBvUcF61OHjiX1Wg6bxnyVbXfGFJUUwGLEQJyNNoXlKgLOTPY0v5HT1XjihCMehP7O-yPIT2eIBz6IgXbQiszMZAYS)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a2660a419a014a84b133212a63200e2f&_e=t16m1h0Y8-gx9GqR0eSDcwsQkDKT-JYUcfndGGEa4v6noiVLF1X6npLbRmW_Nh1ebPz9HDpWUVSZWQETcko1Ca-10nEfrVfqYMik0LIP9uLZ0-jRkvOLBoNIS94XrIFsrLVwqWDGqwXLydkP9EX_9fnqQZDbc4rDEB0576Eqri45RcxIsPCacVgJJhr4Qrb0JLVcwx6f4Gt3ysRXofkg2NfW3yOM78ZmrCF3JBIV88ppRJA5iEs2uD2mj-Ivoc9xRkVxK2C6ivC1JXinBmaUwCNzlrwkfdHJoj_pX2dnzuMGdnxU3ozNW26Dix7kjruu1247qCCucI66kvToDGj0jJ461g4m0JbBaWaO9pAnxREtaqmWmd_FBRo5oFXSUu4yGPo3ybYnSplct5Wqk0XRTntj-Hygxj29XHrNpjpB5CW9TP9gMzeTn0rJL4fEUEH33kcjGqp_dNAcRIm60x9qFrLXuobiGCTiRvEGhnHwsyqK_IekV3DmCskeaVmrdiO2)

| Paid for by Monica for Congress

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: We're getting there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Just $308 short! Peter**Taking back the majority in the House is CRITICAL for the future of our country. **Today, we are still $308 short of our mid-month fundraising goal. We're close, but this is NOT a time that we can afford to fall short! We spend a lot of time asking people for money. Believe me, I know. But we're doing it for an important reason: **we're only five seats away from taking back the majority, FIRING NANCY PELOSI, and stopping AOC and Biden/Harris in Washington! **The sooner we can raise this $308, the better we can stay on track with our WINNING campaign plans for next year. [_**Could you chip in $50, $25 or even $10 to help us get there today? **_](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cjkihe-ahkdjtlkr-r/)Thanks,Team Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cjkihe-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cjkihe-ahkdjtlkr-j/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cjkihe-ahkdjtlkr-t/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Backed By Trump and DeSantis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

Senate Conservatives Fund is proud to endorse Adam
Laxalt for U.S. Senate in Nevada!

Adam is a hero, a Navy war veteran who served
bravely in Iraq. He is also an aggressive, young leader who
fought for conservative principles as Nevada's Attorney General
from 2015 to 2019. In 2020, Adam was Co-Chair of President Donald
Trump's Nevada campaign.

Please give Adam's campaign a boost today with your
contribution of $25, $50, $100, or more!

President Donald Trump has given Adam his "Complete
and Total Endorsement." In his statement of support, President
Trump commended Adam's outspoken support for law enforcement,
border security, and his tireless work for election integrity in
2020.

Join President Donald Trump, Governor Ron DeSantis,
and leading conservatives in supporting Adam Laxalt for Senate!

Adam is running against incumbent Democrat Senator
Catherine Cortez Masto, a leftist extremist who supports open
borders, amnesty, abortion-on-demand, and the radical Left's
agenda.
In announcing his candidacy, Adam made clear he's
running for American values and against the woke elites at war
with them. He's going after Big Tech, and the media, and the woke
capital elites, the Covid cover-up cabal, and Critical Race
Theory.

Adam is a conservative fighter and he's running to
serve all Americans - not the Swamp.

Patriots across the country need to welcome Adam to
this race with a huge cash injection before the end of the month.

This is a winnable race against a leftist extremist.
We need to send a signal in 2022 that voters are going to put
America First!

Contribute to Adam Laxalt to remind Catherine Cortes
Masto and Chuck Schumer that in America, the government works for
the people and not the other way around!

Click here to donate to Adam's campaign now!

Join SCF, President Trump, and Governor DeSantis in
the fight to bring America back in 2022!

Thank you for considering this request and for doing
so much to help us fight for conservative leadership in
Washington.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

Adam is running against incumbent Democrat Senator Catherine Cortez Masto, a leftist extremist who supports open borders, amnesty, abortion-on-demand, and the radical Left's agenda. In announcing his candidacy, Adam made clear he's running for American values and against the woke elites at war with them. He's going after Big Tech, and the media, and the woke capital elites, the Covid cover-up cabal, and Critical Race Theory. Adam is a conservative fighter and he's running to serve all Americans - not the Swamp. Patriots across the country need to welcome Adam to this race with a huge cash injection before the end of the month. This is a winnable race against a leftist extremist. We need to send a signal in 2022 that voters are going to put America First! name: Jason Johnson
subject: He had nowhere to run
body:
Another good law enforcement officer might soon be sent to prison for defending himself from the threat of a dangerous criminal
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr3sksn02ug7v0k8d5vn6574hvf6lj55sm2s22co_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3ge0o35cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65stic9hncc73ceq70phksiq6ep9jm6rmec73m1ij6t3he1h62pdhm2qn5cdjm2o6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb2phmcsqj0ptmclj32c5ic8r749fg)
Dear Fellow American, Another good law enforcement officer might soon be sent to prison for defending himself from the threat of a dangerous criminal... Special Agent Eddie Valdivia is a stand-up cop who has spent over 10 years in the FBI where he investigates and helps eliminate threats of domestic terrorism. When Eddie was nearly attacked by a mentally deranged criminal on his way to work one morning, he had no choice but to take swift action to defend himself. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8nop309vnqspnlparh1h1itdr7dgepmb399lcj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3ge0o35cdh2bs) Now, his entire career might soon come crashing down – and he could be locked up for decades if he is wrongly convicted. **[That’s why I’m urgently asking for your help to defend SSA Eddie Valdivia from his absurd charges and keep him out of prison for a crime he DID NOT commit.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7k8gjq4kq08757vhlbe4kf4urpt5vgql2nai608_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3ge0o35cdh2bs)** Let me explain what happened... Early in the morning of December 15th, Eddie boarded the subway train station near his home to head into work in Washington D.C. _Little did he know at the time, his commute that morning would be anything but normal._ A few stops into Eddie’s commute, a man named Steven Slaughter got on the train, sat next to him, and aggressively demanded that Eddie to give him money. Eddie refused – and Slaughter immediately started cursing him out and hurling racial insults. Eventually, Slaughter calmed down – but only for a brief moment. A few minutes later, Slaughter again confronted Eddie – **and this time he was looking for a fight**. You see, Eddie Valdivia is expert when it comes to assessing threats. As an experienced law enforcement agent, he recognized that he was about to be assaulted by a much larger man who may be under the influence of drugs. He also knew that he was armed and, if he became incapacitated, he could be disarmed and killed. With that in mind – _and the fact that Slaughter had backed him into the corner of the train car_ – Eddie knew he would have to take action to stop this possibly unstable convicted criminal from hurting him and perhaps others. So, when Eddie realized that he was about to be assaulted by Slaughter, he pulled out his service weapon and fired three times. As soon as the train stopped at the next station, they got off the train car and Eddie told a nearby witness to call 911 so that Slaughter could get urgent medical help. _Even though Slaughter was hurt badly at the time, he was still able to walk off the train and has since recovered._ _ _ But the most shocking part of the entire incident happened a few days later when Eddie found out that he was charged with Attempted Second Degree Murder and felony assault. Eddie had no choice but to defend himself when he was cornered and threatened by a deranged criminal – and yet somehow, he is the one who might spend decades in prison for it. **[Will you help us keep Eddie out of prison for a crime he didn’t commit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $15, $35, $50 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgidig8dlkiurk83ec21ku8bmf923ba0077r2q78_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3ge0o35cdh2bs)** Friend, my name is Jason Johnson – President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you’ve ever heard of the LELDF before, then you know that for the past 25 years, we’ve helped dozens of wrongly accused or charged police officers get the best possible legal defense. So when I heard about Eddie’s situation, I knew that we had to offer him the full support of the LELDF Police Defense Fund. But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend innocent cops like Eddie is dependent on kind-hearted American patriots like you. [**That’s why I’m asking you to send a tax-deductible contribution of $15, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF today.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgaeha4one1pt13it3nqpr2lv9361vnat4l482s8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3ge0o35cdh2bs) Because this incident occurred in the subway system of our nation’s capital, there is plenty of video evidence to support what actually happened that morning. There was even a witness on the train that morning who saw this dangerous confrontation. On top of all that, Slaughter has a long record of criminal behavior. In fact, he’s been convicted at least **nine times** with indecent exposure and sexually deviant behavior and has many other convictions for drug possession, assault and resisting arrest. Yet, Slaughter remained out on the streets looking for more victims. Instead, he met FBI Special Agent Eddie Valdivia first. **Slaughter is even on the Washington Metro Area Transit Authority’s (WMATA) watch list for committing these kinds of offenses frequently on the train.** So aside from the fact that Eddie did what he had to do to avoid being hurt or killed that morning – it’s preposterous that he is the one facing prison time instead of the criminal who started this incident and has the record to back it up. With your help today, we’ll make sure Eddie gets the best legal defense possible so he can stay out of prison and continue to defend our country from terrorist threats. **[Please, help us defend SSA Eddie Valdivia with a tax-deductible contribution of $15, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF Police Defense Fund today.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr8pvlhfmj3mpum03v4ft7jllvp24p3f6la4d1l8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3ge0o35cdh2bs)** Thank you in advance for your generous support. Sincerely, Jason C. Johnson
President, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund [**SAVE SSA EDDIE VALDIVIA**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvkr5053ma69u19938nvi5dqsmdro3hjvb3opt2g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3ge0o35cdh2bs) More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless you and we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on www.leldf.org and remember - Blue Lives Matter! **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3tehgb8nlfiifhggi1o0atmng7m0cml47o3ekh0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3ge0o35cdh2bs)** © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8ndgrpsmrcljoodgom4lea4i84pesacj7jobhn0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3ge0o35cdh2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcjv76vnjbcfdkbrmf6a4iei1315187o6dffi238_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3ge0o35cdh2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze3fc7rh1leusi7p1a7a37mtomltr1unsdn42cjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3ge0o35cdh2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z63fdkic8t6u1ecjhu2v01lhj9v3bgdmrd3b2d68_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3ge0o35cdh2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | Derek, it’s official:

All across the Commonwealth, Virginians will start casting their ballots today, and Derek, I’m fired up.

But here’s the thing: I urgently need your help right now — and here’s why.

**Yesterday, we learned that Glenn Youngkin outraised us because he wrote himself huge checks to the tune of 4 million dollars. If our grassroots team doesn’t match him, he’ll have no problem drowning us out on the airwaves and out-hustling us on the ground.**

What’s more, poll after poll shows this race is neck and neck.

Glenn’s momentum is coming at the worst possible time, Derek — right as early voting is beginning!

**So right now, I’m launching a weekend fundraising goal of raising $300,000 during our first weekend of early voting — the deadline is Sunday at midnight.**

_**[So Derek, will you chip in $25 to kick us off? clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, it’s official: All across the Commonwealth, Virginians will start casting their ballots today, and Derek, I’m fired up. But here’s the thing: I urgently need your help right now — and here’s why. Yesterday, we learned that Glenn Youngkin outraised us because he wrote himself huge checks to the tune of 4 million dollars. If our grassroots team doesn’t match him, he’ll have no problem drowning us out on the airwaves and out-hustling us on the ground. What’s more, poll after poll shows this race is neck and neck. Glenn’s momentum is coming at the worst possible time, Derek — right as early voting is beginning! So right now, I’m launching a weekend fundraising goal of raising $300,000 during our first weekend of early voting — the deadline is Sunday at midnight. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = The polls are clear, Derek: this race is going to be close. And Glenn Youngkin isn’t pulling any punches, so we’ve got to pull out all the stops today. = Let’s do this, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Justin Paglino
subject: thanks for being a supporter -Justin Paglino
body:
Hi Peter,

Thanks for your interest in my congressional campaign! How are things in Cresco, PA? My family has vacationed several times to the poconos, very beautiful area around where you are. Bushkill falls is a gem. Feel free to reach out any time with any questions or comments, I love to converse with supporters. And keep your eye out for volunteer opportunities like online phone-banks that you may be interested in, or chip in a little $ if you are inclined. Hope to hear from you or perhaps even see you at a future online event!
Thanks!

Justin Paglino, MD, PhD

Guilford
Green Party Candidate for US Congress.
Connecticut’s Third Congressional District
https://www.govtrack.us/congress/members/CT/3

"Let us bring equality, justice, and peace for all. Not just the politicians and the world leaders, we all need to contribute. Me. You. It is our duty." Malala Yousafzai

justin@justin4all.org
Newsletter signup : http://justin4all.org
On Facebook: http://fb.com/justin4all
On Twitter: http://twitter.com/justin4all2
Donate: https://www.justin4all.org/donate

name: Team Cammack
subject: Celebrating our Constitution Day!
body:
Over 200 hundred years ago today, our forefathers drafted one of the most important documents in history: The United States Constitution.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H6IJpwE8IFLmoZ66alX7EUTZFRv2rFQAi_l0U1EINtLqxllKyR_68iQxv-uLtDVvlwKQiU-8Ybmhh4UMbURIaithnbKvNMkQ2TrUrFGjlvOKVbPrW9FBEEjLtNwBxr7ssWh4JLqjtcIPhFnYeGQB5wBonmTyretW3P_06eWOrQld0-tsSPWlXocYQS4JejED5qklt4Idql4hDdEbSR6XhA==&c=wkVo23qnA0VI_DQXNt3zBAqaMLqw90krhA_x4quNQOpK9-Tj7SzpfA==&ch=Ub8nhlKHSysFqmwBs2tsBtOSbfZBxJaWWksFe3tVMeS50jRhcP1xJQ==)
---
| Friend,

Over 200 hundred years ago today, our forefathers drafted one of the most important documents in history: The United States Constitution. This monumental achievement would guarantee our God-given rights and freedoms we celebrate today. Were it not for the brave heroes of our past, we would not be living in the greatest country the world has ever seen.
---

---
| Thanks to this foundational text, America became a beacon of life and liberty for all the world to see. We were the first nation to truly understand that all men and women are entitled to inherent rights by God; not the government. We stand proudly with our forefathers in their dedication to freedom.
Let us all take a moment today to truly understand what the founders of this great nation believed and continue their ideas. Americans will always push for the inherent liberty given to us by our maker and protected by the United States Constitution.
Have a blessed and free day!

clean_body: Over 200 hundred years ago today, our forefathers drafted one of the most important documents in history: The United States Constitution. | | | | | | == | Friend, Over 200 hundred years ago today, our forefathers drafted one of the most important documents in history: The United States Constitution. This monumental achievement would guarantee our God-given rights and freedoms we celebrate today. Were it not for the brave heroes of our past, we would not be living in the greatest country the world has ever seen. | | | == | == | Thanks to this foundational text, America became a beacon of life and liberty for all the world to see. We were the first nation to truly understand that all men and women are entitled to inherent rights by God; not the government. We stand proudly with our forefathers in their dedication to freedom. Let us all take a moment today to truly understand what the founders of this great nation believed and continue their ideas. Americans will always push for the inherent liberty given to us by our maker and protected by the United States Constitution. Have a blessed and free day! | | | == | For Florida, Team Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Adam Schiff
subject: An embarrassment to our country

body:
|
#
Derek, Donald Trump’s path back to the White House depends on delegitimizing our democracy — and with his Republican base, it appears to be working. **A _CNN_ poll out this week showed that 59% of self-identified Republicans say “believing that Donald Trump won the 2020 election” is important to what being a Republican means to them.** _Just think about that for a moment. That’s absolutely bonkers._ Trump has created an abhorrent precedent with his Big Lie about the 2020 election where Republican candidates will deny election results every time they lose. It’s the same playbook he’s used since his first run for office. And candidates running in GOP primaries who repeat his lies will win every time. The Republican Party can no longer save itself from the authoritarian zeal Trump inspired in its voting base. And so-called leaders like Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy don’t have the guts to try changing it. In fact, they’ve succumbed to it. So, it’s up to us to stand strong. You are essential to the success of our democracy for another two hundred years. We need you to stand with us and resist GOP efforts to moves us towards an American form of dictatorship. **Can you pitch in right now to help us defend our House and Senate majorities, fight back against GOP lies, and win the midterms — just as you helped us crush the Republican-led recall in California?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35927835/306588943/581033598?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20210917_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODJiZGU4YS1iZjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ne0wAqHwpSnqK3I1V4epoB-3DlAqQ3iE0yuyEN9mKgA=)

As soon as the polls showed that Gavin Newsom might defeat the California recall election, Trump told his same old lies about voter fraud and declared the election rigged. The leading Republican contender parroted those lies to whip up the fury of his anti-vax, anti-democracy, conspiracy-fueled base.
**It’s ridiculous. It's an embarrassment to our nation. It’s also dangerous. And we must stand up to it before this spirals even further out of our control.**
By delegitimizing free and fair elections, Trump’s redefining the values and principles of GOP supporters. He’s subverting our country’s democracy for the sake of his fragile ego, and he’s swinging the door wide open for GOP candidates to claim “voter fraud” any time they disagree with an election’s outcome. It’s appalling.
The GOP is disenfranchising millions of Americans ahead of the midterm elections because they know the majority of voters don’t support their shameless attempts to undermine our democracy. They can’t win elections where everyone votes.
That’s why we need our coalition of grassroots supporters to do everything possible to elect new and incumbent Democrats to the House and Senate next November.
**If you can afford it, can you chip in right now to help protect and expand our Democratic majorities? We can’t risk losing a single seat to the Republican Party. Their ideology has become too dangerous to be given any chance to govern.**

And according to one recent nationwide poll, _52 percent of voters think Joe Biden should resign_... the American people are waking up to the fact that Biden is UNFIT TO SERVE!

Today, I’m asking for your help. We can’t let up.

clean_body: We’re ramping up the pressure on Biden. Read more >>> Peter, First and foremost, I want thank everyone who signed on to our recent petition effort. I’m leading the charge to DEMAND JOE BIDEN RESIGN, and we’re ramping up the pressure. Here in Oklahoma, folks see right through Biden’s lies and pathetic blame game over his disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan. His approval in our state is among the lowest in the nation, at just 25 percent. And according to one recent nationwide poll, 52 percent of voters think Joe Biden should resign... the American people are waking up to the fact that Biden is UNFIT TO SERVE! Today, I’m asking for your help. We can’t let up. Joe Biden 100% owns the greatest U.S. foreign policy failure in living memory. His incompetence cost us American lives, $85 billion in military equipment left in the hands of the Taliban, and U.S. citizens and allies trapped behind enemy lines. Biden has ZERO business serving as our nation’s Commander-in-Chief. Sincerely, Kevin Hern | | | ---|--- id:2021-09-14-12:23:45:259t Paid For By Hern For Congress

Hello Peter! Favor the Constitution then Favor Dave Giles! __ "Article IV, Section 4." The Unit

**__Hello Peter!** **Favor the Constitution
then
Favor Dave Giles!**
__
"**Article IV, Section 4**."
_The United States shall guarantee to every State in this Union a Republican Form of Government, and shall protect each of them against**Invasion** ; and on Application of the Legislature, or of the Executive (when the Legislature cannot be convened) against domestic **Violence**._ Meaning:
The Federal Government has the responsibility to make sure
to protect the states against foreign invasion
or internal insurrection. We have an **Invasion** on the southern border.
We have domestic **Violence** in democratic states.
__
Democrats support the Invasion, condone the Violence
and continue to fail us.
I’m demanding accountability from the failed democrats.
**I will fight to protect our Constitutional Rights**
---
We can Take District Nine and **"Stop the Madness"**.
---
| | [ Support Our Constitution ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=3858584.4421.1.7f305d7b6de52571297acddd523aa712)
---
Sincerely,

|

|
---
**Dave Giles**
Candidate

Arizona's 9th District

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi12KDPQVA2R5xhKVNpMMd2mQkprnzL3zqQ986HAnWxihTwNtnfgG6h4VBJ-Shwkjdf7JJrbl6H1zbD8AF8hX_4cE6MrLPv_UH9v3tQXCr8GssstWb0jTxWqcA8VkaErexdE7faX1imcsFn17_YtqxsefvoldhBIqjnZa00zqK595rafuWf606uLv6AmL1A95wiAetbwpyKbbHgI0adv3PKKc84uciYUtmCvB3JOLoNUd88MTpGzRWyn83ZZ3eOILZti2Kqzv-25M44u3b4fNsnGEJ8wLrbvtJPY4dgak64jcTdAmpl-yhB9bxbEm4IKmx/3fe/Ume2xpGHRKCvJnUtUpg2sg/h0/ZerW3UVMepkATIyPMfcarZo4MCJcI8BmwwSbx0Hv1FM)

Adam Schiff here — coming to you with an important message about Virginia’s elections less than 7 weeks away.

Republicans across the country are waging an all-out assault on our democracy. Texas, Florida, Georgia, and many other states have passed voter suppression laws in just the past few months, and hundreds of bills have been introduced in 49 state legislatures — including Virginia.

Not to mention, Trump Republicans in Virginia are sparing no expense to flip the governor’s seat and the state legislature in a few weeks. This could pave the way to secure wins in the 2022 Congressional midterm elections.

**This is a critical moment to fight back. And it all starts in Virginia in 2021.**

That’s why it’s so important that we support Terry McAuliffe and all Virginia Democrats running to keep our Blue majorities in their state House. Terry and the strong leaders in Virginia’s Democratic majority understand the stakes, and what we need to do now — **fight for justice, work towards creating a more perfect union, and ensure every voice is heard in our Democracy.**

We understand that in order to propel our country forward, we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. From school boards to governor's offices to the Oval Office. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today:

**[Can you split a donation between Terry McAuliffe’s Common Good PAC and our grassroots campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi12KDPQVA2R5xhKVNpMMd2mQkprnzL3zqQ986HAnWxigb387jceMGZAYGSp-7oaBY-1OT7WDIBggti5gZ8M17V6xVowzooUGl-HdmMo8sQHzsuoRzUMNVFnzDx0b1E8VipxNSH2wv8Vn-DJR76cFUqFKYAiEyecCIXoln8nkX-USHdPi6tDi_6JG07xmm05fBGbTwfhJ3PgwRfnj1JlfdkWfN91IgGoIuC7evagiZLQUbPzcitTt4eId5v68_C-NUySyK8G0T1T5Y1StrRCdV_XpXz0uVLWn3yn8P6XRSgnvZ-Q9ThbBpZ6kal1tNduIi/3fe/Ume2xpGHRKCvJnUtUpg2sg/h2/oyKSj_-whMM0z4og7tdC4jX1iXmg-ojOGYGV1iUjTfQ)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi12KDPQVA2R5xhKVNpMMd2k5rzyeCC2d-gjDtXX0C6rmqKM3uI_9-k1gD1a9rMWvPKBkIgtCO2Ud6Nl0NjEwaYV6zIuXkeErBfZ_HRSkMF0Xa8EGz4aY7tTbc49_fARet7ORCp_hDFZZ80KebU0bQjC1DbX185n1jUfBCrb6nMbpeULwi1jfS1h_P_9CXeuUNUCw7B9cL7OSqJGXU7J4us4ZL0YYP4pSbbiUmkN4s0tMNJGExiOCeuRsLYoVbQ5ZnXazq2MW-tNKPULPmtAtiiahdt4VO8nQMxg1yuTn5fNP-yPdvBpW45TPlCybPSupK/3fe/Ume2xpGHRKCvJnUtUpg2sg/h3/uIlP2qT0Wo8D9J7t0WNQx7aBeYnc73E2wvCeGio92tQ)
[ Donate $50 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi12KDPQVA2R5xhKVNpMMd2k5rzyeCC2d-gjDtXX0C6rk2n1QdMIOR5iUtVtXRELrgffDshGlRx5FB7V48W05vSqfBtoCxUOEmjC3WJZQQMAIFWriQuGlRrg5TIqJ4Df8D4H-FD_4NAbQOJhITwjGXH0ZBWptjqY0L-Wf0EesWA7T-rkoIH0ML-u5RiKKBwXLVv_89hfcUSu21jgFc0dcW4TCzp98a8qlMkdr1pzN4Tdc3AlUyO-AhGfQ0uhdm_c66b-NXQZGPT9xaKuyS0wFpPQTuKH-rTZAUuAr2avMdh_UwcfO_ckmp6yTJ4O-ldHqh/3fe/Ume2xpGHRKCvJnUtUpg2sg/h4/k_xrKyQY_VxKeLb-YD4lW2lDGcJ-u9GVv0MEwhuoec4)
[ Donate $100 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi12KDPQVA2R5xhKVNpMMd2k5rzyeCC2d-gjDtXX0C6rkLf9n3MsHiRqilVSGrh7mLtzF1-ePjNK-hChvSIf8Y5QFPTvVK4WpM06Y98QHl8EKmp6zz8g59f-HblyMa-ti-dKQLrIpmCIC1-fY1mzk6CUyrV9Kb3116sTfJtusyQ99kqKkBNRvZNh-no7UOdVTkc99Gp7Wh8UMxvhCMdyc8-PWvWDiH2ocbT2I98zztGAB2BY_T9Mal-I7ihIGvFb6j8hCKedEjoZrblJkEKdJhUub-iQxPnkeoVkrrI-qfAZ_0W5BFMEzWOZL6-Hc0J5YE/3fe/Ume2xpGHRKCvJnUtUpg2sg/h5/4PhzZNgAElMYrqsmVq-MjHeI_AAeGImprVcohrOTYyQ)
[ Donate other ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi12KDPQVA2R5xhKVNpMMd2mQkprnzL3zqQ986HAnWxii1fHH7EDA93LKFP-Aj209cdUuC42E_X4P8D1UAqZOHvVnEONyYGtpzJR2060ExD61bMxEzuedFFFnTR0LfyAquK5K8CjNBXpOpovbTv8Z1YonB9C2s7o2P8acZnXLGiRxhu3UuwE1Zm8XqsB1-ZVuauS-Tod7PpGMOvhjl8UkFX4SYZz8Nq3Dcgr0ljA-Z5ew1J_39Gv65eLIGWXIXvpGRkdKACJU28HjccmaS7hn8fqMyAILNGA4yGuGLHSpXEoELalB51sZKSJUkxkiVEvgO/3fe/Ume2xpGHRKCvJnUtUpg2sg/h6/exz6DsNS_PiPwymMPVpti4LgBNlWWp0hZOlgSyLkzRQ) ** Terry and I are strongly committed to upholding our country’s principles and creating a better future for all Americans.

Whether it’s combatting the climate crisis, defending reproductive rights, protecting the right to vote, or dispelling Donald Trump and the GOP’s Big Lie about the 2020 election, we’re determined to fight for progress because our country should work for all Americans — including you.

Thanks for everything you do.

— Adam

Peter,

The assault on voting rights across America continues with Texas becoming the latest state to pass new restrictive voting laws since the 2020 election.

**Nineteen states have now enacted 31 new laws that make it harder to vote in those states.** This new wave of restrictive voting laws is the most aggressive assault on democracy in recent American history.

Every citizen has the right to vote, and that right should not be threatened in any way. I believe we need to amend the Constitution to ensure that no state can take away this right for any citizen.

**[I’m asking you to sign my petition to show your support for an amendment to the Constitution to ensure that no state can take away the right to vote for any citizen>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35933583/306611146/1404005487?refcode=EM_PET_210917voting_N_TL_90DA_7_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzUxNjRiOC1jYTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3SGGe9iuXmohzj-gKVQpunR8XIy4R_zJOjN23Z7GIrM=&emci=c8bbbc4c-c017-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=a75164b8-ca17-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18659600)** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35933585/306611147/1404005487?refcode=EM_PET_210917voting_N_TL_90DA_7_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzUxNjRiOC1jYTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3SGGe9iuXmohzj-gKVQpunR8XIy4R_zJOjN23Z7GIrM=&emci=c8bbbc4c-c017-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=a75164b8-ca17-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18659600)** Wisconsin is not one of the states that changed their voting laws this year. But it wasn’t for a lack of Republicans trying. Republicans in the Wisconsin Legislature have passed multiple bills, but fortunately, we had our Governor, Tony Evers, there to veto them all.

The stakes are just too high. With Republicans passing voting restrictions left and right, we need a permanent solution now.

**[Add your name to my petition and demand an amendment that will protect the right to vote for all citizens.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35933586/306611148/1404005487?refcode=EM_PET_210917voting_N_TL_90DA_7_NG_N_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzUxNjRiOC1jYTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3SGGe9iuXmohzj-gKVQpunR8XIy4R_zJOjN23Z7GIrM=&emci=c8bbbc4c-c017-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=a75164b8-ca17-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18659600)**

Thank you,

Alex Lasry

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: "Get vaccinated or starve"
body:
Peter, **The Biden Administration just announced that all businesses with more than 100 employees will be FORCED to require COVID-19 vaccines for all employees.** In other words, Joe Biden is basically saying: _**" Get the**** ****vaccine or**** ****starve. "** _ **_I 'll be_**** _ _****_clear_**** _ _****_with you; The Center_**** _ _****_for_**** _ _****_American Liberty WILL sue the Biden Administration the second he enforces this outrageous, totalitarian mandate._** [**Will you support the Center for American**** ****Liberty**** ****to help us sue the Biden Administration for this completely unconstitutional vaccine order?** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58348744:JLynmC2NK:m:1:3253819041:DDD80515CF924047FD25CDCCFDDFAD24:r) This isn't an empty threat. _**This is a PROMISE.** _ And the writing has been on the wall for months. First they locked you out of your houses of worship, schools, and closed small businesses... ...then they forced you to wear masks. Now Joe Biden and the rest of his authoritarian minions are going to stop you from making a living and _**feeding your family if you don 't get the COVID vaccine.** _ They don't care about your right to religious freedom... They don't care about your right to medical privacy... They don't care about your right to determine how you should live your life... The only thing that matters to Joe Biden and the radical Left is that you obey. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to help us stop this totalitarian takeover of our lives by sending a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58348744:JLynmC2NK:m:1:3253819041:DDD80515CF924047FD25CDCCFDDFAD24:r) If we don't stand up HERE and NOW it will never end. But we can't do this without you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty to push back against these kinds of threats to our civil liberties. And Biden's UNCONSTITUTIONAL order mandating that employers require COVID-19 vaccination is perhaps his worst offense yet. Forget about the astounding hypocrisy. For years they've shouted, "my body, my choice." But it's clear that they only care about "your body" and "your choice" when it fits their political narrative. And if we don't take immediate action against the Biden Administration's new vaccine mandate - your right to make your own medical decisions... your right to individual freedom will disappear overnight. [**That 's why I'm asking you to help us prepare for one of the most important legal battles of our lives with a gift of $35 or more today.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58348744:JLynmC2NK:m:1:3253819041:DDD80515CF924047FD25CDCCFDDFAD24:r) If we don't fight to keep our freedoms today, they'll be gone tomorrow. Thank you in advance for standing with us and for liberty. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58348744:JLynmC2NK:m:1:3253819041:DDD80515CF924047FD25CDCCFDDFAD24:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58348744:JLynmC2NK:m:1:3253819041:DDD80515CF924047FD25CDCCFDDFAD24:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58348744:JLynmC2NK:m:1:3253819041:DDD80515CF924047FD25CDCCFDDFAD24:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Organizing WINS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
In a resounding win for Democrats, the Republican recall has officially been declared unsuccessful. **Here in California’s 8th district, we’re celebrating the high turnout that we saw for Democrats.** As a campaign determined to flip this red district blue, this race was a great sign.

Just like Governor Newsom, we aim to out-organize the Republicans and prove our worth to constituents.**We know that good organizing gets results, and we plan to organize long and hard to win this district.** Over the next year, we’ll need to invest heavily in our efforts to get out the vote. That’s where you come in. [**Every donation we receive keeps our campaign afloat so that we can continue to build a winning movement. Can you contribute right now to help?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35936008/306619127/-1784513525?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTQyNWU1My1kMDE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IC0qZe1FF8eZdozzw8M5BsvGJD2PPLFvEqQ8cHLdG7I=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35936009/306619138/-1784513525?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTQyNWU1My1kMDE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IC0qZe1FF8eZdozzw8M5BsvGJD2PPLFvEqQ8cHLdG7I=)
As loyal Democrats, we put in work to spread the word to voters in California’s 8th to vote no on the recall. Now we need to harness that same energy to focus on our state’s future. **California is losing one Congressional seat thanks to the census and we need to maintain our Democratic majority in the House of Representatives.** That’s why it’s so important that we raise the resources we need to flip this district blue and win Democrats another seat in Congress.

As one of the only Republican districts in the state, the GOP is sure to invest heavily in this race, especially after such a colossal loss in the recall election.**[It’s crucial that we sustain our momentum and remain competitive in this race over the next year. Will you help us stay strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35936010/306619139/-1784513525?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTQyNWU1My1kMDE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IC0qZe1FF8eZdozzw8M5BsvGJD2PPLFvEqQ8cHLdG7I=)**

In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: What my opponent is saying about me …
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all:

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58816019:seBgbRdWN:m:1:2247059263:DEC701C18698F8D87883855FC462C656:r)
The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are **a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate.**

Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic.

They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year.

We're going to have to work around the clock - day and night - for the next 400+ days to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country.

We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls.

And, of course, it all takes money to operate. **[So, today I'm asking you to make a donation of $5 or more. I need to raise $10,000 by the end of the day, and I hope you'll help me reach my goal by making an immediate gift of whatever you can.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58816019:seBgbRdWN:m:1:2247059263:DEC701C18698F8D87883855FC462C656:r)**

Democrats are in panic mode. They didn't want me to get into this race because they know that with President Trump's support and the support of the good people in Georgia, we're going to flip this seat in one of the most hard-fought races in the country.

**[I'd be humbled if you would help me reach my daily goal of raising $10,000 by pitching in $5 or more right now.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58816019:seBgbRdWN:m:1:2247059263:DEC701C18698F8D87883855FC462C656:r)**

Respectfully,

Dear Tennessean,
In July, I sent you a note about the launch of our small dollar donor email program - we were looking to recruit 225 recurring donors for the 2022 election cycle.
110 PROUD DEMOCRATS STEPPED UP AND SIGNED UP- THANK YOU!
Since announcing our small dollar donor email program, the cruelty and immorality of the GOP supermajority in Tennessee has been further exposed. They’ve limited outreach to children about life-saving vaccines, threatened our public schools, and used hard-earned tax dollars defending their puppet Bill Lee. We must defeat them in 2022.
We still need 115 more recurring donors. Each and every cent will go directly to supporting Democratic candidates during the 2022 election year.
The work your contribution will fund is crucial and includes:
* digital media
* statewide organizing
* door knockers and phone calls
* high-caliber campaign strategy

**[Will you join your fellow Democrats today in our efforts to win back seats in the House by making a recurring contribution?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35936989/306621692/-774923438?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODM2MjliNi1kMDE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R0ouUMEjxVCS6TrVvXcNW2vdS2v1tIvlVhJ6hRTDRjs=)**

Tennessee House Democratic Caucus Chairman

**Iowa is on the frontline in the fight against this pandemic.** GOP governors in Florida and Texas might be front and center for their reckless approach to the pandemic, but those who don't always make the headlines including my opponent Kim Reynolds are just as dangerous.

We can keep following her down Trump's path -- denying facts, blocking local precautions like masks in school, and disincentivizing vaccines -- OR we can truly put our people first.

**This election is about what type of leadership is best for Iowans, and the answer is clear. We know what we need to do, we just need to build the movement to make it happen.**

clean_body: We just got word that Donald Trump is coming to Iowa to rile up his far-right base and continue stoking fear and division. | = BREAKING: Donald Trump is coming to Iowa. = | = Huge news, team. We just got word that Donald Trump is coming to Iowa to rile up his far-right base, continue sowing fear and division, and potentially set up his run for President in 2024. There's no question his visit will boost our opponent, Governor Kim Reynolds. She's taken a page from his book -- denying COVID-19 facts and preventing communities from using tools like local control to make sure all kids wear masks and stay safe in school. Before Trump touches down we need to send a strong message that we're rejecting his hate and division. | | We only have two more weeks until our fundraising numbers become public, Peter, and I’m overwhelmed with gratitude for you and everyone on our team. We set a mid-month fundraising goal of $6,000 and thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we surpassed it and are on track for our FEC deadline. The hard-earned dollars you’re donating are allowing us to connect with voters all over NC-11. Our grassroots campaign to defeat Republican Congressman Madison Cawthorn is growing by the day, and we couldn’t do it without your support. Tomorrow is our second Day of Action and we’re going to be knocking on doors in four counties, hosting a virtual phone bank, and writing postcards. An incredible team of volunteers and interns will be joining us. By #OrganizingEverywhere, we’re going to win. That’s why I’m asking for your help right now. [**Will you pitch in $25 or whatever you can to keep us on track for our end-of-quarter fundraising goal? clean_body: | = | | We only have two more weeks until our fundraising numbers become public, Peter, and I’m overwhelmed with gratitude for you and everyone on our team. We set a mid-month fundraising goal of $6,000 and thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we surpassed it and are on track for our FEC deadline. The hard-earned dollars you’re donating are allowing us to connect with voters all over NC-11. Our grassroots campaign to defeat Republican Congressman Madison Cawthorn is growing by the day, and we couldn’t do it without your support. Tomorrow is our second Day of Action and we’re going to be knocking on doors in four counties, hosting a virtual phone bank, and writing postcards. An incredible team of volunteers and interns will be joining us. By #OrganizingEverywhere, we’re going to win. Virginians in every corner of the Commonwealth are casting their ballots as we speak, and with recent polls showing a tied race, there’s no telling which direction this race could go. Terry’s team is doing everything they can to reach voters all across Virginia, but they need your help. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = The polling in this race is clear: this election will come down to a small percentage of swing voters. And right now, there’s still a big chunk of undecided voters. Terry and his team need to make sure they have the resources to reach those voters — we can’t let Terry be drowned out by his opponent’s Trumpian messages. = Thank you, Mark Warner =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Our obligation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy Democrats
body:
Peter,
We all love our country and our community - but we cannot turn a blind eye or sit on the sidelines while extremist activities continue in Pennsylvania.
Less than three years ago, 11 lives were lost in the deadliest attack on the Jewish people in US history at the Tree of Life Synagogue in Pittsburgh. Here in Bucks County, swastikas were spray painted weeks before our leader election in Bucks County. We've had extremists in Bucks County since the John Birch Society in the 1960s (Ronald Reagan called them the lunatic fringe).
But today, after Yom Kippur (the holiest day of the year for those in the Jewish faith), it's not just swastikas spray painted on homes, but Proud Boys actively rallying in support of our Congressman's office - a group that has been denounced and listed by the FBI as a violent extremist group. Now, the 3% Militia is endorsing candidates in our community, a group which has published training materials that includes sniper operations.
Good people can't stand idly by when extremists are lurking in our neighborhoods.
We all have an obligation to dismantle extremism. We are our brothers and sisters' keepers.
Your friend,
Patrick

PS. We have a few upcoming events to discuss how we can all become more engaged citizens. Join us and Joe Kennedy next Thursday. _**[Click here to RSVP.](https://act.myngp.com/el/I424RUnDig1qzpecVUf-Z_Er3-Er7fuILr0SpQiyE_M=/2h82PounixlqDKlVhYPopUgh5ay92OqnBvGToNYF62c=)**_

Hon. Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Former U.S. Congressman

Paid for by Kennedy Democrats

subject: Your Weekly TL;DR Download
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
| can you be-leaf Build Blue Week starts tomorrow? 🍁
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..lgr3Sizyp7pM9VdXpCoNLTrqquuiVxHdfv4lv6LbxFw)

## **A MOMENT TO SEPTEMBER:**
_2021 is flying by, so let’s be sure to enjoy autumn!_ _And there’s no better way to do that than by browsing our September events calendar, especially our inaugural Build Blue Week!_ _So brew that pumpkin spice latte and get ready to lead Democrats to victory!_ ☕

* * *

[**Do You Want to Run for Office?**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..FLFJsjzOVVfOQ5JQ4-mOnBwNaEmkDyl_lgVWHCfZ4nM)
**TODAY, 1pm ET** We get it — making the decision to run is difficult! But with today’s training and our FREE online resources, we can help make that decision easier. Join us today to evaluate if you want to run, what to run for, and how to do it.
| [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YEzZPTJV0xDVT7paE6yvqUYJhKGekFmAtPXuhibBW8w)
---

* * *

[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ftFgdtKNPK4IFrltLO89X_5mBXpFFHeF0ALdhe7hfwM)
---

[**STARTING THIS WEEKEND: Build Blue Week**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..QRwGJxFXZw6DVlw1MTD0AAtQPhSdc8sMAiX8A9AF6rY)
**TOMORROW, September 18 – Friday, September 24**
Are you a current or aspiring staffer, candidate, or volunteer who wants to connect with Democratic leaders around the country to build on the skills _you_ need to _WIN?_
Then join us for our first-ever **[Build Blue Week](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..OvPak9LG04ew_jwvmySDVC-NrtUCph7aBy3cfoPhHNI)** starting **TOMORROW** for an array of panels, trainings, and Q&As to take your campaign skills to the next level. _Check out the full lineup here and keep scrolling for event week highlights!_

[GO NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..bCbM3gF24ofE8bCtV1fK3Bdi3Gpvwzvj8bXUXqI-nwo)
---

* * *

[**Build Blue Week - Q &A Session: Relational Organizing**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..tliqeAZwuEefTVKBNGQUmDwtQqp5gPrT3Y4H6s0jR0A)
**Wednesday, September 22 at 12pm ET**
Get your questions on relational organizing and value-based conversations answered in this Q&A featuring leading organizing experts. YT Bell is moderating and our panelists include Florida State Rep. Fentrice Driskell, Former National Organizing Director for Pete for America Greta Carnes, Former Coalitions Director, Virginia, Biden for President Monique Alcala, and CEO of the New Georgia Project Nsé Ufot.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..9d5f9DuxFvKzWEad2ui7SOlN5rMVEuiHxDMFNtf7dMA)
---

* * *

[**Build Blue Week - Panel Discussion: So You Want to Run for Office**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3JMa7yrNj91POYlQ30vq3p8MSMGjUxd4E0OpFfQA3m0)
**Monday, September 20 at 2pm ET**
Learn from candidates themselves on deciding to run, as well as the ins and outs of successful campaigning. Get your questions answered from experts like DNC Chair Jaime Harrison, IL State Senator Robert Peters, Co-Founder of Run for Something Ross Morales Rocketto, and more!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..pHh2sfzPBL_o052ONE_aBaW5hPtqOxY28Okp2Hn_2q0)
---

* * *

[**Article Spotlight: Should Texting Be Part of Your Political Campaign Strategy?**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..WhHX-9DieVRct7Jr_KpeI5OaZ2gzXWOf-zrpYZQIPIU)
Our phones are constantly near us... you might even be reading this email on yours!
It’s clear that a texting program can provide great returns for a campaign, but depending on your situation, you need to be able to decide how to spend your resources wisely. Our latest article walks you through whether a broadcast, peer-to-peer, or a mix of the two types of texting programs can benefit your outreach efforts.

subject: Infrastructure

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35941662/306631939/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDVlYmY3MS1kNzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lcY29Ibev3NSphsiFr65jMteNLv2H51mp6CF73zsSTw=&emci=14801ee6-3f16-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=205ebf71-d717-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=9494239)

| | We have a meaningful chance to create millions of family-wage jobs, rebuild our aging roads, bridges and highways _and_ take big steps forward to save our planet. That is the potential of the infrastructure package currently being debated in Congress. **Negotiation is ongoing, but I am confident that we will see a progressive infrastructure deal very soon that does right by Washingtonians by investing in our communities.** That means replacing or repairing our aging bridges, putting green transit like bicycles and electric buses at the center of our networks, expanding broadband internet access to rural communities, expanding Amtrak and ensuring rail safety, supporting airport renovations in ways that reduce pollution, expanding apprenticeship programs, and so much more. **After months of negotiation, now is the time we have to act. We are in the throes of discussion, so close to a generational investment in our workers and environment. The people of Washington state are counting on us to get this done.** As I visit towns and cities across the district, from Everett to Bellingham and beyond, it is clear that Congress needs to hurry up and do its job. I am of the mind that, especially as we navigate a difficult pandemic, the best thing we can do for our families is create good, local jobs and build lasting infrastructure that our children and grandchildren are going to rely on. And we can and must do it while taking critical steps to save our planet. The benefits of a green infrastructure system are too important. Our children, their children, and future generations are counting on us to get this right. **Now is**** _absolutely_****the time to invest in America. Our infrastructure package in Congress does exactly that.** The House has voted on versions of this initiative, and is currently ironing out final details with our Senate colleagues. When all is done, President Joe Biden will sign a remarkable piece of legislation that does right by our workers, families, and communities.
