name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Remember Our Heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
This past week Indiana, and the entire nation, had the opportunity to say thank you and goodbye to two Hoosier heroes. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470850?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
---
| _**Remember Our Heroes**_ This past week Indiana, and the entire nation, had the opportunity to say thank you and goodbye to two Hoosier heroes. Marine Corps Corporal Humberto Sanchez, of Logansport, was killed in a terrorist attack in Afghanistan last month. Thousands of Hoosiers lined the streets for Cpl. Sanchez’s homecoming, and many hundreds more attended or watched his funeral service. Governor Holcomb, Vice President Pence, and Senator Young spoke at the service and I think the governor said it best when he told the Sanchez family that their family “just got about 6.8 million Hoosiers bigger.” Humberto Sanchez was taken too early, but he will never be forgotten.

The other hero Hoosiers said goodbye to this week was Richard “Dick” Thelen, was a World War II veteran and a survivor of the USS Indianapolis. A frequent attendee of the USS Indianapolis reunion events here in Indy, Dick was one of the youngest crew members and played an integral role in the creation of the reunion group. Dick was 94 when he passed away; a long life lived well. It wasn’t lost on me that we said goodbye to these two heroes just days after the twentieth anniversary of September 11. Their passing is a reminder that generations of Americans have raised their hand and put themselves in harms way to keep us free. We are forever grateful.

Thanks
Kyle
**_Photos: _**_Marine Cpl. Humberto Sanchez and Richard "Dick" Thelen._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana for All_**
**Governor Holcomb** presented the International Center's International Citizen of the Year Award to Dan Coats. **Governor Holcomb** was on Dan Coats' staff when Dan was a senator.

**Governor Holcomb** spoke at the funeral service for Marine Cpl. Humberto Sanchez. We will never forget his service and the sacrifice that he paid to keep others safe.

**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb introducing Dan Coats. Gov. Holcomb speaking at Marine Cpl. Humberto Sanchez's funeral service._
---
|
---
| _**Redistricting**_ Earlier this week, the Indiana House of Representatives released a proposed set of new maps for the Indiana House and for Indiana's nine congressional districts. Republican leaders have proposed a set of maps that focus on population, not politics.

The proposed **Congressional District** [map can be found here.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c353c968c3&e=1acd9bb3d6)

The proposed **Indiana House** [map can be found here.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=18ba089c36&e=1acd9bb3d6)

These maps were drawn after an open and transparent process that saw legislative leaders getting input from Hoosiers in all corners of the state. These maps are compact, rejected gerrymandering, and reflect Hoosier communities.

Below are statements from House Speaker Todd Huston, State Rep. Greg Steuerwald (author of HB 1581) and State Sen. Eric Koch (sponsor of HB 1581).
_**“These maps follow all statutory and constitutional requirements and reflect the population trends over the last 10 years. For the new House maps, Representative Steuerwald took a holistic approach and worked tremendously hard to keep communities of interest together with a focus on compactness." -House Speaker Todd Huston**_ _**"These proposed maps are the culmination of a months-long effort, which included listening to Hoosiers across the state. We pulled together all the data along with public input to draw fair maps that account for shifts in population over the years. We look forward to obtaining additional public input and fulfilling our constitutional duties in the coming weeks." -State Rep. Greg Steuerwald**_ _**"I have been pleased with the high level of collaboration between the House and Senate as we have worked to prepare our new draft congressional map. I look forward to continued conversations with members of the public and other legislators on this proposal as we move forward." -State Sen. Eric Koch **_
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer on WISHTV**_ This Sunday Chairman Hupfer will appear on All Indiana Politics. You can watch live here: [https://www.wishtv.com/live-stream/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7e0f63434f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**AOC's Hypocrisy at the Met Gala**_ This was just too rich (pun intended) to ignore. Social media celebrity, defund the police advocate, and the intellectual leader of today’s Democrat Party, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC), caused a bit of a kerfuffle the other day when she attended the $35,000-a-ticket Met Gala in New York City. Adorned in a white gown that said “Tax the Rich,” AOC hobnobbed with the .01% high society types, oblivious, as always, to her own hypocrisy.
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[September 18](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6e6b7c4c51&e=1acd9bb3d6): Parke County Republican Golf Scramble
[September 21](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1777343351&e=1acd9bb3d6): Washington County Lincoln Day Dinner
[September 24](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=104399433b&e=1acd9bb3d6): Henry County Lincoln Day Dinner
[September 25](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=32711af7c2&e=1acd9bb3d6): Adams County Benjamin Harrison Breakfast
---
| |
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[remembers USS Indianapolis survivor Dick Thelen](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5804769c8a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[honors Cpl. Humberto Sanchez](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=315b305ce2&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: This past week Indiana, and the entire nation, had the opportunity to say thank you and goodbye to two Hoosier heroes. | | | | | | | | Remember Our Heroes This past week Indiana, and the entire nation, had the opportunity to say thank you and goodbye to two Hoosier heroes. Marine Corps Corporal Humberto Sanchez, of Logansport, was killed in a terrorist attack in Afghanistan last month. Thousands of Hoosiers lined the streets for Cpl. Sanchez’s homecoming, and many hundreds more attended or watched his funeral service. Governor Holcomb, Vice President Pence, and Senator Young spoke at the service and I think the governor said it best when he told the Sanchez family that their family “just got about 6.8 million Hoosiers bigger.” Humberto Sanchez was taken too early, but he will never be forgotten. The other hero Hoosiers said goodbye to this week was Richard “Dick” Thelen, was a World War II veteran and a survivor of the USS Indianapolis. A frequent attendee of the USS Indianapolis reunion events here in Indy, Dick was one of the youngest crew members and played an integral role in the creation of the reunion group. Dick was 94 when he passed away; a long life lived well. It wasn’t lost on me that we said goodbye to these two heroes just days after the twentieth anniversary of September 11. Their passing is a reminder that generations of Americans have raised their hand and put themselves in harms way to keep us free. We are forever grateful. Thanks Kyle Photos: Marine Cpl. Humberto Sanchez and Richard "Dick" Thelen. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | Building One Indiana for All Governor Holcomb presented the International Center's International Citizen of the Year Award to Dan Coats. Governor Holcomb was on Dan Coats' staff when Dan was a senator. Governor Holcomb spoke at the funeral service for Marine Cpl. Humberto Sanchez. We will never forget his service and the sacrifice that he paid to keep others safe. Photos: Gov. Holcomb introducing Dan Coats. Gov. Holcomb speaking at Marine Cpl. Humberto Sanchez's funeral service. | | Redistricting Earlier this week, the Indiana House of Representatives released a proposed set of new maps for the Indiana House and for Indiana's nine congressional districts. Republican leaders have proposed a set of maps that focus on population, not politics. The proposed Congressional District The proposed Indiana House These maps were drawn after an open and transparent process that saw legislative leaders getting input from Hoosiers in all corners of the state. These maps are compact, rejected gerrymandering, and reflect Hoosier communities. Below are statements from House Speaker Todd Huston, State Rep. Greg Steuerwald (author of HB 1581) and State Sen. Eric Koch (sponsor of HB 1581). “These maps follow all statutory and constitutional requirements and reflect the population trends over the last 10 years. For the new House maps, Representative Steuerwald took a holistic approach and worked tremendously hard to keep communities of interest together with a focus on compactness." -House Speaker Todd Huston "These proposed maps are the culmination of a months-long effort, which included listening to Hoosiers across the state. We pulled together all the data along with public input to draw fair maps that account for shifts in population over the years. We look forward to obtaining additional public input and fulfilling our constitutional duties in the coming weeks." -State Rep. Greg Steuerwald "I have been pleased with the high level of collaboration between the House and Senate as we have worked to prepare our new draft congressional map. I look forward to continued conversations with members of the public and other legislators on this proposal as we move forward." -State Sen. Eric Koch | | | Chairman Hupfer on WISHTV This Sunday Chairman Hupfer will appear on All Indiana Politics. You can watch live here: | | | AOC's Hypocrisy at the Met Gala This was just too rich (pun intended) to ignore. Social media celebrity, defund the police advocate, and the intellectual leader of today’s Democrat Party, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC), caused a bit of a kerfuffle the other day when she attended the $35,000-a-ticket Met Gala in New York City. Adorned in a white gown that said “Tax the Rich,” AOC hobnobbed with the .01% high society types, oblivious, as always, to her own hypocrisy. | | Upcoming Republican Events : Parke County Republican Golf Scramble : Washington County Lincoln Day Dinner : Henry County Lincoln Day Dinner : Adams County Benjamin Harrison Breakfast | | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. name: Team Malcolm
subject: the numbers we post this quarter will have a huge impact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey team —
At the end of this month, we will face the next FEC filing deadline of our campaign, after which we are legally required to publicly report our fundraising numbers.
A whole lot of candidates have entered the race since our last filing deadline, so it's very important for us to stand out this time around with a big number to report.
[So if you're in a place to do so today, I hope you will consider making a donation to support our movement for working people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35942878/306637354/-353695395?refcode2=ceb1b37d-d917-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210917-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWIxYjM3ZC1kOTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbcoxUScf0ckqwGW40LNWxV3ukZBFd2Ql3EjmbwMcKg=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35942882/306637358/-353695395?refcode2=ceb1b37d-d917-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210917-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWIxYjM3ZC1kOTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbcoxUScf0ckqwGW40LNWxV3ukZBFd2Ql3EjmbwMcKg=)**
Even though the field grew a lot this quarter, our campaign still has one thing they don't: A real working person fighting for working families.
That’s why we have been endorsed by unions and legislators from Philadelphia to Braddock and lots of counties in between.
And our deadline is quickly approaching, so I'm reaching out today because the numbers we post this quarter will have a huge impact on how people view the strength of our movement.
If we don’t post strong numbers, the pundits will say we don't have what it takes to win this race.
But if everyone contributes whatever they can afford, we’ll show all of the naysayers that there's an enormous coalition of support behind Malcolm's historic campaign for Senate.
[So that’s why I need to ask — can you make a contribution today, ahead of our big deadline at the end of this month, to ensure that our movement for working people comes out on top?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35942884/306637362/-353695395?refcode2=ceb1b37d-d917-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210917-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWIxYjM3ZC1kOTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbcoxUScf0ckqwGW40LNWxV3ukZBFd2Ql3EjmbwMcKg=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35942886/306637364/-353695395?refcode2=ceb1b37d-d917-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210917-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWIxYjM3ZC1kOTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbcoxUScf0ckqwGW40LNWxV3ukZBFd2Ql3EjmbwMcKg=)**

Vanessa

_"Democrats who helped their party recapture the House majority in 2018 only to lose reelection two years later are jumping back into the political fray ahead of next year's midterm election."_

Fellow Conservative - this is happening right here in South Carolina, too.

**Former Congressman Joe Cunningham is looking to turn a 2020 loss in a U.S. House race into a 2022 gubernatorial election challenge against me.**

And the Democrats aren't just counting on favorable opinions in the press - they've already set records for this election cycle - raising more than $750,000 against me in the first few months of the campaign.

Democrats and pundits think they can win with their deep-pocketed elite contributor machine but Fellow Conservative, no matter how much outside liberal fundraising support they receive - I'm confident we can defeat the Democrats' effort to raise a giant "blue wave" of election success here in South Carolina.

**[Will you please step forward now and help me prove the Democrats wrong with your difference making support today? Your generous grassroots contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100, or even more now will help ensure we have the resources we need to keep our election programs fully funded and effective, turn back whatever challenge the Democrats can offer, and emerge victorious!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2c602bd522c04c8fa868b4fc4a1230cb&_e=fxAQLrh4hd1I-2LwNJhi8jec75Ef8BQBPyeueyL4h0PDU1n0xGaLK8ADmcTjVF3g-AURaXiZ8J_zq1-qF9jRc1vb_EBnSme94cljw_OEwp1eghdK2bvXiKow2Uvp-yV9I3ldIk01EIwsrgBAg8yCCgziYsnf7LKmDrWzMcvaSVlbTcWL69vw-bEWmWiwyIVAnUBu0ElcJb-RGvqg0I5aagnxd4QlP4p9qLYzX_pz8KtbvQfSWyCdJIZDWlJdZ_eIKgnteWDcI-t0B6rauadHcD3TK8q6HhDR2OUuX3ndDmhlIfGA0Zg1I6DoNHBFR8yeCOrrVwcd1rw0l8gyYJP8D1Yxy5BxecCTJ1yvCLmrsvzZtrHtcz5v5gbS45oYsBm9dbwN-tJ77cGuOWxW5v8GUK9XiWOmNweSrxegaBD51l_4VFA9FKkXYlcZZ71zaDX7QjVPfFoniPH6tqXXEFrsmA%3D%3D)**

_Fellow Conservative, we can't take anything for granted_. name: Pete, E3
subject: Virginia votes today, and educators need our help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Educators Everywhere PAC
body:
Voting starts today in Virginia, and we’ve got to help set the record straight for the educators in competitive elections. | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35943878/306640593/-921286288?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210917VAvoting_PH_180DO_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNTYwOGM1LWRiMTctZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2ijzWx_Sb9hpKm49uZJEsd5uyKrhxUYI_mEQ64gGBpM=)
---
Educators & allies, Voting starts today in Virginia, and we’ve got to help set the record straight for the educators in competitive elections. With just a five-seat majority, it's no exaggeration to say that if these educators win, Democrats will hold the house. If they lose, it's hard to see how we could stop a Republican takeover. _**[Make your contribution now and we’ll put it to work right away.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35943879/306640600/1983039413?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210917VAvoting_PH_180DO_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNTYwOGM1LWRiMTctZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2ijzWx_Sb9hpKm49uZJEsd5uyKrhxUYI_mEQ64gGBpM=)**_ Every one of these seats were held by Republicans before the 2017 elections, and if they flip back and Republicans take control, we know the extreme agenda they’ll pursue:
* Banning masks in schools but allowing guns on school campuses
* Whitewashing history, denying science, and bullying teachers

name: Rep. Jessica Benham
subject: "Nothing about us, without us."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=091721 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=091721]

Dear Friend,

People with disabilities, including myself, make up 17.5 percent of Pennsylvania's voters, and are disproportionately impacted by a lack of health care, by environmental hazards, and by a lack of access to economic opportunity. As a State Representative, I’m driven to work urgently to solve the problems facing all of us, because I know firsthand the communities who bear the heaviest burden.

So often in policy discussions and electoral politics non-disabled voices are prioritized over the voices of the disabled.

Keystone Progress understands that movement leaders should be those who are most impacted by a given issue and that organizing should build bridges across movements, and is currently launching a Disability Constituency-led Voter Registration, Education, and pilot program in Western PA to increase political engagement and turnout, especially in our suburban and rural counties. This program will be staffed and managed entirely from within the Disability community.

Before I ran for office, I co-founded the Pittsburgh Center for Autistic Advocacy. PCAA is an organization run by and for Autistic people. I know firsthand the hard work that goes into creating a successful program.

With this in mind, I want to express my support of the work Keystone is doing within the Disability community and ask that you support them as well, for a more equitable and just community for ALL Pennsylvanians.

"Nothing about us, without us."

Jessica Benham
State Representative

Are you a Pennsylvanian with a Disability who would like to become involved in this initiative? Sign up here.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=091721 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=091721]

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Harrisburg, PA 17108
United States

subject: Our Mission

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35945053/306644452/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWYyOWMyMy1kZjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQEuynwele3szOdpBawXN7aviAeNch2OXFn_0Fsytx4=)
Friends — Our work at Defend the Senate is driven by our mission to fight back against the GOP, elect Democrats, and strengthen our Democratic Senate majority. We know that we can’t do this work alone, so we’re grateful for you and other grassroots supporters across the country who are equally committed to building and defending our movement to protect Democrats. As we look ahead to the upcoming midterm elections, we are aware that there are several major threats to the Democratic Party that could put our narrow majority in danger. The midterms are right around the corner, and it’s imperative that we start to lay the groundwork to support the candidates and Senators up in 2022 — because if we wait any longer it may be too late. And think about all of the opposition we faced in order to flip the Senate in 2020. We had to protect the rights of every eligible voter and defend our candidates from the onslaught of attack ads that slander and spread misinformation about them and their campaigns. That was 2020, but you can bet Mitch McConnell and his allies will employ these same tactics again next year. And they will be coming at us even harder to try and take back the majority. We must gather our resources now because we can’t allow the GOP to successfully flip even one seat. If they do, they could take back the Senate and undo all of our hard work. [**So******** please contribute a donation of $10 or more to protect Democrats across the country and help us expand our Senate majority in 2022. clean_body: | = Friends — Our work at Defend the Senate is driven by our mission to fight back against the GOP, elect Democrats, and strengthen our Democratic Senate majority. We know that we can’t do this work alone, so we’re grateful for you and other grassroots supporters across the country who are equally committed to building and defending our movement to protect Democrats. As we look ahead to the upcoming midterm elections, we are aware that there are several major threats to the Democratic Party that could put our narrow majority in danger. The midterms are right around the corner, and it’s imperative that we start to lay the groundwork to support the candidates and Senators up in 2022 — because if we wait any longer it may be too late. And think about all of the opposition we faced in order to flip the Senate in 2020. We had to protect the rights of every eligible voter and defend our candidates from the onslaught of attack ads that slander and spread misinformation about them and their campaigns. That was 2020, but you can bet Mitch McConnell and his allies will employ these same tactics again next year. And they will be coming at us even harder to try and take back the majority. We must gather our resources now because we can’t allow the GOP to successfully flip even one seat. body:
We may not always see eye-to-eye on every issue, but with me you're going to get someone who calls it like he sees it. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35945178/306644722/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWE2N2U4YS1kZjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mWo2TJyHovVmJ0Z9YB5-ZXbLwZL9EDUqddT63aSduN0=)
Friend,

I recently had the opportunity to attend a meeting with Democratic women in Chico. An issue that came up more than once is what's happening in Texas regarding reproductive rights, so I wanted to take this opportunity to share where I stand on this issue.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35945179/306644723/-109236511?refcode=em-91721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWE2N2U4YS1kZjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mWo2TJyHovVmJ0Z9YB5-ZXbLwZL9EDUqddT63aSduN0=)
_A great conversation with Democratic women in Chico._
A lot of "experts" have given me conventional advice about this race. They've told me only to talk about certain issues, and stay away from others.

But I'm not a conventional politician. I'm a straight shooter and if something's on my mind, I'm going to say it. This isn’t about saying what will "play well" politically. This is about serving those who have been ignored by Doug LaMalfa and politicians like him.

**What's happening in Texas is too important not to speak out on. I'll state unequivocally that I believe in a woman's right to make decisions about her own health and body.**

As someone who believes in preserving the health and well-being of women, I think Texas' ban on abortions after six weeks is a danger women's safety. As an American, I believe this ban is an attack on our personal freedoms and rights as private citizens in this county.

Furthermore, deputizing citizens to rat on their friends and neighbors for a $10,000 bounty is not only immoral -- it fosters the kind of strife and social division that we are sick and tired of seeing in our communities.

**Friend, we may not always see eye-to-eye on every issue, but with me you're going to get someone who calls it like he sees it.** I hope that's enough for you to help me defeat the seditionist Doug LaMalfa. If it is, please consider **[clicking this link or the button below to join me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35945180/306644724/-109236511?refcode=em-91721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWE2N2U4YS1kZjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mWo2TJyHovVmJ0Z9YB5-ZXbLwZL9EDUqddT63aSduN0=)**

Thanks,

Max Steiner
Proud American, Combat Veteran, and Candidate for Congress

| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35945181/306644725/-109236511?refcode=em-91721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWE2N2U4YS1kZjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mWo2TJyHovVmJ0Z9YB5-ZXbLwZL9EDUqddT63aSduN0=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Justice=20Democrats?=
subject: JUST IN: House Democrats ready to negotiate away progressive interests
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
#
Unbelievable, Peter.
Conservative Democrats like Joe Manchin want to cut the $3.5 trillion spending bill to just $1.5 trillion. It will reduce investments in health care, climate action, and child care. But like Bernie Sanders, AOC, and other progressive leaders have said -- $3.5 trillion was already a hard-fought compromise. Bernie's original proposal as Budget Chair was $6 trillion!
We can't give in to corporate interests like Exxon, Pfizer, and Disney, who have spent millions of dollars fighting the progressive priorities in the reconciliation package. We know that in order to really build back better, we need a big and bold investment to ensure everyone has health care, education, and quality infrastructure.
[With these new developments, the fight against watering down the $3.5 trillion spending bill is on. Will you stand with AOC, Bernie, and the rest of our progressive coalition by chipping in so we can continue this fight?](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=9a75c7848a&e=5a4b10d0ec)
**[Contribute](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=4f76ad2f3c&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
Further compromises would be to go backward and sacrifice popular investments in climate action, child care, and more job creation, which is why we can’t let establishment Democrats fold to the corporations who have fought this reconciliation package tooth and nail. All while profits have soared during the pandemic at the expense of the American people.
It’s clear: With President Biden in the White House AND a Congressional majority, we don’t need to concede to Exxon or negotiate with Republicans. **[We need Democrats to do their job and pass a budget that will benefit the people — not corporate interests. If you’re with us in this fight, will you chip in $5, $27, or anything at all right now?](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=0fe5911fd5&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats
**[Contribute](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=43d438e4c8&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
[Donate »](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=16daccbd46&e=5a4b10d0ec)

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Stand with me to expand healthcare
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]SIGN IF YOU AGREE: We need to reduce the cost of prescription medication and expand affordable, quality healthcare coverage. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xcOagktg4EWPVWyeLClVjQ2]
Dear Peter,
No Marylander should have to choose between life-saving medications and putting food on the table. That’s why if I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I’m going to lower the costs of healthcare and expand affordable primary and preventive care.
My healthcare policy will be centered on the principle that social determinants of health -- including poverty, access to transportation, good housing, and healthy food -- are the most significant inputs to the health outcomes for Marylanders. That’s why I’ll prioritize funding for primary and preventive care that proactively reduces chronic health conditions that lead to hospitalization. My plan will aim to reduce new instances of diabetes, hypertension, and asthma at least 20% by 2030.
But I also recognize that we must take bold steps to care for those who do require more advanced treatment -- which is why I’m going to explore an expansion of the Prescription Drug Affordability Board to full coverage of the existing market. Prescription drug prices have simply become too high for the average Marylander. It’s time to fix that.
If you agree that we need to reduce the cost of prescription drugs and expand affordable, quality care, will you add your name to my petition? I’m looking to get 1,500 signatures from grassroots supporters by the end of next week to send the strong message that our healthcare system needs an urgent revamp. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xcOagktg4EWPVWyeLClVjQ2]
For many of our friends, family and neighbors, particularly those belonging to our most vulnerable and disadvantaged communities, lack of affordable healthcare coverage has unfortunately led to deadly consequences during this once-in-a-generation public health crisis.
There are hundreds of thousands of Marylanders still living without health insurance. There are many more who are under-insured, or who are unable to afford the cost of services even with insurance. To all of them, I say that help is on the way.
I am urging you to stand with me in this fight to expand affordable coverage. Sign my petition if you agree that the next Governor needs to take bold action to reduce the cost of prescription drugs, and expand affordable primary and preventive care. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xcOagktg4EWPVWyeLClVjQ2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?amount=20.22&refcode=em091721]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d002a947-4512-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/9f354b12-e117-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjM1NGIxMi1lMTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GGZfrDIjkVz9af_a6GQOP9t6ckdKStACKJ9Puw2AxV8=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

Peter,

While eyes were on Biden’s crisis in Afghanistan, Nancy Pelosi was not letting a crisis go to waste...

**Democrats passed the**** _John Lewis Voting Rights Act_ ,**** or **_**H.R. 4**_**!**

Don’t be fooled by the new name or title; H.R. 4; H.R. 4 is nothing more than a rebranded H.R.1.

Here’s a quick breakdown of why this bill is so reckless and why Americans must stop it:
1. 1. **Secures a Democratic Majority!**
2. **Gives Federal Funding to Democrat Campaigns!**
3. **Legalizes Ballot Harvesting!**
4. **Eliminates State Voter ID Laws!**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Two McConnell-linked super PACs are targeting NH
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends –
Mark said I could reach out to you as one of his top supporters. My team just informed me that **two McConnell-linked super PACs unleashed massive amounts of dark money into New Hampshire, specifically targeting my campaign.** They're pledging to spend tens of millions of dollars against me to flip the Senate.
Top Republicans are laser-focused on my race because, just like Arizona, New Hampshire is one of the seats they have the best chance to flip.
In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history. And now, in 2022, experts are saying New Hampshire is one of the most vulnerable Senate seats in the country. **If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim Senate majority -- affecting everything from health care protections to the fate of Roe v. Wade.**
If we're going to win and protect our Senate majority, my team and I will need as much help as we can get. That is why I'm asking for your support.
If you can, please consider donating today. Just $5 from everyone who reads this will help us fight back against these unwavering attacks.
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Our Senate is split 50-50 and losing even one seat means losing the Senate. That's why it's crucial to respond to these attacks early and show Republicans that we're ready to defend this seat.
So please, if you can, chip in $5 today to help keep New Hampshire and the Senate blue.
Thank you for your continued support.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far.
_Sponsored message_
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs0a969qffg93o7nsignn1c97ovq57dspheasbcg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cjg68or4c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhno15hobkh2111ne9qp3ouatkei0daiu038okog_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cjg68or4c9h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5inubfnk0h6d2m3jcul38iam55qk28ndtd27j48_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cjg68or4c9h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

clean_body: double your impact before midnight. | | | = | | Derek, Terry just launched a HUGE weekend fundraising goal to kick off early voting. It’s going to be a lot of work, but we just got some good news. Until midnight tonight only, any contribution you make to the early voting fund will be matched by a group of anonymous donors. That means your support will go twice as far — but that’s only if you donate today, Derek. The match opportunity couldn’t come at a better time — we just learned that Glenn Youngkin outraised us by writing himself over $4 million in checks before the last filing deadline. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = These match opportunities don’t come up too often, Derek, so if you’ve been waiting for the right moment to make a contribution, this is it. Today is huge because Glenn Youngkin has already spent $16.5 million of his personal fortune, and has vowed to spend a total of $75 million by the end of this race. So Terry’s got to be ready for whatever Glenn throws at him, Derek! And that starts with reaching this weekend fundraising goal. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for doing your part, Ellie Warner Finance Director Terry for VA = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- September 17****, 2021-** **\- ICYMI: INGOP Continues Sham Redistricting Process, Releases Gerrymandered Legislative Maps -** This week officially kicked off Indiana's redistricting process, and as expected, it was very clear Indiana Republicans wanted to continue the status quo and manipulate the system against voters for another decade. Here's the truth: voters are tired of the same canned lies from politicians, and simply being lied to when it matters most. Indiana Democrats agree, and it's why we have consistently called for a genuine conversation about redistricting and a better way to do it. Democrats have called out the Indiana Republicans Party about breaking their promise for a "fair" and "transparent" process. Holding hollow hearings, describing voters' concerns as "grandstanding", and hiring a high-priced, Washington D.C. Republican consultant to rig the system tarnishes this process. Democrats believe now is the chance to have fair, competitive maps and the opportunity for Hoosier voters to decide the future of Indiana -- NOT the other way around. Democrats will keep working overtime to deliver a better and brighter future for all Hoosiers because, for the last 10 years, Indiana Republicans have dimmed that opportunity. They created a "work more for less" economy, underfunded the state's public schools, and promoted unnecessary culture wars that divided families and communities. This all falls squarely on Indiana Republicans, and they created this broken system through redistricting. Democrats and Hoosiers know Indiana is at its strongest when there are two strong political parties because that's when the right solution - not a partisan one - solves today's problems facing their families. It's time for fairer maps and a better future for Hoosiers. **\- American Rescue Plan Continues to Deliver for Hoosier Families -** Thanks to President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats like Congressman André Carson and Congressman Frank Mrvan, Hoosier families in Indiana are receiving about $447 in monthly payments through the Child Tax Credit - and it's all thanks to the American Rescue Plan. The Child Tax Credit is hugely popular and is supported by 59-percent of American voters, including 41-percent of Republicans. Not a single Indiana Republican voted for this common-sense opportunity for Hoosier families, but instead, sided with their extreme partisanship over lifting nearly [80,000 Indiana children out of poverty](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35947553/306653288/2075701864?FFF.09.17.21=FFF.09.17.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTY1ZTNhOC1lNDE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lcIQMNYBIHR6eP8IlVefeJy4idxYaQ1axVJCcBjkvDY=&emci=ea9d1ecb-e216-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5565e3a8-e417-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535). But, Indiana Democrats are not finished and plan to make this tax credit permanent through the upcoming American Jobs Plan and President Joe Biden's Build Back Better agenda. The time to deliver for Hoosier families is now, and while Democrats are focused on solving today's biggest problems for Indiana, Congressional Republicans will continue to say "NO" and let their extreme partisanship lead their agenda. Indiana Democrats will work overtime to deliver for Hoosiers - no matter the Zip code or political affiliation. **\- Opportunities -** **\- Hispanic Heritage Month -** **Power of the Black and Brown Vote** ****
**[Sign Up](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35947554/306653289/-1968974461?FFF.09.17.21=FFF.09.17.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTY1ZTNhOC1lNDE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lcIQMNYBIHR6eP8IlVefeJy4idxYaQ1axVJCcBjkvDY=&emci=ea9d1ecb-e216-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5565e3a8-e417-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535)** **State of the Latino Community** **

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- September 17, 2021- \- ICYMI: INGOP Continues Sham Redistricting Process, Releases Gerrymandered Legislative Maps - This week officially kicked off Indiana's redistricting process, and as expected, it was very clear Indiana Republicans wanted to continue the status quo and manipulate the system against voters for another decade. Here's the truth: voters are tired of the same canned lies from politicians, and simply being lied to when it matters most. Indiana Democrats agree, and it's why we have consistently called for a genuine conversation about redistricting and a better way to do it. Democrats have called out the Indiana Republicans Party about breaking their promise for a "fair" and "transparent" process. Holding hollow hearings, describing voters' concerns as "grandstanding", and hiring a high-priced, Washington D.C. Republican consultant to rig the system tarnishes this process. Democrats believe now is the chance to have fair, competitive maps and the opportunity for Hoosier voters to decide the future of Indiana -- NOT the other way around. Democrats will keep working overtime to deliver a better and brighter future for all Hoosiers because, for the last 10 years, Indiana Republicans have dimmed that opportunity. They created a "work more for less" economy, underfunded the state's public schools, and promoted unnecessary culture wars that divided families and communities. This all falls squarely on Indiana Republicans, and they created this broken system through redistricting. Democrats and Hoosiers know Indiana is at its strongest when there are two strong political parties because that's when the right solution - not a partisan one - solves today's problems facing their families. It's time for fairer maps and a better future for Hoosiers. \- American Rescue Plan Continues to Deliver for Hoosier Families - Thanks to President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats like Congressman André Carson and Congressman Frank Mrvan, Hoosier families in Indiana are receiving about $447 in monthly payments through the Child Tax Credit - and it's all thanks to the American Rescue Plan. The Child Tax Credit is hugely popular and is supported by 59-percent of American voters, including 41-percent of Republicans. Not a single Indiana Republican voted for this common-sense opportunity for Hoosier families, but instead, sided with their extreme partisanship over lifting nearly . But, Indiana Democrats are not finished and plan to make this tax credit permanent through the upcoming American Jobs Plan and President Joe Biden's Build Back Better agenda. The time to deliver for Hoosier families is now, and while Democrats are focused on solving today's biggest problems for Indiana, Congressional Republicans will continue to say "NO" and let their extreme partisanship lead their agenda. Indiana Democrats will work overtime to deliver for Hoosiers - no matter the Zip code or political affiliation. \- Opportunities - \- Hispanic Heritage Month - Power of the Black and Brown Vote ** State of the Latino Community \- County Party Trainings - Join Indiana Democratic Party for a training on what party chairs should know about reprecincting and local office redistricting. Please email Lauren Ganapini at mailto:lauren@indems.org?subject=Campaign%20Finance%20Training%20Sign-Up for sign-up information. This event is only for county party chairs and treasurers. Join Indiana Democratic Party for a legislative update on election law 2021 session. Please let us know if you need special accommodations by Thursday 10/07/21. name: Mike Collier
subject: educators and students are suffering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
**Hi folks: There is an ongoing crisis among Texas educators, teachers, and students suffering at the hands of Gov. Greg Abbott’s and Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick’s policies.** With the rise in COVID cases spreading across the state, Dan Patrick and Greg Abbott’s only solution is to ban schools from requiring any form of safety measures, including mask and vaccine requirements — suing schools that try to protect their students. In fact, dozens of school districts have been forced to shut down in-person classes, and we are seeing an uptick in positive cases amongst our children — it’s unacceptable. As everyone knows, I first got into politics because of public education, and _never_ have I seen the contempt for our public schools and educators so evident. While private schools and charters remain untouched by Ken Paxton and Greg Abbott, our public schools are once again under attack. It’s just unconscionable. **[Educators are and have always been the backbone of our movement, and they need support now more than ever. Add your name next to mine to stand with educators and demand that state leaders protect and fully fund our public schools immediately:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35947614/306653515/1299606195?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20210917_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmU1OTgxZS1lNTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=umiB6ywaU_gyixugi2aUSKmxuOmpTDAY6xEdTQBmICk=&emci=0ae5981e-e517-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=0be5981e-e517-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=7689298)** | [STAND WITH EDUCATORS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35947615/306653516/1299606195?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20210917_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmU1OTgxZS1lNTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=umiB6ywaU_gyixugi2aUSKmxuOmpTDAY6xEdTQBmICk=&emci=0ae5981e-e517-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=0be5981e-e517-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=7689298)

Thanks for fighting for the future of our great state.
— Mike Collier
_(P.S. name: Team Erica Smith
subject: “What’s the urgency”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Check out what Erica had to say.
#
Earlier this week, Joe Manchin went on CNN to say that Senate Democrats will NOT have his vote on President Biden’s $3.5 trillion Build Back Better plan because, as he put it, “ _what’s the urgency._ ”
Well, Erica had some words for Joe Manchin:
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15010?refcode=em20210917-450&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=450%2E3698%2E3Hv9uG)
Joe Manchin’s devotion to his corporate donors continues to derail President Biden’s agenda and ensures that families in North Carolina and across the country continue to struggle to survive.
It’s clear: We need that 51st YES vote to pass the bold, progressive, and urgent policies that will truly change people’s lives.
That’s why we’re building a diverse, working-class coalition RIGHT NOW to send Erica to the U.S. Senate and expand our razor-thin Democratic majority in 2022 — but the only way we can win is with your help.
[**Will you chip in $5 (or whatever you can) to send Erica Smith to the U.S. Senate where she will ALWAYS vote on the side of the people, not corporate donors?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15010?refcode=em20210917-450&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=450%2E3698%2E3Hv9uG) Unlike Joe Manchin, Erica doesn’t take a single dime from corporate PACs, so every contribution will make a huge difference.
**[Donate](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15010?refcode=em20210917-450&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=450%2E3698%2E3Hv9uG)**
Thanks for everything,
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210917-450-footer&t=22&refcode2=450_3698_3Hv9uG&akid=450%2E3698%2E3Hv9uG)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: I'm low on cash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
I'm not going to have the chance to shake up the SWAMP if my campaign doesn’t have the resources to bring this battle to front lines. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

clean_body: I'm not going to have the chance to shake up the SWAMP if my campaign doesn’t have the resources to bring this battle to front lines. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Fellow American, I can’t even sugarcoat this: I’m short on campaign funds right now. We started out this race in a great position financially, with a lot of support from grassroots donors from all over the nation. Summer definitely put a dent in our momentum, and we need to get it back. I recorded a video for you that I’m asking you to watch today. Please, won’t you take a moment and listen to what I have to say? If you really want to shake things up in Washington DC, drain the swamp, and restore our freedoms, We are not going to have the chance to do that if my campaign doesn’t have the resources to bring this battle to front lines. Thank you for your consideration. Mark McCloskey Republican for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: We’re shaking our heads. | 🚨 BREAKING: Governor DeWine suggested the GOP-drawn district maps are UNCONSTITUTIONAL — but he voted FOR them anyway 🚨 = Friend – We had to let you know about this as soon as we heard. Mike DeWine, a member of the majority Republican panel that just released Ohio’s new legislative district maps, suggested that the maps he helped draw aren’t “clearly constitutional.” Maybe that’s why the two Democrats on the panel didn’t support them. So we have just one question for our governor: Why did YOU vote for the maps, Mike? = Ohioans deserve a governor who knows the difference between right and wrong (or at the very least constitutional and unconstitutional) and will stand on the side of truth, justice, and the law every time. That’s John Cranley — plain and simple. It’s why he started Ohio’s chapter of the Innocence Project to fight on behalf of wrongfully incarcerated people. John has already shown us what kind of leader he’ll be. The short version? Not like Mike DeWine. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks, Team Cranley = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: My New Initiative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Changes need to be made |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7055f3d62b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud America First State Representative in the State of Arizona who has been leading the vanguard in America’s Audit in Maricopa County.

**A few days ago, President Trump endorsed me to be the next Arizona Secretary of State**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5ec3e4c412&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _I know this last week there has been bombshell after bombshell coming out of the Maricopa. And I know it’s a lot to keep track of._

This is why I am writing you today...

I have a big announcement –

**_I am officially calling for a State-Wide Door-to-Door Voter Roll Verification in Arizona – and[I need your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7c50e7ee27&e=44b8c466b0)._**

Such a massive endeavor does not come without a cost, and to get this done we need to take the Election Integrity movement to the NEXT LEVEL!

**I need all patriots to rally together. President Trump is standing behind us with his recent endorsement. Together we can take back Arizona.**

_[Can you show your support? We have an urgent fundraising goal of $75,000 by the end of the quarter, just a few weeks away!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=afde98ae25&e=44b8c466b0)_
[***Help us reach our fundraising goal!***](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d44e4f1f38&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0d21342e73&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I was just on the One America News Network to talk about the terrifying results of a grassroots canvassing effort into the voter rolls. While this is not part of the Audit being conducted by the Senate, it does raise some worrisome implications.

The Executive Summary from the report reads:
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=89ff083de0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| With 173,104 votes suspect, even if a small fraction of those were due to fraud, then it is absolutely clear that the Arizona election needs to be decertified IMMEDIATELY and strong work needs to be done to verify the voter rolls.

_We need a door-to-door verification of these voter rolls to ensure exactly which votes were not counted and WHY._

**And then we need to lock everyone responsible for this Democracy-Destroying fraud up in prison. For a very long time.**

But this will take a momentous effort. This is all hands on deck. And I need your urgent support to get us to the end of the quarter.

_[We need to raise $75,000 by the end of the quarter to keep the momentum going. My campaign to defend Election Integrity depends on you! Can you help out with a donate of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=95431c647a&e=44b8c466b0)_

**[I am still $65k SHORT of my goal and need your help right now.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5a4d835dbe&e=44b8c466b0)**

Friends and Patriots, this has been a long and illuminating journey for us all.

**When I first paid for the election integrity hearings out of pocket, I knew there were severe problems with the election in 2020. **

**_I had no idea the depths of corruption and fraud that these investigations could reveal._**

But I want to leave you with a message of hope. You may feel dismayed, threatened, and even silenced by the Democrats. You may feel like if they can steal the election in 2020, what’s the point?

**Here’s the point. It is not over, the fight is not yet lost. Every day we are winning battles for Election Integrity and the end of the war is in sight. The victor in this war will be determined by who is more persistent, louder, and more passionate.**

_[Will you let the Democrats voices be louder, pockets be deeper, and armies be more persistent?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9f89df8455&e=44b8c466b0)_

**Of course not! We are Republicans. We are Conservatives. And we never back down from a fight.**

_[Show your support today so we can win the fight. And we WILL win the war for Election Integrity!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a6ccffb3d7&e=44b8c466b0)_
[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6127fbfa44&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3f837e007b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. President Trump just endorsed my campaign. We must raise what is needed to defeat the corrupt Democrats. I have to raise $75k by the end of this month to meet my fundraising numbers. [Will you contribute $15, $35, $100 or more to help me get there?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=03cceab02e&e=44b8c466b0) Every amount helps!

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=615ba55188) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=615ba55188).

In case you haven't heard, **Pennsylvania Senate Republicans have taken the unprecedented move of subpoenaing Pennsylvania voters' personal records --_your personal information_ \-- to run an Arizona-inspired election audit right here in our state.**

Except this isn't just an audit, _it's an attack on our democracy itself._

When it comes to perpetuating Donald Trump's "Big Lie" conspiracy about election fraud, there's no length Republicans won't go to scare people out of voting. If they can't scare them out, they'll keep them out by passing restrictive voting laws. If they can't keep them out, they'll get rid of the people in charge of our elections.

name: Ric Grenell
subject: He fought for America. Will you fight with him?
body:
Just know that Kash is the man, and a true patriot we can count on.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmivbblaetjc9apvdoie4mqqaefu7cvn6dvv62g0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2ddlcar60otjmiobat3jeeq38ojicoqn8s5nm6rr4t30cgrmashic3gn6d5i6urt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaomccln6di30tj3coor1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpi69o35chj6aoh5u)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4561jeh1u75m26c391c1hcs0scro4dbkg2luvno_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cjg6ap36clh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot, Over my years working in the D.C. swamp, including as Acting Director of National Intelligence for the greatest President in history, Donald J. Trump, and his Ambassador to Germany, I received some important advice: **_" Judge a man by the character of his enemies."_** And when it comes to Kash Patel, he has all the right enemies. As he writes in the email below, lead deep stater Adam "Shifty" Schiff recently launched an all-out assault on his character - where I'm honored to be name-dropped alongside him. **[The timing of Schiff's smear is extremely telling, as it comes as Kash is launching a historic first-of-its kind LEGAL OFFENSIVE TRUST against the fake news media.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhdptu5np4ki6fl2vs2vp6659q2sb49veh3nt6lg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cjg6ap36clh2bs)** **After all, it was Kash who drafted the Nunes memo exposing just how fake the Russia investigation was.** And unlike most weak-kneed "investigations" coming out of Washington, Kash didn't pull any punches, and named names going all the way to the top, including corrupt officials like Hillary Clinton and James Comey. So Schiff's hatred is based on the fact that Kash is a patriot who isn't willing to sell out his country to the deep state. **[I consider Kash a good friend, and close ally in the fight for America First- and that's why I'm hoping you will help him continue that fight by chipping in to his LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND against the fake news media.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z1bp91vqienrjghbbijgtpto3b3r20g9t7b7u490_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cjg6ap36clh2bs)** You can read more about his fight below. But just know that Kash is the man, and a true patriot we can count on. Thank you! Richard Grenell
Former Acting Director of National Intelligence for President Donald J. Trump [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmqm2l5sr30tho4e6ht9kadie3i6ul390to40p3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cjg6ap36clh2bs)

* * *
**\--Begin Forwarded Message--** _" Political hacks like Ric Grenell and others were put in positions of responsibility, **like Kash Patel** , that they had no business being in."_ - Deep State Rep. Adam Schiff The timing on this attack isn't surprising at all. It comes just as I am launching my new [LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr7su3r3auqli6hpp3ktpv5mcc8qnrn3jk9mq170_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cjg6ap36clh2bs) to take on the fake news media, who anti-America losers like Adam Schiff rely on to smear people like me. With Adam Schiff being this angry with me, I know that I'm right on target, and the only thing to do now is double-down. But to do that I need the support of American patriots, thousands of which have already stepped up. **[So can I count on you to make a generous contribution to my LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND against he fake news media?](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjp2m0ld02v708dapc60ckechhc9c1c6qeli97ng_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cjg6ap36clh2bs)** | | | | [Chip in $25](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfdpbe4mcq1hv4mu5sp61gtmra2fl2ce8c71ii68_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cjg6ap36clh2bs)

---

**We will go after the fake news media with the same fierceness I did the deep state during my days working for Devin Nunes.** If you have been wronged by the Deep State and Big Tech, please reach out, this offensive trust is to help you.

This fight will cost money, and we need to band together to provide the funds necessary to push this important battle across the finish line.

I will be your juggernaut, and fight this until the end.

**[But the question is, will you fight with me by chipping in to my LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND?](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9m1c42urhrjafplia06t57pagubd71r1tgls078_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cjg6ap36clh2bs)**

Yours in the fight for truth,

Kash Patel

name: Giffords
subject: [Did you miss this?] URGENT: Donate before tomorrow's right-wing rally
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Guns have no role in our democratic process.
#

**Tomorrow, right-wing extremists are gathering for a rally in Washington, DC in support of the rioters convicted of storming our Capitol on January 6th.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210917-1-15&t=1&refcode2=869_3935704_C5emT_&akid=869%2E3935704%2EC5emT_)
No matter what happens tomorrow, the threat of extremism is very real. We know that domestic terrorists are plotting together online, spreading conspiracy theories, and building arsenals. In the past few weeks, we’ve seen one man make bomb threats in front of the Supreme Court, and another casing the DNC with a machete and bayonet.
**We must not dismiss extremism, because when it’s armed, it can have deadly consequences. We must take extremism seriously and close loopholes in our gun laws to keep firearms out of the hands of people who shouldn’t have them.**
[**If you agree, rush a contribution to Giffords before the right-wing rally starts tomorrow. Let’s show everyone watching that Americans want Congress to ACT to prevent more violent extremism and keep guns out of the hands of domestic terrorists. Quickly, rush your contribution here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210917-1-15&t=2&refcode2=869_3935704_C5emT_&akid=869%2E3935704%2EC5emT_)

****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210917-1-15&t=25&refcode2=869_3935704_C5emT_&akid=869%2E3935704%2EC5emT_)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210917-1-15&t=26&refcode2=869_3935704_C5emT_&akid=869%2E3935704%2EC5emT_)**
---
****
While our democracy thankfully withstood the attack on January 6th, very real threats to it and the potential for violence remain.
Voter intimidation. Threats to election officials. Brandishing weapons in state capitals. Attacking police at the U.S. Capitol... Violent extremism is a growing threat to our democracy, and it’s on Congress to disarm it.
[**Our team at Giffords will be working round the clock to make sure policymakers heed this warning and take action to keep Americans — and our democracy — safe. Thank you for supporting our work with a donation if you can.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210917-1-15&t=27&refcode2=869_3935704_C5emT_&akid=869%2E3935704%2EC5emT_)

The team at Giffords

Peter,

I know it’s Friday and my campaign has sent a lot of emails this week, so I’ll be quick.

In order to stay on track toward hitting our 3rd quarter goal ($250,000), we need 256 conservatives reading this email today to chip in $4 or more.

_**I’m hesitant to email folks on the weekend, because the last thing any of us want to be thinking about on Saturday and Sunday is politics**_.

**[So, as most folks do if they can, I’ve decided to put in a little work ahead of time to ensure we don’t miss any opportunities that might result in us missing our goal.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=13a359a01960427f881917214de63ab1&_e=2V7-wweXeUr4N837NSiUaE7NyxYoDccJ0hcVSARFOBq8pWfSl5NuVwRy1ltX1m3MpczPszdAzSfyhV4rRtuYEN57TS50w0K5afbswM3Z4dmIj9U9KPNjNyTcJRirjzseQW6AHdPeOsTuvZicxChBPDiyD0JWzAwXXMJdJIH7h5O2ICNLpp4QOnOHqNtl5MJU_foDsO8p5z8I_4R1rP9daRgfLiuqmOny1rIdpI8FrSe_PNowjtFKR6ecmC5gOwHm083Hh-s7qooIOVi6Vgxueewky4Sosli4PsvGLP50gi8JzmJ7vDboWinnaLJr3gbnwhJL0KTFlP3vAFWp9Veshnj7mivemiA--UjSV82YXcJ03tBdNwu8vBzH8rLFyATS8HO0RvE76-Q524RvkDCcoGeM0QIr4JWKfMi7g1guBlHP-pTgdFf_KzWZuDHDRFFzxT-9WEmEGMvgzS48GWpNhA%3D%3D)**

[**HELP ME HIT MY 3RD QUARTER FUNDRAISING GOAL
CHIP IN $4 -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=13a359a01960427f881917214de63ab1&_e=2V7-wweXeUr4N837NSiUaE7NyxYoDccJ0hcVSARFOBq8pWfSl5NuVwRy1ltX1m3MpczPszdAzSfyhV4rRtuYEN57TS50w0K5afbswM3Z4dmIj9U9KPNjNyTcJRirjzseQW6AHdPeOsTuvZicxChBPDiyD0JWzAwXXMJdJIH7h5O2ICNLpp4QOnOHqNtl5MJU_foDsO8p5z8I_4R1rP9daRgfLiuqmOny1rIdpI8FrSe_PNowjtFKR6ecmC5gOwHmBz4si0kamU_oGibkFIU3nZdpWQXTvCXhKnCwzPpi3bsCeR6VdpDTa5ek8f3ewiVn5d5nccTc_ovyVYC5Q6jvuwb1yVKzGRl2s8Ocnt7bH8ix54XNouRHiWPzTB0IQwgIEf7nXzHvKa0o3yDOlNg08O5z3B3izNtiqYfImN6eXBWB508HqH8pt1TqAojfJTU1Glay46LszuXmOkSSxijNBg%3D%3D)
In case you need a reminder, my quarterly goal of raising $250,000 isn’t arbitrary. **I’m working to be the first Republican House candidate to earn admission into the NRCC’s “Young Guns” program for 2022.** This program supports candidates running in the nation’s most competitive House races, which definitely applies to my race.

**With only 13 days left** , there honestly is no time to waste. If I don’t raise the additional $40,000 between now and midnight on September 30th, I have to wait another three months to apply for admission.

I sincerely appreciate all you have done for my campaigns.

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

clean_body: If I don’t raise the additional $40,000 between now and midnight on September 30th, I have to wait another three months to apply for admission. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, I know it’s Friday and my campaign has sent a lot of emails this week, so I’ll be quick. In order to stay on track toward hitting our 3rd quarter goal ($250,000), we need 256 conservatives reading this email today to chip in $4 or more. I’m hesitant to email folks on the weekend, because the last thing any of us want to be thinking about on Saturday and Sunday is politics. In case you need a reminder, my quarterly goal of raising $250,000 isn’t arbitrary. I’m working to be the first Republican House candidate to earn admission into the NRCC’s “Young Guns” program for 2022. This program supports candidates running in the nation’s most competitive House races, which definitely applies to my race. With only 13 days left , there honestly is no time to waste. If I don’t raise the additional $40,000 between now and midnight on September 30th, I have to wait another three months to apply for admission. I sincerely appreciate all you have done for my campaigns. Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

Our campaign is built upon a foundation of tremendous grassroots support, and we are thrilled the RNHA-VA is joining the growing list of prominent organizations that see that and that are jumping in to support our bid to take back Virginia’s 7th District and flip the House of Representatives.”
- Tina Ramirez

The RNHA -VA understands that to take back the district from Abigail Spanberger and flip the House of Representatives from a Democrat majority to a Republican Majority, we need the 7th District of Virginia.

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: Americans won’t survive
body:
American’s won’t survive the Biden Administration... and Patty Murray is silent
---
| | | | | | You're receiving this message because you signed up to receive emails from Smiley for Washington. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can unsubscribe at the bottom of this email.
---
| |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NLPSOFp7yPL1t2vqz55TdzNCSr9zBXLGAWtIjX83zrbCkK8-HHFZ6b2uVn6-dNYLvdYrzXiCIWxC2en1QGKQ15VARDHLQk6I1D4vGlPOjYpYfAvEheHp2r_q51tyw1mZgCfVjz45F0FuJmpzPYovSUzh95KKvqtAksPE7LhTc-owGyHZEdz0huvkrizaKiawvFnRhs5Q0mQ=&c=AwkBFbWkH50QapfWXOFkI2aoK6GLU2GHroWEKl8evB-nVpDw9VSM0A==&ch=m0DBenmAnmI6KZBbgGRXLE35seAzQprJgPAdH3yvWDYQP_5h2timxQ==)
---
|
---
|
---
| Friend,
---
| It's heartbreaking that I have to keep talking about this. But we can't ignore it.
Murder is up 25% under President Biden. People are dying because he won't stand up for law enforcement and Patty Murray is right there with him. Instead, they cower behind the illusion that all the violence that continues to happen in our country is somehow normal.
Biden and Murray are showing a complete lack of leadership.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NLPSOFp7yPL1t2vqz55TdzNCSr9zBXLGAWtIjX83zrbCkK8-HHFZ6b2uVn6-dNYLvdYrzXiCIWxC2en1QGKQ15VARDHLQk6I1D4vGlPOjYpYfAvEheHp2r_q51tyw1mZgCfVjz45F0FuJmpzPYovSUzh95KKvqtAksPE7LhTc-owGyHZEdz0huvkrizaKiawvFnRhs5Q0mQ=&c=AwkBFbWkH50QapfWXOFkI2aoK6GLU2GHroWEKl8evB-nVpDw9VSM0A==&ch=m0DBenmAnmI6KZBbgGRXLE35seAzQprJgPAdH3yvWDYQP_5h2timxQ==)
---
|
We're seeing crime skyrocket, drugs spill throughout our streets, homelessness is out of control and businesses are having to shut their doors all across our country. Right here in Washington state, in our own Seattle, we're seeing some of the most alarming figures in the country - But Patty Murray remains silent... missing.
This will continue as long as they are in office. But when I am elected in 2022, I will be a voice for you in the Senate.
[Can I count on your support to help me get there?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NLPSOFp7yPL1t2vqz55TdzNCSr9zBXLGAWtIjX83zrbCkK8-HHFZ6b2uVn6-dNYLvdYrzXiCIWxC2en1QGKQ15VARDHLQk6I1D4vGlPOjYpYfAvEheHp2r_q51tyw1mZgCfVjz45F0FuJmpzPYovSUzh95KKvqtAksPE7LhTc-owGyHZEdz0huvkrizaKiawvFnRhs5Q0mQ=&c=AwkBFbWkH50QapfWXOFkI2aoK6GLU2GHroWEKl8evB-nVpDw9VSM0A==&ch=m0DBenmAnmI6KZBbgGRXLE35seAzQprJgPAdH3yvWDYQP_5h2timxQ==)

Tiffany

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Joe Manchin is wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Parents, caregivers, and kids don’t need a strategic pause — they need progress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35952352/306668501/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210917-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDY5MTM0NC1mMTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yGXHBOhzvJfrV02pdPCBONCVNRahwGTTOvRB07hvho0=)
---
Team,

Earlier this summer, I met with parents in my district to talk about the expanded Child Tax Credit. So many of the parents spoke to me, full of emotion, not about school supplies or new shoes they could buy, but about something much bigger — about the importance of having extra money available so they could start saving for their kids, about being able to look to the future.

**That’s why it is so misguided that Senator Joe Manchin and others are looking to limit the Build Back Better Act, citing its high price tag.** Senator Manchin has indicated he has objections to expanding the Child Tax Credit, creating universal pre-K, and reducing child care costs for most parents and has called for a “strategic pause” on the bill.

Parents, caregivers, and kids don’t need a strategic pause — they need progress. Eighteen months into a pandemic that has upended caregiving, America’s kids and parents are at a breaking point. **Some may say that we can’t afford this, but the truth is we can’t afford not to invest in our children.**

If Democrats negotiate against ourselves and fail to produce real results for American families, they will have no reason to trust us with another term in office. We saw this happen in 2009, and it led to Democrats losing control of the House for eight years. We cannot afford to let it happen again.

[_**To show that I have support on this major issue, please consider chipping in $5 or whatever you can spare to my re-election campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35952353/306668502/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210917-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDY5MTM0NC1mMTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yGXHBOhzvJfrV02pdPCBONCVNRahwGTTOvRB07hvho0=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35952354/306668503/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210917-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDY5MTM0NC1mMTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yGXHBOhzvJfrV02pdPCBONCVNRahwGTTOvRB07hvho0=)
---
Thank you for your support,
Sara Jacobs

clean_body: Parents, caregivers, and kids don’t need a strategic pause — they need progress. | = Team, Earlier this summer, I met with parents in my district to talk about the expanded Child Tax Credit. So many of the parents spoke to me, full of emotion, not about school supplies or new shoes they could buy, but about something much bigger — about the importance of having extra money available so they could start saving for their kids, about being able to look to the future. That’s why it is so misguided that Senator Joe Manchin and others are looking to limit the Build Back Better Act, citing its high price tag. Senator Manchin has indicated he has objections to expanding the Child Tax Credit, creating universal pre-K, and reducing child care costs for most parents and has called for a “strategic pause” on the bill. Parents, caregivers, and kids don’t need a strategic pause — they need progress. Eighteen months into a pandemic that has upended caregiving, America’s kids and parents are at a breaking point. Some may say that we can’t afford this, but the truth is we can’t afford not to invest in our children. If Democrats negotiate against ourselves and fail to produce real results for American families, they will have no reason to trust us with another term in office. We saw this happen in 2009, and it led to Democrats losing control of the House for eight years. We cannot afford to let it happen again. = | = Thank you for your support, Sara Jacobs | | | * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please
