name: Democrat strategy memo
subject: Lie all the way to Election Night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |
body:
The Democrat strategy is to lie all the way to 2022. Well, we’ve got bad news for them. Mike is standing in their way. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=99d40b4acc0247748198a1693e051145&_e=ByEhsw5PiQpr319hluu6cwXOZSoqSA85DlUaS1ccdHGcyaGKy_VgmsiZ9oExPtBgVlnaNZldWkf8zz7Dp-bIvwNox98FYwpzM-5kW1JXaGn0d7PBagtPd8whmCfHClavtB6A_W4sQWFqzquV0ZRhtpj8vGgYcx-iiqAbxaWPEOE8t0HUs2p3fwyMRSRxDZewt74XLdpQkOu6PLepq0C9oJfZ0M_MaiUoAPUHsz6_TILQ7EGK1IBfJSbgAeEcv_9iOTGHOYgzNKdh8Se3hd3bp1Q3DJtpSOJApqF41l51lzrfHFD7hYVg2N2hy9X57hCtFILw0u8DZHwSO_JGmN0esz9nhT57VFc3cIFYGbAhHxWWiTpL4LSz8Y7odpe6pwvDR_cBwe3tfZ_GjsIFS5Rvi4UgyO92vS7r0h1wC9NlXFlkUB46OTcBd4DxOwhN4RKyJ9yYhd6KjfG1CcVejkkAbWhjLa8-XbOjd_6uEYeeB8k%3D) Friend, Eight months in, the Biden Administration is spiraling out of control. They have created unimaginable disasters and seriously damaged America’s reputation abroad. Our allies are losing trust in us and our enemies are laughing. _Now, the Democrats’ only strategy is to lie their way to 2022._ **Well, we’ve got bad news for them. Mike is standing in their way, and he’s got something called**** _facts_****on his side. Facts like:**
* The crisis in Afghanistan was 100% avoidable, and responsibility lies squarely on the shoulders of President Biden.

Normally observed on September 17 every year, it commemorates the day in 1787 that delegates to the Constitutional Convention signed the document in Philadelphia. Take some time today to teach your children or grandchildren about our Constitution. Right now, the Constitution is in major trouble. There will be no chance of saving it if future generations don’t understand what it means, and why it was such a profound document. clean_body: Today is Constitution Day. Normally observed on September 17 every year, it commemorates the day in 1787 that delegates to the Constitutional Convention signed the document in Philadelphia. Take some time today to teach your children or grandchildren about our Constitution. Right now, the Constitution is in major trouble. There will be no chance of saving it if future generations don’t understand what it means, and why it was such a profound document. subject: This is what I have to say about J.D. Vance

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XucmyjkDAnt_JnbxvroX8eI-bt4-7k_k4ays84yyh-ULnESyfslodczAqR_gUaskWMAXp2JLJaKkgn8cg-2G3pbePBSm83lN6Gk4-fdlHoWbqmwW-oJQXYiKg7QHaY_ZNwu68TTC-cZrF8Kudt6Laexki2yFyh2aAHETPslPJ0y5maCDreNIypN48kmm6_lgusmRek59mYYWDuw4jAyKBa05cxCxxSkoRzy00YBmZBzaBQ25oWjvDjb7hkm4704BH0Hg5wF9qeGhEeBVdtUOrBumMtzOTKXAknNhXXf8tsN_ImLT2risJGZCPkHwVQ1S6w/3fe/BMINgXedSQ2K0yemQFyeDg/h0/gOYQHLlWFgmA0kkk24b_nZldD4hP8ek2bL9HJJz7teQ)
Derek, I’m going to try and be as civil as I can about this.

Millionaire Republican J.D. Vance launched his campaign for Senate. You know as well as I do -- a guy who calls affordable childcare “class war against normal people” doesn’t belong anywhere near the Senate.

We can’t let his announcement derail us from expanding our Democratic majority -- political experts say that Ohio’s open Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip.

subject: We need to know your priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida
body:
With our state facing so many new challenges, we know your priorities are probably shifting.

|
---

| | | **250 RESPONSES NEEDED:

So much has happened in the past month right here in Florida.

That’s why we have to ask: Will you take our September Democratic Survey and update your priorities with us? **
| [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35953246/306674437/2102708408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTc4MGE2MC1mMzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6EhGhkwyhACl0RpiY7yjNiB9MQuXAcX09FPgwv1IF10=&emci=87d4e00b-f217-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5e780a60-f317-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=22995843)
---

Peter, so much is happening right here in our state of Florida.

We’re watching as Republicans:

\-- Rush to mimic Texas’ new abortion ban for their own legislation of the same caliber
\-- Continue to reject climate change, though our areas are experiencing massive decrease in water quality
\-- Ignore the needs of Floridians as we face the continued effects of the COVID-19 pandemic

And with our state facing so many new challenges, we know your priorities are probably shifting.

**That’s why we’re reaching out right now, Peter -- we’d be remiss not to ask you personally what’s on your mind.**

Ken instructed us to open our September Priorities Survey to learn what matters to you most right now, but it’s only open for 96 hours.

Team Ken

name: Team Patty
subject: we’ll make this quick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
This is our make or break moment.
#
We wanted to make sure you saw Patty’s message, Peter.
This is our make or break moment. _Democrats are making progress_ \-- _but Republicans are ready and waiting to take it all back if they get the opportunity._
**[Will you contribute $5 before our mid-month deadline TONIGHT at midnight to protect the Democratic Senate majority and defend our progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35953249/306674440/258923750?refcode=pm_em_210917_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGY5NDkyNS1mMzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9VMcnGUDKAxTSJ2Z5H-zBA2JNYlcKVjXa5vaOSBqGQ=)**
\---Original Message from Patty Murray---
Peter,
I’ve written to you before about how important it is to keep our Democratic majority in the Senate. I’m doing everything I can to fight for paid leave, child care, affordable health care, action on climate, reproductive rights, and so much more, but our progress is at risk if we can’t keep the Senate blue.
**[We can’t lose our momentum now. Will you pitch in $1, $5 -- or anything you can -- before midnight tomorrow to defend the Democratic Senate majority and help us stay in the fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35953251/306674442/258923750?refcode=pm_em_210917_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGY5NDkyNS1mMzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9VMcnGUDKAxTSJ2Z5H-zBA2JNYlcKVjXa5vaOSBqGQ=)**
Next November might seem far away, but the truth is that Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already doing everything they can to take back the Senate.
In the other Washington, I’m making sure our government helps families, not corporate interests, but Republicans are trying to block our progress every chance they get.
If we lose even a single seat in 2022, the GOP could roll back all the progress we’re fighting so hard for. There is still so much more we need to do to help families, workers, and communities, and I need each and every one of you with me.
**[Will you contribute $5 before our mid-month deadline tomorrow at midnight to protect the Democratic Senate majority and defend our progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35953253/306674444/258923750?refcode=pm_em_210917_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGY5NDkyNS1mMzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9VMcnGUDKAxTSJ2Z5H-zBA2JNYlcKVjXa5vaOSBqGQ=)**
Thank you,
Patty
** **

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=903%2E3611125%2E5P7cn- ][IMG]

Hello, it's Tim Ryan.

Let me be honest, I hate these emails. I know we flood your inbox all week
asking you to donate and I’m not going to lie to you, asking for money is
my least favorite part of the job.

I know how hard you work for every single dollar and I will never take
your support for granted. But I need to explain why these emails are so
important.

Campaigns cost a lot of money and I don’t have billionaire backers like
most of my opponents. Republican JD Vance is counting on Trump billionaire
Peter Thiel’s $10 million super PAC to boost his campaign, and another one
of my opponents is spending $5 million of his own fortune.

If we want any chance of overcoming the right-wing fundraising machine, we
need grassroots support. That’s why every single dollar you give counts.
Every. Single. Dollar.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3091?t=1007&akid=903%2E3611125%2E5P7cn- ]Can you chip in what you can so I can keep fighting for you by flipping
this Senate seat blue? We’re falling behind our FEC goal and I need you to
step up today.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3091?t=1008&akid=903%2E3611125%2E5P7cn- ]Donate $25

clean_body: [ - ][IMG] Hello, it's Tim Ryan. Let me be honest, I hate these emails. I know we flood your inbox all week asking you to donate and I’m not going to lie to you, asking for money is my least favorite part of the job. I know how hard you work for every single dollar and I will never take your support for granted. But I need to explain why these emails are so important. Campaigns cost a lot of money and I don’t have billionaire backers like most of my opponents. Republican JD Vance is counting on Trump billionaire Peter Thiel’s $10 million super PAC to boost his campaign, and another one of my opponents is spending $5 million of his own fortune. If we want any chance of overcoming the right-wing fundraising machine, we need grassroots support. That’s why every single dollar you give counts. Every. Single. Dollar. [ - ]Can you chip in what you can so I can keep fighting for you by flipping this Senate seat blue? We’re falling behind our FEC goal and I need you to step up today. Peter -- I just wanted to drop a small note about what happened on Tuesday.

On Tuesday, California voted no to recall Gov. Gavin Newsom. We said no to the Republican power grab that cost Californians $300 million.

**But we said yes to so much more.**

We said yes to continuing the progress we've made to keep ourselves safe during a global pandemic. We said yes to making sure we tackle California's worsening housing crisis. We said yes to making progress towards a brighter future for California's working families.

I have to admit, it left me hopeful for what that could mean for this campaign.

**I know we can come together to flip this seat once and for all and send Mike Garcia packing. I know together, we can say yes to progress for this district.**

**[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to make that a reality?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35954004/306676627/-392799195?refcode=em21_210917_hype&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWJmNjUwNy1mNjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zfw92MswcKnoYPXBmFefxFJVrs-nvPmDHWDuhZQ_UOk=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35954005/306676630/-392799195?refcode=em21_210917_hype&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWJmNjUwNy1mNjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zfw92MswcKnoYPXBmFefxFJVrs-nvPmDHWDuhZQ_UOk=) Thanks for being on my team,

Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I hosted the Crenshaw Youth Summit in Houston with over 2,000 young adults between the ages of 14 - 24. I also called out AOC for her hypocritical, socialist messaging while attending the most exclusive party in NYC, and continued exposing Biden's radical agenda as polling shows Americans are growing fed up with his terrible, destructive policies.
As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oSxj2RVBhexe0uVoxsBdhrKkD5MTBYTGFBhTk0KbPQM3B-q6hiJkPEv5o0wu-xwOSzmEREizaxUuw56WeVyIWkV0hekA3w4iXAyrUoGtxVe-tnPbvnrLowZxSsWK456oZUp4RfrPUSchD81fouIPBpTI5O6SPn52dNxNDLGpSek=&c=ykiA5Su0sIAflMSArIJtrrxu8x0g7Dur5qfVpYEv8Kq8HEkQmHxtHA==&ch=mC3akRKL7nggVj-txkQi75tDsWp1BmbddGMFve_NQEOpHmZbmQIEaA==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oSxj2RVBhexe0uVoxsBdhrKkD5MTBYTGFBhTk0KbPQM3B-q6hiJkPPaCrpd5OMqLyxx4cPDY1ULzsnGHAqfwjIaqB2XQsf43GVAgHmX2JxmqqGhrtLj3Rut-OMAX1m_mRsekU1qGxG_OppQ8cKP4Mxh2rq1pXnr4&c=ykiA5Su0sIAflMSArIJtrrxu8x0g7Dur5qfVpYEv8Kq8HEkQmHxtHA==&ch=mC3akRKL7nggVj-txkQi75tDsWp1BmbddGMFve_NQEOpHmZbmQIEaA==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oSxj2RVBhexe0uVoxsBdhrKkD5MTBYTGFBhTk0KbPQM3B-q6hiJkPPaCrpd5OMqL4gxxVvucaZ5rQORf3Gr657QE7AwWf3rtQ62cBgJ9ihjlvWokOwerH-1lJxIZikCv3z1oW2vYqnxFYRtC1Fzpyb6Cy5tJjIlXZh_xHk6Ysf8=&c=ykiA5Su0sIAflMSArIJtrrxu8x0g7Dur5qfVpYEv8Kq8HEkQmHxtHA==&ch=mC3akRKL7nggVj-txkQi75tDsWp1BmbddGMFve_NQEOpHmZbmQIEaA==).

| BUILDING THE FUTURE
---
| This past weekend, more than 2,000 young people between the ages of 14-24 came together to hear from a tremendous lineup of speakers and get energized about the future of the conservative movement.
This is the future.
As Politico put it, "Dan Crenshaw is building a young activist army, one summit at a time.... It's working."
The feedback we received after the event was incredible. One attendee said the Youth Summit "fully motivated me to achieve everything I plan for my future."

| IT NEVER WORKS

body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
Our country is facing a crucial moment right now - so let me clear: ****[Republicans are unfit to govern and cannot be trusted with power.](https://links.e.dccc.)****

They have gutted our voting rights and undermined our democracy. Introducing voter suppression bills in 49 states across the country. Passing these laws in far too many.

They have launched the worst attack on reproductive rights in history. Like we've witnessed in Texas.

And they have doubled down on their blind loyalty to Donald Trump, his Big Lie, and his craven politics.

**I 've committed to doing everything possible to prevent this lawless, one-term president and his Republican loyalists from ever holding power again. But I can't stop them alone.**

As I write this, Republicans are shattering fundraising records and building an enormous war chest to buy their way back into power.

And if we want to stop them before it's too late, every last grassroots Democrat - including you \-- needs to do everything possible to protect our House Democrats.

****[I'm asking you directly: Before our House Democrats' Midnight Deadline expires in just 13 hours, can you rush $3 to help defend our House Majority? We can't suffer defeat at the hands of Trump's loyalists in Congress. Too much is at stake.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)****

name: Team Maggie
subject: Can you chip in $24.14, team?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Here's the deal, team – September's fundraising has been a lot slower than anticipated. With our biggest FEC deadline at the end of the month, our finance director is worried that we won't be where we need to be. **CNN has named this seat as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip in 2022.** On top of that, several members of Trump's network, from Betsy DeVos to Mike Pence, have visited the Granite State in an attempt to rally their far-right base. And most recently, Donald Trump himself praised an extreme right-wing candidate running against Maggie in the Senate. The GOP is all in on flipping this seat. Mitch McConnell and his allies are already spending millions against Maggie – and Donald Trump and Senate Republicans have raised _hundreds of millions more_ as part of their plan to take back the Senate. If we're going to keep NH blue and protect our slim Senate majority, Maggie is going to need your help. **[That's why we're setting an emergency weekend goal of $20,000. If everyone who reads this email chips in $24.14–our average online donation–we would be on track to hit our goal in no time.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35955460/306681354/-149339129?refcode=e20210917_eoq-24.14&amount=24.14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDg5OTYzNy1mYTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hzMB7LPyilMlhzKlv9ZCE1_T0bh3JvDPyr9ZtcyRdMI=)** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35955461/306681356/-149339129?refcode=e20210917_eoq-24.14&amount=24.14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDg5OTYzNy1mYTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hzMB7LPyilMlhzKlv9ZCE1_T0bh3JvDPyr9ZtcyRdMI=)

name: Team Rayner
subject: Welcome to the Team, Peter
body:
Welcome to Team Rayner, Peter!

Michele Rayner is running for Congress to make a real difference in people's lives. Because here in Florida, there's just so much on the line, and too much at stake to keep accepting the bare minimum from politicians.

Our neighbors, family, and friends in the 13th district of Florida are working two and three jobs just to make ends meet. All the while, the Republican party's been busy putting their own partisan agenda ahead of what our working families have long needed.

In the face of their attempts to bully us into submission, Michele will always stand up to Republicans. The bigotry, the lies, and the overall tarnishing of our democracy is not something that she'll stand for. And we're glad you won't, either Peter.

If you're ready for a different kind of leader -- one who stands with you instead of special interests -- will you take the next step and chip in $5 to support Michele's campaign? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michelerayner-thankyou?refcode=web21_signup_email

Michele has made history in Florida -- and she's just getting started.

We are so glad to be on this journey with you. Team Rayner's going to be one for the history books.

-- Team Rayner

DONATE>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michelerayner-thankyou?refcode=web21_signup_email

This email was sent to: . If you no longer wish to hear from us you can unsubscribe here [] .

Contributions or gifts to Michele Rayner for Florida are not tax-deductible.

clean_body: She’s all in for Youngkin | | | = | | Disgraced former Education Secretary Betsy DeVos and Glenn Youngkin sure do have a lot in common. Both are mega-rich right-wingers who’d rather gut our public schools than fund them. And both are blindly loyal to Donald Trump above all else. Now, we’ve learned that they’re joining forces to turn Virginia red. According to Youngkin’s campaign fundraising report, the DeVos family contributed nearly $100,000 before the last filing deadline. That makes Betsy DeVos and her family some of Glenn’s BIGGEST supporters. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Virtually every poll out there shows a close race in Virginia. With Betsy DeVos and Glenn Youngkin spending big to win, a blue Virginia is in serious jeopardy. Derek, they’re outraising AND outspending us, right as voting starts. Glenn already had his bottomless bank account. Now he has Betsy DeVos’ too. Our kids and our Commonwealth deserve better. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Terry for VA = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: "Get vaccinated or starve"
body:
The Biden Administration just announced that all businesses with more than 100 employees will be FORCED to require COVID-19 vacc
Fellow American, **The Biden Administration just announced that all businesses with more than 100 employees will be FORCED to require COVID-19 vaccines for all employees.** In other words, Joe Biden is basically saying: _**“Get the**** ****vaccine or**** ****starve.”** _ **_I’ll be_**** _ _****_clear_**** _ _****_with you; The Center_**** _ _****_for_**** _ _****_American Liberty WILL sue the Biden Administration the second he enforces this outrageous, totalitarian mandate._** [**Will you support the Center for American**** ****Liberty**** ****to help us sue the Biden Administration for this completely unconstitutional vaccine order?** ](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfpgpspivb557uf70pahpruec7bfpv1o70lsadgg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cji64ob2chh2bs) This isn’t an empty threat. _**This is a PROMISE.** _ And the writing has been on the wall for months. First they locked you out of your houses of worship, schools, and closed small businesses... ...then they forced you to wear masks. Now Joe Biden and the rest of his authoritarian minions are going to stop you from making a living and _**feeding your family if you don’t get the COVID vaccine.** _ They don’t care about your right to religious freedom... They don’t care about your right to medical privacy... They don’t care about your right to determine how you should live your life... The only thing that matters to Joe Biden and the radical Left is that you obey. [**That’s why I’m urgently asking you to help us stop this totalitarian takeover of our lives by sending a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3u4hrncn9bvp34s6smj4tfnbu7e1rgsiunlv3m0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cji64ob2chh2bs) If we don’t stand up HERE and NOW it will never end. But we can’t do this without you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty to push back against these kinds of threats to our civil liberties. And Biden’s UNCONSTITUTIONAL order mandating that employers require COVID-19 vaccination is perhaps his worst offense yet. Forget about the astounding hypocrisy. For years they’ve shouted, “my body, my choice.” But it’s clear that they only care about “your body” and “your choice” when it fits their political narrative. And if we don’t take immediate action against the Biden Administration’s new vaccine mandate – your right to make your own medical decisions... your right to individual freedom will disappear overnight. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us prepare for one of the most important legal battles of our lives with a gift of $35 or more today.** ](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zr1jg6qclqmqbqikup1ft42ud976b5k6bfgb19so_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cji64ob2chh2bs) If we don’t fight to keep our freedoms today, they’ll be gone tomorrow. Thank you in advance for standing with us and for liberty. Sincerely, Harmeet K. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35956961/306685267/558373307?refcode=X_091721_Endorsements_Otondo&Gabaldon&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGQ3MzIwMi1mZDE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0elSVUZJri0RV2xIg25AxxBP2xOoiYKzkI5fPT8ONA=)

clean_body: | | | | Don’t let the Left take them away Friend, Happy Constitution Day! In 1787, on this day, one of the most important documents in history was signed: the United States Constitution. One of my ancestors fought in the Revolutionary War so we could have our own nation and Constitution. These days of Biden mandates, Radical nominees and appointees, and the tragic withdrawal from Afghanistan remind us: the fight to protect and defend our Constitutional rights is not over! We can’t let the Radical Left continue to assault our Second Amendment rights, our right to Free Speech and Free Exercise of Religion, or our inalienable right to Liberty that can't be deprived without due process of law. In the Senate, I promise to always defend the Constitution, protect our rights, and uphold my oath as a public servant to all citizens and this great nation. Thanks, Kelly | | | | =

clean_body: Sign Susan’s birthday card before midnight! | = Hi folks, Today is my wife Susan’s birthday and I need your help to celebrate. Susan has reached out to this team through emails like this one because she believes in the power of this grassroots movement. So, I’d like to send her a card tonight with as many signatures as possible from folks like you. Please take a moment to sign the card and help me wish Susan a happy birthday****. | | Susan is a staunch advocate for land preservation in Colorado, an incredible mother to our girls, and my best friend. Together we can make her day special when you sign her card. Thank you so much and talk soon, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

clean_body: | | | | | Team -- we’re getting deja vu: Nevada Democrat Catherine Cortez Masto’s midterm election is 14 months away and yet her Republican opponentAdam Laxalt is ALREADY threatening to sue the election results BEFORE a single vote has been cast. All four of Steve’s GOP opponents have stayed silent on Laxalt’s preemptive attacks on next year’s election. By not speaking out against this ridiculous scheme, they’re leaving the door open to make similar claims about the race for Steve’s seat. | | | | | | | | | | | | | If you need any more proof that the Republican Party has fully bought into Trump’s “Big Lie”, it’s Adam Laxalt planning to file lawsuits about an election that hasn’t even happened yet. We can’t let Republicans spread misinformation about our elections again. Your support allows us to fight back, overpower GOP messaging, and keep this race about the issues that actually matter to working families -- like funding public schools, strengthening Nevada’s economy, and making health care affordable and accessible. ****** | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for standing with Steve, The Sisolak for Nevada Team | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. subject: A phony "election audit" charade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
THIS is what the Republican Party is all about in 2021.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210917-2679-header&t=1&akid=2679%2E434096%2EOjfZ5K)
Peter,
I really hate to be the bearer of bad news, but I just need to fill you in on the situation with the Pennsylvania GOP. 🙄
Despite the fact that the 2020 election was decisively called for Joe Biden _< checks notes>_ TEN months ago, the PA GOP is continuing with their phony "election audit" charade.
**This time around, they're set to potentially spend millions of your tax dollars to risk an identity theft catastrophe involving 7 million PA residents' highly personal information.** Think social security numbers, drivers' license numbers, the whole nine yards...
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30145?refcode=em20210917-2679&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2679%2E434096%2EOjfZ5K)
This bogus + dangerous move is yet another attempt at undermining public faith in our fair and free elections and disenfranchising voters. It's bad-faith stunts like this one that helped incite the deadly insurrection on January 6. And yet, the PA GOP has shown that *this* is what their party is all about in 2021.
[**_Peter, I will never stop standing up for Pennsylvanians, our fair and free elections, and the right of every single eligible voter to make their voice heard in our democracy. If you're with me in the fight against this attack on our sacred right to vote, will you kick in $5 right now to help me defeat these guys in 2022?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30145?refcode=em20210917-2679&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2679%2E434096%2EOjfZ5K)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30145?refcode=em20210917-2679&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2679%2E434096%2EOjfZ5K)**
I believe it's ludicrous that the PA GOP is trying to subpoena state and county officials for your personal information — including but not limited to name, driver's license number, partial social security number, and method of voting.
As much as I would LOVE to ignore this pathetic attempt to undermine our elections, it's just too important. We must fight back against this blatant power grab that puts Pennsylvanians at risk.
**I have never been afraid to directly take on the PA GOP — and I sure as hell am not afraid to take them on when we go toe-to-toe in 2022 to try to flip this Senate seat. But I'll need you to have my back too, Peter.**
[**_Will you donate $5 or anything you can to our grassroots campaign today if you agree that we can't let the PA GOP hold this crucial Senate seat in 2022? Anything you can spare would be so appreciated._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30145?refcode=em20210917-2679&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2679%2E434096%2EOjfZ5K)

It’s clear, Peter: We are in the midst of a climate crisis, it’s clear our government needs to take bold action and save our planet before it’s too late.

**[If you agree, please sign on to my petition and urge Congress to comprehensively tackle climate change »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35959482/306693207/-792674079?refcode=PAFC_20210917_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWZmZjJiMS0wNDE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fW8j78R0sLMaHlAYyQzpi7rnBuAghY1TXQ7AJ81hfpA=&emci=1427792a-d517-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c5fff2b1-0418-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1755436)** **5,000 SUPPORTERS NEEDED** | [SIGN ON NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35959483/306693208/-792674079?refcode=PAFC_20210917_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWZmZjJiMS0wNDE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fW8j78R0sLMaHlAYyQzpi7rnBuAghY1TXQ7AJ81hfpA=&emci=1427792a-d517-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c5fff2b1-0418-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1755436)

Like many who grew up in my community, my son and I developed asthma.

Between oil drilling and other pollution, asthma has become so common because the Central Valley’s air quality is so bad.

But unfortunately my community isn’t the only constituency that suffers from climate inaction. Recent reports detail that _nearly a third of Americans_ experienced a natural disaster this summer.

**This should be a no-brainer: We need to tackle climate change with the immediacy it deserves.**

Yet Republican legislators like Devin Nunes -- _bought and owned by the oil lobby_ \-- will obstruct our progress at every turn.

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: Good and Bad News
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
We’re building an organizing operation that touches every corner of the state
#

We've got some good news and some bad news for you today.
**Let's start with the good news:** Californians DECISIVELY beat back the Republican Recall attempt of Gavin Newsom. Together, we showed the entire country that California is going to continue being a national leader on everything from addressing climate change to protecting our people from COVID-19.
**Now for the bad news:** Now that the Recall is over, all the right-wing, anti-immigrant, anti-vaccine Republicans who poured money into the Recall effort are setting their sights on Alex. They know that Alex is going to continue fighting for California priorities like the Green New Deal and real immigration reform, so they want him out of the Senate.
Republicans in California and across the country would like nothing more than to replace Alex with an extreme Republican who will hand control of the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell. And with a 50-50 margin in the Senate, we cannot afford to lose even a single seat. So we are asking you directly:
[**Can you please make a $5 donation to Alex Padilla’s reelection campaign today? We need to start laying the groundwork NOW to take on the Republicans — and the big money interests backing them — who want to see us fail.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210917-1-15&t=1&refcode2=327_159979_84ZgjA&akid=327%2E159979%2E84ZgjA)
We’re building an organizing operation that touches every corner of the state — Alex isn’t taking a single vote for granted. But that means we’re counting on your support to make sure we have the resources to get it done.
Thanks in advance for chipping in.
— Team Padilla
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210917-1-15&t=2&refcode2=327_159979_84ZgjA&akid=327%2E159979%2E84ZgjA)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=327%2E159979%2E84ZgjA)

name: VA Gov Alert
subject: BREAKING: The Washington Post endorses Terry McAuliffe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Electing Glenn would be a “grave error.”

| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35960200/306694855/-2023814932?refcode=20210917.6_VGA_9DI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTljNTRjYy0wNjE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhbohaCDsU566fy3OpBByaRsVfJ6A9OMVdHw3lommj4=)

| | Derek, _The Washington Post_ just endorsed Terry — and spelled out exactly why we can’t afford right-wing, Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin as governor:

_"**Mr. McAuliffe is a dynamic chief executive with a proven track record for advancing prosperity. Mr. Youngkin is an untested politician** who would guide the state away from the moderation it has pursued, and profited from, for more than a decade."_ | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35960201/306694856/-2023814932?refcode=20210917.6_VGA_9DI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTljNTRjYy0wNjE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhbohaCDsU566fy3OpBByaRsVfJ6A9OMVdHw3lommj4=)**
---

Glenn Youngkin is an extreme right-wing culture warrior with a Trumpian agenda and he’s all wrong for Virginia. **_The Washington Post_ even said that electing Glenn Youngkin would be _“a grave error.”_**

_**[But this race is dangerously close, and it’s going to take an unprecedented grassroots movement to save Virginia from Glenn Youngkin, so we need your help. | Dear Patriot, I'm writing to you with urgent news -- Our Republic is under assault. If the news reports are true, Gen. That is now under grave threat because of the decision Gen. Milley made to usurp power from President Trump. Just in the past year, there have been military coups in third-world countries all around the globe, such as Myanmar and Guinea. America must not sink to that level. If this really happened, then Gen. Milley must be removed from his command in disgrace. The American public needs to know what took place. That's why I have called for Gen. clean_body: The DSCC and Democrat establishment know they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning in Georgia. | Fellow American, The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all: The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate. Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic. They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year. We're going to have to work around the clock - day and night - for the next 400+ days to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country. We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls. And, of course, it all takes money to operate. Democrats are in panic mode. They didn't want me to get into this race because they know that with President Trump's support and the support of the good people in Georgia, we're going to flip this seat in one of the most hard-fought races in the country. Respectfully, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) and Democrat establishment know that they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning Georgia. name: Cindy Polo
subject: Why we need something new for Florida
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

During the 2018 campaign, Ron DeSantis showed us all who he really was: a politician who will stoop to political propaganda to stay relevant. His attempts to engage radicals and score political points did not end on election day, sadly persisting at the expense of our children.

This next election cycle will once again test our humanity with career candidates and accolades seekers who have forgotten their own name, preferring the titles of Senator, Congressman, etc. They will change political parties; they will run and run; they will change core beliefs because of the higher office they seek. They will sell out to whomever because they care more about their image than they do about serving our community.

Nikki Fried is different. She’s someone who does the right thing when nobody is watching. She is the Governor we deserve—someone who will never forget to help others. If you agree, I hope you’ll join me by clicking here to support her campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-polo]

I met Nikki Fried in the summer of 2018. We were both first-time candidates, both told it could not happen, and we both won. We both arrived in Tallahassee with the odds stacked up against us. The environment in the Legislature is not particularly welcoming to women who are told to follow antiquated rules and learn and play “the game”.

Here’s what doesn’t get reported: Nikki made her way into the legislative chamber and offered her resources to make us better, especially towards freshmen legislators like myself. She won in our State as a democrat, a woman, a Miami girl—the only one to do so in decades.

I am proud to be a girl from Hialeah with Colombian-American roots who learned the hard way that sharing similar heritage or language doesn’t always translate to adequate representation or speaking up when it matters.

My political moment was exhausting and has come to an end; but I’m encouraged because Nikki battles on. I hope you’ll join me in supporting her campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-polo]

With Gratitude,
Rep. Cindy Polo

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c8098c5f-b617-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/b048c72a-0918-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDQ4YzcyYS0wOTE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RcpdUjGnf6tCken5o2mkMxlgIKH0Db7-p47ticwblTQ=&id=116879433 .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Tell Joe Biden your patience is wearing thin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
With Washington's COVID tyranny. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/patience-thin-2472862?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=790ecf737d&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Did you hear what that senile old man and alleged President Joe Biden said the other night?

He said his "patience is wearing thin" with the unvaccinated:

[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=50a6a5fb48&e=645b3b1338)

_Guess what, Joe: my patience is wearing thin -- with your evil, incompetent wannabe-dictator attitude_.

_Nobody_ gets to make health decisions for us, and threatening Americans if they don't take the COVID vaccine is unacceptable.

Yet that's exactly what Joe Biden is doing.

He's even trying to MANDATE that Americans take the vaccine.

[**Help me fight back against the medical tyranny of the Biden regime with a generous contribution to my campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=050ebdd346&e=645b3b1338).

What medicines Americans put into their bodies is between them and their doctors.

It's called freedom -- plain and simple, and I'm tired of elected officials like Joe Biden claiming otherwise.

_My patience is running thin with Joe Biden's absurd demands, and blatant disregard for the God-given rights of American citizens_.

Regardless of our vaccination statuses, it's up to us to fight tooth-and-nail against vaccine mandates...

...[**and that's why I'm in critical need of your support today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=057753db91&e=645b3b1338).

[**Chip into my reelection campaign right away and stand with me as I battle the corrupt Biden Regime and their friends in Big Pharma who want force you to take their shot**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7689f6b50f&e=645b3b1338).

Do you know what else, Fellow Patriot?

My patience is running thin with all the other ridiculous mandates, too.

We've been forced to wear masks and social distance and put our lives on hold for 19 MONTHS, _and it's clear that what we're doing isn't working_.

But we're told to "follow the science" and follow Dr. Fauci blindly.

This must end. And it must end soon.

_That's why I'm fighting tooth-and-nail for medical freedom, bodily autonomy, and your right to live uninterrupted by government decrees_.

[**Chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or more to my reelection campaign, and show me you've got my back**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=bc93e7b104&e=645b3b1338).

Thank you in advance for fighting for freedom at this critical juncture in American history.

---
| For America,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=23742733f2&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** King Joe Biden says his patience is running thin with Americans who won't take the COVID vaccine.

_My patience is running thin with his authoritarian mandates_.

[**_Chip into my reelection campaign today so I can continue to battle for your freedom against these tyrannical demons_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=fdb8b4bd4b&e=645b3b1338).

---
| |

clean_body: Why this is so important. | | Peter, We’re facing up against our biggest deadline yet and I want to explain why it’s so important. At the end of each financial quarter, the Federal Election Commission (FEC) collects the data about every Congressional campaign and publishes it. While we wish Dr. Caraveo would be judged on her accomplishments and her commitment to the people of Colorado, we can’t change the fact that campaigns are judged on how much money they bring in — at least not until we get her to Congress. = = Thanks for your support! Elana Schrager Campaign Manager | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. But she can’t do it alone. = | = = Learn more at: Follow along:** | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

I’m giving YOU the chance to INCREASE your IMPACT from 400% to 500%. Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \--------- Forwarded Message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Subject: Why can't I reach you? Friend, We have a CRITICAL End-of-Month fundraising deadline coming up, and each day when I ask my team who has stepped up, they NEVER mention YOUR NAME. Why is that, Friend? You’ve always been a strong ally in the past and this just isn’t like you. In a time when Joe Biden is FAILING our Country, your support is needed now more than ever. Today is the FINAL day to contribute towards our goal, so I’ve decided to GO BIG and INCREASE your 400%-IMPACT offer to 500%! This offer expires at midnight tonight, Friend. This is your last chance, Friend. Don’t let the President down. Next time I ask my team for an update on who contributed towards our End-of-Month goal, I want to hear your name. Thank you, Donald J. name: Mark McCloskey
subject: I'm low on cash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
I'm not going to have the chance to shake up the SWAMP if my campaign doesn’t have the resources to bring this battle to front lines. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=695fcd54e3f9470b8192b7308acdfb40&_e=oBZM5WyBljuCoQ9AARNPSLn_Ys8nQ9hk8Hk8-NaE5hf0Ogbe4GD93mWF64eqmExQaVCyG7XaJDnSUYHtUK7_cQUtrhz5Nw97Tvp014bmpZBHGiasYWIPn-fkF59jdpfCDTaOBgGiEl0DRJZeQUlVPh3grxoKYGDDGoF09aVJx58JTcXdsrbRpbbC7hdKtaDUVigRCIrcgXbfWB_qC8NzSByGI6raJM8CojCLhU5ezli2gnUHoSUAs92txr3d1DM-ehCU4AhuZMDS5y1VDtipZAUKYltFcAPAkMAVyv6e7TZypd6Is32-V9qaA81fvPnyW7WoIep-UJi2M850-1Hoyg94bvUUX3OnKu9N_XxA9613HUmr3Y0mcN1drMbi5I0OMLSbq7cAAdLAvSwMHS6ruLeSFTjxtUTAOUysAkU9MxIxmoT7OU6GCTitd9lu837RRh53aqNBSos3Z5hce84h6NwhcGBi0gIf6AY4aael8kQ%3D)

Fellow American,

I can’t even sugarcoat this: I’m short on campaign funds right now. We started out this race in a great position financially, with a lot of support from grassroots donors from all over the nation.

Summer definitely put a dent in our momentum, and we need to get it back.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Yes, I have COVID
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
The leftist media is LOVING the fact that I was diagnosed with COVID this week.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/8UA1GoyN0m4i1LZSl7635h763g/Ds0QMyRmTM7emDVRbi8IoA)
Patriot,

The leftist media is LOVING the fact that I was diagnosed with COVID this week.

Even Chris Cuomo at CNN decide to jump in and mock me:

Their hopes that I die are a clear reminder that the left's growing outrage over supposed increased COVID deaths is all for show and political gain.

I'm sick, and yes, I have a bad case of COVID and my symptoms are unpleasant, but as I recover, I'm still here working from home and hope to feel better each morning.

No, I'm not vaccinated. And no, I won't be getting the COVID vaccine.

I knew it was only a matter of time before I got it, and I accepted that risk over injecting myself with an experimental vaccine that has faced criticism and recalls all around the world. I will not take any vaccine or anything at the government's demand, because I believe in personal liberty.

I know I'll recover just fine, and who knows the horrendous long-term effects I could have developed if I had taken the vaccine. On this Constitution Day, let me remind you that this should be a personal choice for all of us, but the Biden Regime doesn't know the meaning of individual liberty.

Now that I covered that, [**I need to get your support as the FEC deadline is coming up fast**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wo7h3ei1Mdh9BfeN0THcOA/Ds0QMyRmTM7emDVRbi8IoA). | | [DONATE NOW](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wo7h3ei1Mdh9BfeN0THcOA/Ds0QMyRmTM7emDVRbi8IoA)
---

I just have 13 days left to raise enough money to compete against my Do-Nothing opponent, Daniel Webster.

Normally, I'm on the phones for seven hours every day calling up every supporter I can, but you can barely understand my cracked voice right now, so I have to write to you instead.

It's important that we elect people like me to Congress who will stand up to these unconstitutional vaccine mandates, no matter how much the media tries to shame or mock them.

[**Would you be willing to go big for me today?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/AT3TJ2p8tAgtiW1Ct7NeCQ/Ds0QMyRmTM7emDVRbi8IoA)

[**$25, $100, $250 or a max donation would REALLY help put my campaign on track!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/AT3TJ2p8tAgtiW1Ct7NeCQ/Ds0QMyRmTM7emDVRbi8IoA)

Anything you can donate will be sincerely appreciated.

Do-Nothing Dan is sitting on $302,000 as of his last report. And I know that since I announced that I'd be running against him, he's called in help from every lobbyist and special interest PAC out there for donations to try and scare me off.

My goal is to hit at least a third of that before the deadline in 13 days.

[**Any amount you can contribute**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wo7h3ei1Mdh9BfeN0THcOA/Ds0QMyRmTM7emDVRbi8IoA) will build up my campaign war chest and prove to the leftist media and the Establishment naysayers that we're in this to WIN!

Thanks again for all that you do, and if you haven't already done so, [**please donate here**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wo7h3ei1Mdh9BfeN0THcOA/Ds0QMyRmTM7emDVRbi8IoA).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. I'm looking forward to fully recovering so I can get back to the campaign trail and keep fighting for you and our personal liberties.
| [DONATE $10](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/8UA1GoyN0m4i1LZSl7635h763g/Ds0QMyRmTM7emDVRbi8IoA)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: 🚨INCOMING: MORE DNC ATTACKS🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=bb6f35075a414c04ba139a2184bee95a&_e=ILJfPdI3Wfl43ZXZ7mhyflrUsCPnfIKPThPRsR8WBXNsRsdLIMCImRTS3rlf4FL97BDY7GDnJvT0g4cMG-zkB6NSQBy5nsqGmdxPIEA9RTZH8lv5W0k-82atxwA4RkT5LVblNlJ9L2yELjcFDYm67Kr3f85qT2fGKC4e6iBQ001h5wO6E0gKPaM9B68uF30wSWJe2rVCTaVoH0GTKW2ixkbE-xPk-U5vyv6c6CSaGzfKYW51TXIwrn2RqCqhqsr4sqvEBaXP5UH_WKSYzXOnSHzIgBOmBQmHnIaK7SNcVO9aOpCviR9zlz5CUHsgWeJFqF2Ks3hJTffwzkNEyF7qHE_NEJWme6MMZPMhm6m-mEqBkOxMhAibSgxV2-p9xvNHUIHUvjnm0GOJIwkIGEgpIg%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,
I’m a fighter — always have been. And when the left attacks, I know I’m fighting the good fight. _**This week, the Democratic National Committee renewed their attacks on me.**_ This is nothing new.

Democrats have attacked me for demanding election integrity, questioning Biden’s leftist nominees, and calling out the hypocritical alliance of Big-Tech, the Mainstream Media, and the Democratic Party.

[**For the good of the country, Austin and Blinken must resign. Donate today and help me keep up the fight against the left: https://secure.winred.com/josh-hawley-committee/dnc_attacks**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=bb6f35075a414c04ba139a2184bee95a&_e=ILJfPdI3Wfl43ZXZ7mhyflrUsCPnfIKPThPRsR8WBXNsRsdLIMCImRTS3rlf4FL97BDY7GDnJvT0g4cMG-zkB6NSQBy5nsqGmdxPIEA9RTZH8lv5W0k-82atxwA4RkT5LVblNlJ9L2yELjcFDYm67Kr3f85qT2fGKC4e6iBQ001h5wO6E0gKPaM9B68uF30wobpy4O2vK4MjERHHN-HuBj3xkXzArM2bN_BCJo4kQ3ZUbXvnpsfDRFKpnj14dZTqDdwogobg1WrKfNLw34xUsb7CTmREaKpVq53QUePp5k3XCaWGIuVSM4UfR5EtNRFTTzfMPDL786c6hGJcGteGOLsDj3dG-D_fO34LJOshap6HOUDcltwEL16v-iIUFzagu4fPW3XkmFpgCsmTAKPlbg%3D%3D)
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=bb6f35075a414c04ba139a2184bee95a&_e=ILJfPdI3Wfl43ZXZ7mhyflrUsCPnfIKPThPRsR8WBXNsRsdLIMCImRTS3rlf4FL97BDY7GDnJvT0g4cMG-zkB6NSQBy5nsqGmdxPIEA9RTZH8lv5W0k-82atxwA4RkT5LVblNlJ9L2yELjcFDYm67Kr3f85qT2fGKC4e6iBQ001h5wO6E0gKPaM9B68uF30wPRSYvVYTBN1d-DY4fmnE56vfU_MP_ltvD8xoZU2TAow2e8-kATOAlUZiHs8ky849HDIAsI4MOwfG9fBEzBUh6GMKpiQP2n2DA46FsLQrYpohstdSVMrQth5d02JmkIEG28OTuS9FapVxc4eNB2d0XLf00HOmtm3ac-P4J7TTuizrKAjVaSIbz6-x6FyHtzZYdbH1vig15O-itS9fAVs5Rg%3D%3D)
But this week I really struck a nerve when I called on Secretary Blinken and Secretary Austin to _**RESIGN**_ , and my intention to stymie _**ANY**_ Department of Defense or Department of State nomination while they still serve.

When I voted against the nominations of Antony Blinken and Lloyd Austin, the left cried fowl and labeled it a political stunt, but the unmitigated disasters stretching from the crisis on our southern border to the shameful spectacle in Afghanistan, have proved me right. **_Blinken and Austin have been the tip of the incompetent spear that is Joe Biden’s Administration._ **

The same people attacking me then and now are the same people who are applauding the Biden Administration, but you and I know better.

| | Hey Peter, It’s time for working folks to have a seat at the table! Maxwell has spent his life fighting for his community, but we need your help to win Medicare for All, reimagine public safety, get a Green New Deal and stop gun violence.Here’s how you can help:
1. Spread the word to build momentum: share on [Twitter](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/tr/8e85d02f-1bcb-4f8d-9d19-a71ccdd01f0b/c?w=1i6j5Viq5ZyqKd2HHe58IDH-p-bgFF9dzsMjWM3csyg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9NYXh3ZWxsRnJvc3RGTC9zdGF0dXMvMTQyNTQxNzg3NTkyNjQ0MTk5Mj9zPTIwIiwiciI6IjNjYmQ5ZDJmLWNmODEtNDdlNy04M2RkLTNlOGFmNDU3OGMxNSIsImMiOiI1M2RhNjY2Ni00ZmI5LTRmNjItYmM3Yi02ZGNkNWNjNTMzOGYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCJ9) and [Facebook](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/tr/8e85d02f-1bcb-4f8d-9d19-a71ccdd01f0b/c?w=nPXaqvP28HNm3doH4WYA0Yv9zCfRWc48JXjitwnhjMY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL01heHdlbGxGcm9zdEZMIiwiciI6IjNjYmQ5ZDJmLWNmODEtNDdlNy04M2RkLTNlOGFmNDU3OGMxNSIsImMiOiI1M2RhNjY2Ni00ZmI5LTRmNjItYmM3Yi02ZGNkNWNjNTMzOGYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCJ9).
2. Sign up to volunteer: send your family and friends [this link](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/tr/8e85d02f-1bcb-4f8d-9d19-a71ccdd01f0b/c?w=LB4zXuNe274qkvAbxrX8xPAAbQon6kkHXYCQhf6kPLg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZnJvc3Rmb3Jjb25ncmVzcy5jb20vdm9sdW50ZWVyIiwiciI6IjNjYmQ5ZDJmLWNmODEtNDdlNy04M2RkLTNlOGFmNDU3OGMxNSIsImMiOiI1M2RhNjY2Ni00ZmI5LTRmNjItYmM3Yi02ZGNkNWNjNTMzOGYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCJ9) to get them involved.
3. We’re a people-powered campaign. That means no corporate PACs, no lobbyist money, and no fossil fuel donations. [Donate](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/tr/8e85d02f-1bcb-4f8d-9d19-a71ccdd01f0b/c?w=tU37phBu8YCY2S8BIFbm9S93a5Qrpk3Ipkj2rHsBuxg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21heHdlbGxmcm9zdGZsIiwiciI6IjNjYmQ5ZDJmLWNmODEtNDdlNy04M2RkLTNlOGFmNDU3OGMxNSIsImMiOiI1M2RhNjY2Ni00ZmI5LTRmNjItYmM3Yi02ZGNkNWNjNTMzOGYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCJ9) whatever you can to help build the future we deserve.

With our district facing issues like extreme climate change and loss of job opportunities, we need a leader who will fight for us during these difficult times.

Kevin McCarthy is too busy fighting to protect Donald Trump. He’s spent this year covering up the events of January 6th instead of working to support the people of CA-23.

**_That’s why Bruno Amato is the best choice for Congress._** It’s clear that we need new leadership, and Bruno will work tirelessly on issues like expanding job opportunities for the hard-working families of California and protecting our natural environment for future generations.

clean_body: With your help, CA-23 will have representation we can all be proud of. | | | Folks, it’s time to make some changes. With our district facing issues like extreme climate change and loss of job opportunities, we need a leader who will fight for us during these difficult times. Kevin McCarthy is too busy fighting to protect Donald Trump. He’s spent this year covering up the events of January 6th instead of working to support the people of CA-23. That’s why Bruno Amato is the best choice for Congress. It’s clear that we need new leadership, and Bruno will work tirelessly on issues like expanding job opportunities for the hard-working families of California and protecting our natural environment for future generations. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. Thank you, Bruno Amato for Congress | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, Jane continued to prove why she is the grassroots, America First candidate for U.S. Senate this week by crisscrossing the state, speaking to the issues most important to Ohio voters, and growing our grassroots army to support the campaign. Every week Jane works hard to earn the votes of Ohio voters and this week was no different. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Fighting the Left's Woke Education Agenda** Over the last few months, Jane has led the field on fighting back against critical race theory and the left’s agenda of indoctrinating our children at schools. Hosting listening sessions with parents from across the state, Jane has heard from parents about their concerns over their children’s education and what we can all do to fight back. This week, Jane was joined by New York Times Bestselling Author [Vivek Ramaswamy](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=3410924bb65f4454933af62376e678cd&_e=YICtLKfeuKtq21nJmC4dIF_llFqixShCzAUp_r4lzR37tDxt7nOf8W9sxDGBTC3rOq5BlfOKPHq4kWECnH2Sf_xV8ug8wVNld0rzK6NBSSSl9MehIwaRj3GlxbcBzEm_U56Lw9Z-3EEBNvihUV8ksrxbjSUqA-ZtNEpVZSphlZ-hDI3yRY2AT-vxT29_gaZIqk_w8C4Wwy5ath3V9jEXFIGsVaj8-eEdfdmBSLZcbVtBQfCH4gssmwZCZOi8wX7XQjS11-1XX97MyWMncQyydQ%3D%3D) to further discuss how we can fight back against critical race theory and the left’s woke education agenda. Whether it’s putting their name on the ballot for school board, attending school board meetings, or demanding transparency about their children’s curriculum, parents across the state are stepping up for their children’s education. And that’s exactly the fight and voice Jane Timken will take to the U.S. Senate. **From The Trail** On Saturday, Jane was proud to be with the North Royalton Republican Club for their 9/11 Memorial event as they commemorated the 20th anniversary of September 11th, honor the lives lost, and redouble our pledge to Never Forget. Jane joined a passionate crowd at the Richland County Republican Party on Monday to talk about her priorities in the U.S. Senate. Later on Monday, Jane was thrilled to join her supporters in Lake, Ashtabula, Geauga Counties including Geauga County GOP Chair Nancy McArthur, Lake County Commissioner John Plecnik and many more! 1 in 14 jobs in this state are in the trucking industry. They literally keep us moving. That’s why Jane was honored to join the Ohio Trucking Association’s Annual Conference this Tuesday to talk about common-sense policies to support this important industry. Truck drivers work day and night to keep Ohioans fed, our shelves stocked, and our products delivered, and in the U.S. Senate, Jane will advocate for these workers. Young conservatives are the future of our party and also on the front lines of fighting back against the “wokeism” we find at our universities. Jane joined the University of Dayton College Republicans on Tuesday night to talk about just that and support them as they keep fighting the good fight for freedom. Jane continued her tour of colleges this week with a visit to the Ohio State University College Republicans. Young conservatives are getting involved across the state at all of our universities and it’s great to see! Not everything on the campaign trail is speeches and glad-handing. With some time between events, Jane was able to stop by the Zanesville institution Tom’s Ice Cream Bowl and pick up some Canton-made Ben Heggy’s chocolate. Last night, Jane was thrilled to join her supporters in Muskingum County as they rally around her America First campaign. It was great to see old friends like Muskingum County GOP Chair Pat Hennesseey! **Media Roundup** On Monday, Jane joined the Brandon Boxer Show on 610 WTVN in Columbus to discuss a wide range of topics including Jane’s [recent op-ed](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=3410924bb65f4454933af62376e678cd&_e=YICtLKfeuKtq21nJmC4dIFHxHRiLrZxlo_Arjf8knUOfhH1BGEc1FVbwIv6uU_gDDDoysqM7QSS-svjNl_wdpaCyRwsqPDeSLDgnGSbkJxzatlVXTPfYpvWe2Ru5uc74O3fcH6oC80m3fUGaoywlYssBPGvozaSZAqGo-b-djVGzifPNTo-qqLZSrZYU53sAYwSYdaBrDI6YnyruCW6EspT-kbSHVOpdLXxKV0SPsdJVfzux_SD0XgWSB0b4lAKRP4Whqd_vW_QD8Ziie49O2YsyfVQvrbD4hEMs4YEgEmm7UP8bd3OWSEYM1_M0HNWtrshgH7i7KiGVD5nCHgU5nUzh5NLHyg9BMxTZxClrAqQB0TmE959lwqK4SpDBvhiz) about woke culture invading Harvard. You can listen to the full interview [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=3410924bb65f4454933af62376e678cd&_e=YICtLKfeuKtq21nJmC4dIKPzNCFEdVfbfSi1bxjl8C0p5qUUfJmsqIf0GrPhw6YOSKu_3NYEpfyMSiT0AAmp4E9YJIUW7HFkq_12HtAdn8-PdkryYFfiHA6aiPCh6vGftX5p9hTr80xG12tt-jEYedyXsf7gkewHHwrcOcSZ1roiKJ15hwptr0P9AXOXhSgbkomWNl_ri0WRWKZXaXlO3hK7cliT5N1h_APbxAfpRau2ptKf2d2tP79t4razQbir2PiZVmS1PAEXh0xM1p5VzuErabOzaRaiX7MbGfNBampeFAj4fc86iuV_jJ2YPXY2B4uXjwJ5VV8w4ywo4iSsmEDV8fkdfSXiv_V6eu5eltPRbs54i1EhVODj9u6ZqsQ2). [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=3410924bb65f4454933af62376e678cd&_e=YICtLKfeuKtq21nJmC4dIAXpNd3grd5K_toxoSFkhV98eG174g1PgqJvAAzwl4kadL6SHNSxBh1eX9aPTY5B_N1qkCTB4E3gNR6bdXRxbYX5TWR2HDzOBBS24IYGvJMAHB4F9Zcmkd-1XSR55ylArNDgIXlehyasbFElgJyehwllFZymAI07mI3C5pyfsXQzq8dnge-maAUkx__uMT1FEOs7TInMhFE9aB_W1RP0qWmL3MSNButxB4Hqu8RX-kwE1FG4UHu8qDCMR0k5IAZoLqptR3uFT1AMkdGndP8-0NSIiE6wqDuiISXnRYF9CcUwoYsxbLU0sPHtDejKpLNKm43KYiBBmQcCivjfplQF81pVBK7g5wVMQAvG2rQXkzQK) Jane joined Chris Long for the Ohio Christian Alliance’s On-Air Candidate Forum this week to discuss border security, runaway inflation, Joe Biden’s failure in Afghanistan, and how conservatives need to fight back against Biden’s reckless agenda and overreach. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=3410924bb65f4454933af62376e678cd&_e=YICtLKfeuKtq21nJmC4dINUxWLbrWWDJVEkKNraTNJ-FdUWNRwuTwy3wNUI1XSGoqSg3vcY91E-2RrORE3LazvpebmdJzo_WF1rYN2XIdK5O1BXSlv13LIR7hoj1ntInFWbTbCxbSigIJSPKfAp8zQSo4xViZ6m_76yOqUd7qM8eE_ZaU1cvThvF8lFuDRcR7yA1jVtiV50hwkOlwQZZy70-gCzMzIgNY_8OQT7Ol5YtvmyhVmgo73ISb3H02hdjXJ_S7hytHqyOhon9GhBu8IHVLbF-jS9fFWsOFcK25Oo%3D)
Yesterday, Jane joined Steve Bannon’s War Room to discuss the Left’s latest attack on faith. The Left is sacrificing freedom of religion for their new religion of woke, progressive ideology and Jane will passionately fight for our God-given freedoms in the Senate.

**Join Us for Our next Super Saturday!**
We are just one week away from our next Super Saturday to support Jane! As we rapidly approach our 500,000th voter contact of the primary, join us on Saturday, September 25th to cross this milestone.
Jane will be joining our volunteer teams in Columbus, Athens, and Cincinnati next week and we hope to see you out.

For more details and to sign up, please follow this [link](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=3410924bb65f4454933af62376e678cd&_e=K4_JB-nRFSCm6WkrrskyqQLFEKtWSGOMmYjBt2fFMx04hm5e3zX_mYuYKPh6vZXJvib27rhVxPl1Yph6vrTCagnR_icvGDu4bocsMVbtsgn_fM4yKE11dQ8XQXFxLoSl6YF7BMcesb361o0f48zra8xERKR4J4KNV0VP3PnonLUGxChYUxbaFQmWcCR8Uua_tFUtJGcVNlPJZz1GoHxRAB-vXIsn1B5qnrtNpSFb9Nw617Huy8AfaRLeHUml8cIP98YYLdMz10Rk8LzKi4gpxTVJyEVGzbS4q56eEZmepDGvlAtPLK-MoZYlgKbeIngxbP8Fb-PRsonm26aSmJaoKKSJIGI8KRRonbPJ4sooy4_dMLh4Vy7H9TmdbUuGHpYySX26f1lSYn-mImVuLHrseTWRQyWC2eIRgTjCelzYk7UaotT9aRKf9p57EW_PhWK_JJzMI4fMdu1JnaSI3AmG90Ya1Dyxi0ZUoU8fFgenU1FeFg2PaaJDuCPcmBuPMPlvQUBLfSbv2AnsTFg9wZHtcYSMDlEKusU8gZANzw6E5eeC9mOAw453xUzyAg07tuDWWiHanNbJ_Rrr1vFXpkctAFp6oogYWxv-cFUM346LuD3MsFPxKJWB1mD6Cd8_8V3VqXETyRCs9NJxmDtkZjvwQz0cnVbr-0nsGgYTadPhlp-qr7BamCXXFj5KKoLxOC18FoGuUI7RAHLC4FZanHXTp6FymxVaMwDUhMwa00OXsIHLGeBTih3PIMINYJ72cAbWCfILJrM1_elTF2pkVBJAVtXdxuMfwGhya1uuJl212d5xWKHl25p_-3Y0dLvbOERg-bM8s8YJjuztlLLnbjJs7p_eHinS1Vi_Vr2KLCDauLFmLZLU--l9JFz3fKV2SlAQgbIjIBEHHGcDbNyg2NDamg%3D%3D).

clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, Jane continued to prove why she is the grassroots, America First candidate for U.S. Senate this week by crisscrossing the state, speaking to the issues most important to Ohio voters, and growing our grassroots army to support the campaign. Every week Jane works hard to earn the votes of Ohio voters and this week was no different. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. Fighting the Left's Woke Education Agenda Over the last few months, Jane has led the field on fighting back against critical race theory and the left’s agenda of indoctrinating our children at schools. Hosting listening sessions with parents from across the state, Jane has heard from parents about their concerns over their children’s education and what we can all do to fight back. This week, Jane was joined by New York Times Bestselling Author to further discuss how we can fight back against critical race theory and the left’s woke education agenda. Whether it’s putting their name on the ballot for school board, attending school board meetings, or demanding transparency about their children’s curriculum, parents across the state are stepping up for their children’s education. And that’s exactly the fight and voice Jane Timken will take to the U.S. Senate. From The Trail On Saturday, Jane was proud to be with the North Royalton Republican Club for their 9/11 Memorial event as they commemorated the 20th anniversary of September 11th, honor the lives lost, and redouble our pledge to Never Forget. Jane joined a passionate crowd at the Richland County Republican Party on Monday to talk about her priorities in the U.S. Senate. Later on Monday, Jane was thrilled to join her supporters in Lake, Ashtabula, Geauga Counties including Geauga County GOP Chair Nancy McArthur, Lake County Commissioner John Plecnik and many more! 1 in 14 jobs in this state are in the trucking industry. They literally keep us moving. That’s why Jane was honored to join the Ohio Trucking Association’s Annual Conference this Tuesday to talk about common-sense policies to support this important industry. Truck drivers work day and night to keep Ohioans fed, our shelves stocked, and our products delivered, and in the U.S. Senate, Jane will advocate for these workers. Young conservatives are the future of our party and also on the front lines of fighting back against the “wokeism” we find at our universities. Jane joined the University of Dayton College Republicans on Tuesday night to talk about just that and support them as they keep fighting the good fight for freedom. Jane continued her tour of colleges this week with a visit to the Ohio State University College Republicans. Young conservatives are getting involved across the state at all of our universities and it’s great to see! Not everything on the campaign trail is speeches and glad-handing. With some time between events, Jane was able to stop by the Zanesville institution Tom’s Ice Cream Bowl and pick up some Canton-made Ben Heggy’s chocolate. Last night, Jane was thrilled to join her supporters in Muskingum County as they rally around her America First campaign. It was great to see old friends like Muskingum County GOP Chair Pat Hennesseey! Media Roundup On Monday, Jane joined the Brandon Boxer Show on 610 WTVN in Columbus to discuss a wide range of topics including Jane’s about woke culture invading Harvard. You can listen to the full interview . Jane joined Chris Long for the Ohio Christian Alliance’s On-Air Candidate Forum this week to discuss border security, runaway inflation, Joe Biden’s failure in Afghanistan, and how conservatives need to fight back against Biden’s reckless agenda and overreach. Yesterday, Jane joined Steve Bannon’s War Room to discuss the Left’s latest attack on faith. The Left is sacrificing freedom of religion for their new religion of woke, progressive ideology and Jane will passionately fight for our God-given freedoms in the Senate. Join Us for Our next Super Saturday! We are just one week away from our next Super Saturday to support Jane! As we rapidly approach our 500,000th voter contact of the primary, join us on Saturday, September 25th to cross this milestone. Jane will be joining our volunteer teams in Columbus, Athens, and Cincinnati next week and we hope to see you out. For more details and to sign up, please follow this . Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | ---|---

body:

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1518e1677e8843f58907b7f930c49485&_e=4XQN3TvP5UODmZPMU5nhKQXB2RMCdm_u44BRL8cSoqtJoz10INQCZwHVZ91Y3GqtJGJIvxluaFE4VdPfmGX821JbcqcbmDeQfdzB3yZw0DgLJaYP4EmcxZlRF4V1QE_kfevJoPYu_QpQt8BgxnTv4kAPNOz_fL9onMOmrZN4GiI1PT-8NOJpCqnWVwe4rNyuAoG4e_sCIj8GK72VRa3F-m-JyDxLgV3pW1wRbWTrcS_UVrjV-eOlZESLqbL7hn5UmwMpkZ90E0NKf0zH7o7f0rRyYKTbHPcW2zThmZZt54A%3D) | |

**Dear Democrats: Money Doesn’t Grow On Trees 🌳**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1518e1677e8843f58907b7f930c49485&_e=4XQN3TvP5UODmZPMU5nhKQXB2RMCdm_u44BRL8cSoqtJoz10INQCZwHVZ91Y3GqtJGJIvxluaFE4VdPfmGX82_zlHafjoJT3hAPoSSjrcfdTYTcN7jv05kqxwmI1GUW5gI5gmtZ366zi_I3ESei9XuZReje_7ERODW6K_2xuO9gC64JnQKEmKpFyW1sxUbd8DqdDFH-V0wWivbCx9SiD7iAZqz8cvOxgeqgKxr2Gb3DCDnwK-vmTKR9jfLL3-2LHO-uD0QAbtBPJyBAIP8VHybP6-cvwfSkNb8EzMlaJkqU%3D)
It’s no surprise Democrats think money grows on trees.

But their ongoing disregard for taxpayers is still maddening.

At a recent House Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure hearing, I [offered an amendment](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1518e1677e8843f58907b7f930c49485&_e=4XQN3TvP5UODmZPMU5nhKS67ylPCmxVmRab8e6rE2i-ExDNsFIVwrnnBfjGpKttO4Ni7_eAzTeJ6D2qlLBjfgkFVliy0x4Qm0ovjDtliXRbVSSXCHN0kumy4QMJL39a_byHUfUS4y8h7Q-HxdLx7GmULEbEGO6fD0Z28NQeSoloFC_PdI0A2SxZoxV7JIIJvwZYCphkLRQNUJF9BrmJeCbfWFrucGbpbxHjBc61hU8_ZS_zQeiVLxTfujfYCWeUicK_shPlhPlP8se9FX6D1zqBDVrAOdVJyCkoOix-e93HeyvCtbWyCH6ikThyIHC638QXA5vlx1vU18Zz7VT1TbxsMZzQDD8TEE0t7vgLHhAg%3D) to delete $10 billion in duplicative spending from Biden’s MASSIVE $3.5 trillion boondoggle. What did Democrats do? They killed it, of course.

The $3.5 trillion bill authorizes nearly $10 billion for a new transit program _already_ agreed to in the Senate’s $1.2 trillion “infrastructure” bill. Why in the world should taxpayers be paying for the same transit program – not once, but twice? Short answer: They shouldn’t.

Contrary to what Democrats think, money doesn’t grow on trees – not any trees that I’ve seen. And the endless spending comes with real consequences. Federal spending is causing an inflation crisis with prices rising for families across America. How are Democrats going to explain this vote?
|
---
**Refuge For These Adorable Hurricane Evacuees 🐕
**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1518e1677e8843f58907b7f930c49485&_e=4XQN3TvP5UODmZPMU5nhKXvzlyJQGYt0mvXjTifRkHOo2B_I_bDbCkB4zEM28gx_4ISJW8DTv2CVWFTyva2e9_XTRmBbhQoz8SLw0tbIW_8G8i1KrzTBEDPJ0p5o_ntiynfDMrZ4rBa-1rpFjuqyA30WPHTICaDrDSt3k_NKv3WJ-1iR9u0QDA54Dp2ZtejBnzeaWFYmTirZlW1KzqIC3RZwiMfdw0jmGjim_FbVIraupklbfhKWDKYTGwy2dP5o2C8dqSwnA-FpIKoELuovpex13wGszFnzBgGeFriaEBHTLSaMx2ExekrEJz0RYFh43jaEL8Doxuezq3zNQtDNCIwkBnkY7hxnmtgpQKAyx2w%3D)
Image from WVLT** **

As Hurricane Ida ripped through Louisiana, it wasn’t just humans looking for shelter. Louisiana’s animal shelters called on nearby states to help keep their animals safe. And Tennessee came to the rescue.

Young-Williams animal shelter in Knoxville, Tennessee took in more than 40 cats and dogs, providing clean water and safe shelter. But with an increase in animals came an increased need for people to care for them. To the shelter’s surprise, more than 100 Tennesseeans showed up to help.

These animals will be able to be adopted soon, rescuing these pets in more ways than one.
|
