name: President Jim Gash
subject: FWD: Waves of Flags and Honoring the Heroes of 9/11
body:
|

Fellow American -

Were you able to make it out to campus to join the Pepperdine University family for our twentieth anniversary commemoration **"Honoring the Heroes of 9/11"** last Saturday?

If you did, I’m sure you found the **"Waves of Flags"** - our yearly display of nearly 3,000 American flags in Alumni Park along Pacific Coast Highway and Malibu Canyon Road - a beautiful, patriotic exhibition in remembrance of those who lost their lives on September 11, 2001, and a celebration of our great country.

The lovely Waves of Flags display will be in place through the 25th of the month, so you still have an opportunity to experience this student-inspired tradition of remembrance.

And if you’d also like to [**make a generous contribution to help ensure we have the resources we need to continue this noble effort in perpetuity**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7551e6cd480e4cffb00fbf98c9efa036&_e=ZP7rpZJBEXuEBOnrLg6upXE5muKpnaX1YORBmZrGBFyGaPpSN44yn5ufP57qkFlmNGO0eE3kwmBJpIPobbVSsj5UKJjoxF96Qaoe5tg-SU58Gc1OKw5Aoej3omWcuTS2gSY7QweJCdVA8Dn8iimI37vXQT0V2MMCN48Vdag8PtaTfQAqyBvOwc9R4Q6UV2dkqzzVvLKA_DlWXLDzfMZkAZ86Lyd6tkw3pxr6ODbcFKbCFBb3cz2ioIfWen7jbTEgpsuZZKwg9O-G7o5do-pfpbBv6LywGmfMrCwQNik5zGrqQbEcaPRBISccux_bF9gAKtmMAFeJUxx-2Y3iUqk8wMJ_Oc5buZCGF_1mR0b5bNoOv_H9iqKdl8kjUeOkXDz0cydpgOTPyfGNF7s0ZC7RYA%3D%3D), please take this opportunity to do so with the grateful thanks of the entire Pepperdine community!

Sincerely,

Jim Gash
President and CEO, Pepperdine University

* * *
**From :** President Jim Gash
**Date :** Friday, September 10, 2021
**Subject :** Waves of Flags and Honoring the Heroes of 9/11

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7551e6cd480e4cffb00fbf98c9efa036&_e=ZP7rpZJBEXuEBOnrLg6upT4bBCbrOCfEl9VDKLxvevpgN9w3BLJXn6s-MaeTTXfvz9bMUJMYj5AA9dzHuKBrQG6-7dZi0vfK5Vy06wakFiQ9OMStZZkyiBhVifhq2N0xRhICnhwwDQK9zc4I8fTMumLX8EAP395mrSw1p3AHSe1S6cajabWirICNEsmM8ewbfxI9Hao0GJC2GjK9j9lyDURhS5LSj0Jag9P-cUuY0YttjOQaStV52xmomwo22x8PgtYA7cPMahxcIpb99KyhnOFACLRrqZmVVw8aoVUU4UxZ92VlgMZBYPktZFUT-uW3bKth8qAzxcuiWfioV7I94VMUZQHOfTKQu0iyE63EKZjLDHB2emQt20d42yZX2XYe)

---
Dear Fellow American -

As you know, this Saturday marks the 20th anniversary of the tragic events that took place on September 11, 2001. As the president of Pepperdine University, the passage of two decades is a stark reminder that many of our students were not yet born on this day and many others were too young to remember. Yet we must never forget, and Pepperdine is committed to exactly that.

For the 14th consecutive year, Pepperdine University students and our extended community will be commemorating this historic day of loss and heroism with [**Waves of Flags**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7551e6cd480e4cffb00fbf98c9efa036&_e=ZP7rpZJBEXuEBOnrLg6upT4bBCbrOCfEl9VDKLxvevpgN9w3BLJXn6s-MaeTTXfvz9bMUJMYj5AA9dzHuKBrQG6-7dZi0vfK5Vy06wakFiQ9OMStZZkyiBhVifhq2N0xRhICnhwwDQK9zc4I8fTMumLX8EAP395mrSw1p3AHSe2JTFc_YjV_q_562qiuvUMBM40gVWtov7GX-TSLK9UIuEyvV9ZfRCzCHQlL-SAEixenOESMb2PuGa8dp92tJIpS2OxdYII4rG-09W1aPzWqz8OsdKJ4--JmYm9kDa_yd0IhUErAJRimRG8qwJNQO1o_5l4atgkgKX91A8p1JBbYWvN2nx2QjSUdgmmePkwKl50gkD-Febbs8ub8EgC6-ZvT), a beautiful annual display located on our Malibu campus that honors the lives lost in the terror attacks on 9/11. The display features 2,977 flags—one for each innocent victim, including a national flag for each foreign country that lost a citizen in the attacks.

This tremendous display educates both students and visitors far beyond our campus about the history of our country and the overwhelming sacrifices that heroic men and women have made to keep it safe, prosperous, and free.

Started by students in 2008, Waves of Flags has become a Pepperdine tradition, one that attracts attention and admiration from across the country—and on this 20th-anniversary commemoration, we’re working to ensure permanent support of the memorial and educating the next generation about the attacks on 9/11.

That’s why [**I hope you will join us in this noble pursuit and take a few minutes to learn more**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7551e6cd480e4cffb00fbf98c9efa036&_e=ZP7rpZJBEXuEBOnrLg6upT4bBCbrOCfEl9VDKLxvevpgN9w3BLJXn6s-MaeTTXfvz9bMUJMYj5AA9dzHuKBrQG6-7dZi0vfK5Vy06wakFiQ9OMStZZkyiBhVifhq2N0xRhICnhwwDQK9zc4I8fTMumLX8EAP395mrSw1p3AHSe0YiUctNVc7sFDgqvY0Jlt2bACjEFrNKxp1QLARRHfbLtx6x1HhJ9ANHVBsbxSYu5zEYZYX9wUHT1tgQUvj4ceQaUemBXol_qngrfAjgmTrJqJjvJKy_O8qlExwWGGetd2uLq-3MXixDLCw7uBEZ3UhdrzfD4RKdwnu5FYlZkjuxBt6TLbAgDiON_SXTGxLDlGlTwEM5rFolUcC--iSNRtt) about the Waves of Flags initiative at Pepperdine. We need your participation and support to continue to inform and educate our community about the significance of the national tragedy and to honor together the innocent victims who perished 20 years ago.

Over the years, Pepperdine’s efforts have come to transcend the commemoration of a single tragic day, and we cannot allow September 11 to become a distant memory in our nation’s history. It is critical to [**continue to honor and remember those who sacrificed everything and educate younger generations for years to come.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7551e6cd480e4cffb00fbf98c9efa036&_e=ZP7rpZJBEXuEBOnrLg6upT4bBCbrOCfEl9VDKLxvevpgN9w3BLJXn6s-MaeTTXfvz9bMUJMYj5AA9dzHuKBrQG6-7dZi0vfK5Vy06wakFiQ9OMStZZkyiBhVifhq2N0xRhICnhwwDQK9zc4I8fTMumLX8EAP395mrSw1p3AHSe2Uri22XFCkteQNwz9Dlo16TckDq1FGQeuCVrN7dDY-xd-I6_wkwnLg0vWBuHe4dq3xal5BiinQ7Jbx4iSvKHHbLg8Wdi9eaBfljnJ6R1SotUJcQe02f_FSCswu_QHg-oAK65sOYh00ywN5sTuv815Mq2YUBT5NpboXM7PYhU8iV9l42_pdnrDX7e9puilkI0kxwHbxo_mRyRKtjDPCcIXo)

This Saturday, in somber recognition of the 20th anniversary of one of our nation’s darkest days, Pepperdine University invites all members of the community to join us at Honoring the Heroes of 9/11, a day of events designed to commemorate the friends, neighbors, and family members lost on that fateful day. We hope you will take time this Saturday to do the same, whether here in Malibu or in your own community. [**Please learn more about and register for Honoring the Heroes of 9/11 here.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7551e6cd480e4cffb00fbf98c9efa036&_e=ZP7rpZJBEXuEBOnrLg6upT4bBCbrOCfEl9VDKLxvevpgN9w3BLJXn6s-MaeTTXfvz9bMUJMYj5AA9dzHuKBrQG6-7dZi0vfK5Vy06wakFiQ9OMStZZkyiBhVifhq2N0xRhICnhwwDQK9zc4I8fTMumLX8EAP395mrSw1p3AHSe1MWOVMSVyT2258AcrlSFg9EZzHZXnL-cne4M-OsgEMS7rB8MNSinI6-IxoLEHQZmG8fkGhkubkMb-d3YX_e2rg8_MFFVgp-YFJoyj_LHUp7L7K_YLnDg5V3xgsnZw7HZzb6kRdBqgg573zIHr3Kdrh68--qXcz-Y8yb3F582BTqnJZEbFXrHhjbl0-KGV5jn15LYhI7W4KxLzeJ3hoLXwV)

And if you would like to go even further in your observance of this worthy endeavor of remembrance and education, and support the endowment fund established to ensure our commemorative and educational activities continue in perpetuity, [**we welcome your generous support.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7551e6cd480e4cffb00fbf98c9efa036&_e=ZP7rpZJBEXuEBOnrLg6upXE5muKpnaX1YORBmZrGBFyGaPpSN44yn5ufP57qkFlmNGO0eE3kwmBJpIPobbVSsj5UKJjoxF96Qaoe5tg-SU58Gc1OKw5Aoej3omWcuTS2gSY7QweJCdVA8Dn8iimI37vXQT0V2MMCN48Vdag8PtaTfQAqyBvOwc9R4Q6UV2dk0-hOxhHX_oYdeeeOB-oGQ9XASfgkwQIg6Yyrt3CBhTqedNXisYOtPJARxVlbwtlllxAgIHlSNHv1bc7CJ5Uxh_8WRVtEcROWSVDwMjlT9Izo2viLqeWXv-FVZbIEp43rYTBr5bTdKtM6Idt2EC1SpK1ZgVY3osgIvp-5gUtCqgjAICunhxPVFsrhpDgCFxqGjR7Js3xGgcvovxO8V-8ASg%3D%3D)

Thank you-[**I hope to hear from you today!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7551e6cd480e4cffb00fbf98c9efa036&_e=ZP7rpZJBEXuEBOnrLg6upXE5muKpnaX1YORBmZrGBFyGaPpSN44yn5ufP57qkFlmNGO0eE3kwmBJpIPobbVSsj5UKJjoxF96Qaoe5tg-SU58Gc1OKw5Aoej3omWcuTS2gSY7QweJCdVA8Dn8iimI37vXQT0V2MMCN48Vdag8PtaTfQAqyBvOwc9R4Q6UV2dkCaSTT3myZrWlaE0AVoMkSL-eXZII2bPt2x7svLnYqp9hJjfjzH26QP76dBb7HHjRk_nP91VOc9axDyPi4LxFt6Oy7fQmnDXyPGRhHLdDO82sdoQmAisQhEDfOPswUTduXmZcwOvAH09niGXEecDgu1jxADl6k8VKPBSuRzoX2c3AhzknJZAaMmK8CXjDQiGaLO0BzkpjcT2wpKu_gnPxKA%3D%3D)

Sincerely,

Jim Gash
President and CEO
Pepperdine University

[** GIVE NOW **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7551e6cd480e4cffb00fbf98c9efa036&_e=ZP7rpZJBEXuEBOnrLg6upXE5muKpnaX1YORBmZrGBFyGaPpSN44yn5ufP57qkFlmNGO0eE3kwmBJpIPobbVSsj5UKJjoxF96Qaoe5tg-SU58Gc1OKw5Aoej3omWcuTS2gSY7QweJCdVA8Dn8iimI37vXQT0V2MMCN48Vdag8PtaTfQAqyBvOwc9R4Q6UV2dkSvUA3uBqCaj_gd9hk1OazDHO7hDqwOCbr5olZQWiBwnpCVT1zfx7vNheu4DPBf7qCLEBlEDJNVJsVSs7M-Vh-3TQAxWix5TKpdxcjoW-dFRx7STGQjydhIYEvBe7Wx6gN6rDKxPGIjxpbJQgYAESN6K7KuwAcJ9rK134W5Pfsu1axXZwQyfKHCniId-dnUGL-ou3ncLWcZSYCfaznD_g4Q%3D%3D)

Malibu, CA 90263
[www.pepperdine.edu](www.pepperdine.edu)

Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=7551e6cd480e4cffb00fbf98c9efa036&_t=BwPHdl0cWYyIXzXi0yZCm5cX-4BJhtv15zcfVidpyNEMdV9ygRlfvP6SclJAMbbwcpV8-nbGeIV9DnHsKElld9jZnhiufxGAbI6A3YHCfnU-4zBg8-pQVsGuwqh4I4v5ceT7TDqDgVwMWUiPPp7F2owmpHonChc5PBhDXioxe0M%3D).

name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: AOC is a hypocrite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
AOC’s hypocrisy may be laughable, but socialism is no laughing matter: too many young people are falling victim to her lies and pushing a socialist Wi President Biden's reckless orders continue to put Americans at harm from violent, convicted illegal aliens.

Fellow American,

AOC claims to hate “the rich” but took time away from her duty as a Congresswoman to brush elbows at the **$35,000 per ticket Met Gala**.

**SPOILER ALERT** : This Is not an official duty of members of Congress.

She’s using her radical socialist status to become a celebrity and leaving behind millions of Americans who will suffer under her radical agenda.

AOC’s hypocrisy may be laughable, but socialism is no laughing matter: too many young people are falling victim to her lies and pushing a socialist Wishlist that will destroy your freedom and your livelihood.

Congress is a place for serious adults, not wannabe-celebrities who only care about solidifying their own power.

body:
and more | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c431dd6ef638/president-trump-on-spicer-co-new-excerpt-of-radical-nation?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## President Trump calls General Mark Milley’s alleged to China call “treasonous” _Spicer & Co_...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5780f1bbb1&e=f6564bbe3b)
| [WATCH HERE](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c1282b29f7&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
## The growth of _Spicer & Co_...
We launched _Spicer & Co_ 18 months ago and it’s incredibly humbling to see how far we’ve come. Thanks to our viewers who tune in every night at 6p and spend an hour with us.
| | | |
---
## Latest EXCLUSIVE _Radical Nation_ excerpt...
The latest excerpt from _Radical Nation_ is exclusively on TownHall.com now. This part of the book lays out what “qualifications” the Biden team was looking for to fill their cabinet and senior level positions. Check it out and pre-order your copy of _Radical Nation_ for the first comprehensive look at Biden’s presidency thus far.
| [Read here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=bc56e67078&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[White House chief of staff tells Wall Street titans $3.5 trillion spending plan will ‘cost zero’](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3972790789&e=f6564bbe3b) —via NY Post They must really think everyone is really really stupid.
|
---
[White House offers Nicki Minaj call to answer vaccine questions](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9ee551a1e4&e=f6564bbe3b) — via AP NewsSo when Nicki Manaj claims the COVID vaccine causes impotence....the White House reaction is to....call her.
|
---
[The biggest U.S. tax increases in a generation took a major step forward..it will help pay for the biggest expansion in social spending in decades, in a budget bill currently penciled in at $3.5 trillion.](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=01f6f72049&e=f6564bbe3b) — via BloombergHold on to your wallets (and everything else).
| | | |
---
Last week I asked if you all thought that Governor Newsom would be recalled, most people said [yes](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7520a04de9&e=f6564bbe3b), but unfortunately Californians voted yesterday and he was not.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9669fa4bda&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=bfbf271e79&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## Pre-order _Radical Nation_ ...
I cover all of these issues and more in my upcoming book, Radical Nation.It is the first comprehensive look at the Biden administration and all of these policies.Last week Radical Nation hit #1 again in multiple categories so thank you to everyone who has pre-ordered.|
---
[Get a copy here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cfae512b9f&e=f6564bbe3b)

We couldn’t be more thrilled for Rachel Maddow. clean_body: This is incredible: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. We couldn’t be more thrilled for Rachel Maddow. To protect Maddow from their attacks, we need a groundswell of support. | | | | | [ This poll expires in [15] minutes. As a Pennsylvania supporter, we’re counting on you to respond ]() For years Trump and his loyalists have tried to force Rachel Maddow OFF THE AIR. Recently, Trump’s favorite MAGA Republican, Devin Nunes, SUED Rachel Maddow. He hates that she isn’t afraid to call out his lies. | | | Thanks for responding! \-- Ruiz, Research Team | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. Warnock’s seat: split a donation of $25 or more now between Common Good VA and Sen. Warnock so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84pzGoU1n_ljQ64eB6Yn3CPYKoRlvbHoEy3tcNI-Nl64-4I0NmEq8IHNkoK7O185pX5oEjOppQQfpBNTQgGlcjAi1bRc6xot-2kRqubvI1bTI_--Q-U_rnzcMK3jQifeLl-GWf_OpOLWdhKqLFu3gRn8PQuzzUKwwzMZihHcsBbKt6MKNKnJ5nk3bF39l9usfluCrDjf5raSxolphuf0arnQxROjraJl3j-VB-gnj1YxqB0XR7N_Bc5pEjVMEKQHIBS5UlR2jB84ofssiUL02FMtb_jeDPZwnARvKFWZsYKpdjNUqMyGdROuBlDgePsTKhA/3fe/PU3v-lqeR-OfuR7JHCNDkg/h1/uoJ69BvN-SRRYAOYytRzyFZMns-dSAG5TNU5EWbCtv4)

Derek, after CNN named Sen. Warnock one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats up for reelection, Mitch McConnell and his shady super PACs started flooding the airwaves with attack ads to smear Sen. Warnock’s record and turn Georgia red. **Now, Trump’s handpicked candidate just officially entered the race – and a new poll shows us NECK-AND-NECK!**

clean_body: This is urgent | | | BREAKING news, Derek: Trump’s handpicked candidate just entered the race to defeat Sen. Raphael Warnock (D) and flip the Senate for Republicans! Derek, after CNN named Sen. Warnock one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats up for reelection, Mitch McConnell and his shady super PACs started flooding the airwaves with attack ads to smear Sen. Warnock’s record and turn Georgia red. Now, Trump’s handpicked candidate just officially entered the race – and a new poll shows us NECK-AND-NECK! Sen. Warnock is the moral warrior Democrats need to keep Georgia blue, defend our Senate majority and pass our progressive agenda. But with national Republicans already launching attack ads and mobilizing to defeat him, we need to fight back NOW, or we’ll risk falling dangerously behind. That's why we set a $50,000 fundraising goal to pull ahead, win this race and defend our Democratic Senate majority. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're still falling WAY short. Thank you for chipping in when we need it most. More soon. – Team Warnock | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Team Ryan
subject: 5 reasons to chip in $5 right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=887%2E3611125%2EJwu_nG ][IMG]

This is one of the closest Senate races in the country. We need to flip
Ohio blue to expand our Democratic Senate majority. And the best way you
can help us do that is by chipping in $25 so we can catch up on our
mid-month fundraising goal before it’s too late.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3252?t=1007&akid=887%2E3611125%2EJwu_nG ]Chip in >>

Here are 5 reasons why you should chip in to Tim Ryan’s campaign to flip
Ohio blue right now:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3252?t=1008&akid=887%2E3611125%2EJwu_nG ]Tim Counting to 5

1. Republican megadonors. Tim’s opponents have the support of GOP
billionaires and special interest groups with deep pockets. We’re relying
on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaign.

2. Our Senate majority is on the line. Democrats have the slimmest
possible margin of control in the Senate, and Mitch McConnell is abusing
the filibuster at every opportunity. We need to expand our majority if we
want to pass meaningful legislation.

3. We’ve got to cut workers in on the deal. Working families are doing
everything right, but are still falling behind. It’s far past time to
invest in our workers and bring back good-paying jobs so we can compete
with the rest of the world.

4. This race is neck and neck. The most recent polling shows Tim and his
opponents are only single digits apart. We need to get Tim’s winning
message out across Ohio to jump ahead in the polls.

5. Our upcoming FEC Deadline. We have a critical fundraising deadline
right around the corner. Our opponents will pore over our report looking
for any sign of weakness -- we need strong numbers to prove our campaign
has what it takes to win.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3252?t=1009&akid=887%2E3611125%2EJwu_nG ]Can we count on you to chip in $5, $25 or more to help us flip Ohio
blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3252?t=1010&akid=887%2E3611125%2EJwu_nG ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3253?t=1011&akid=887%2E3611125%2EJwu_nG ]Donate $50

Whatever your reason for supporting Team Ryan, we appreciate it. It’s only
with your help that winning this race is possible.

-- Team Ryan

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The DSCC and Democrat establishment know they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning in Georgia. |
---
Fellow American,

The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all:

[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=840f5292fac34481b3af47219062d7ea&_e=TsSiwoYXAcMpicxezC_M6okfOpBeuDoLClP2wBhwum6eCCpm165knKW1VOddmwXyN-PybovuECTDG7jZRzmDeKrsBxM0lpujWpopexUxaM4-CsfIPa2GOTejeSxByLFIg0m7lMXZs-IMovYEofznaI76zY9RJkrdd2lIW-lQm9hpExon-jy5QGAWCyVDSz5z0OfHK1brpauarGoaFlNPfMoTirW2g4ot8J-BG1-U8BVzPGxpVHAYjHZB5qVU0cIkr04_q7s6am2pBf5BXbDjy3vrfvaQ_968t6yyVM0-ltV4Ko8UjsW5ESuvis1pff6uJ2vZqoU2wnXoKWDkk6U88vZ0bQJaLA5-j1To1gb4r4rVrWf1Yy5b-DON4X2fll0gY1MF2U93MkNz2GP2oYQ4RqynuLOm785veed0C2EDTdNYFzWV8C0vDWo68wNHw4kWXVUc1Y42ESKEI-UkFfS6xLg1-Kix3J1Vae3wd1ESlKU%3D)
The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are **a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate.**

Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic.

They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year.

We're going to have to work around the clock - day and night - for the next 400+ days to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country.

We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls.

And, of course, it all takes money to operate. **[So, today I'm asking you to make a donation of $5 or more. I need to raise $10,000 by the end of the day, and I hope you'll help me reach my goal by making an immediate gift of whatever you can.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=840f5292fac34481b3af47219062d7ea&_e=TsSiwoYXAcMpicxezC_M6okfOpBeuDoLClP2wBhwum6eCCpm165knKW1VOddmwXyN-PybovuECTDG7jZRzmDeKrsBxM0lpujWpopexUxaM4-CsfIPa2GOTejeSxByLFIg0m7lMXZs-IMovYEofznaI76zY9RJkrdd2lIW-lQm9hpExon-jy5QGAWCyVDSz5z0OfHK1brpauarGoaFlNPfMoTirW2g4ot8J-BG1-U8BVzPGxpVHAYjHZB5qVU0cIkEcfPoPMIFjxVkQu9bSWqjDHTpODQeTB6FJ3Hnw9kw0BV28IitD-26X6ULF7CMoPo-LyAEsjcNwfFoQpP02SUyZuPEEp_L0ur-fnMOqgQKoI5IndaK94JV1rZwL8bSzQCUoGkJYIYSpR0IvW37pd-6wpuvJWdQVU1_UsBJThZlNI_FB_tMvYhQYt7jGeUsa6zGY5CbIq0jDrWBBNOdH4BvLP1eOIBxQahXRBCSDK8ZZY%3D)**

It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year. We're going to have to work around the clock - day and night - for the next 400+ days to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country. We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls. And, of course, it all takes money to operate. Democrats are in panic mode. They didn't want me to get into this race because they know that with President Trump's support and the support of the good people in Georgia, we're going to flip this seat in one of the most hard-fought races in the country. | **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek,**

** This past week, New Hampshire Young Republicans held a phenomenal social event in Manchester, NH. Being that our Republican youth are the future of our political party, it is important that we not only include them, but engage them. I hope everyone will continue to reach out to the “Young Republicans” within their community and encourage them to attend one of our upcoming events.

Speaking of events, we are only a few weeks away from our annual Amos Tuck dinner, and I want to make sure you don’t miss out on this terrific event. We still have some tickets available so don’t wait to purchase yours! You can buy tickets **[**HERE**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Famostuckdinner/1/0100017bf5efb4ba-0cfaf173-7fac-413f-a76d-7e27e7abe21c-000000/864-eWduRMGobQlYnNnNEo_8p8o=236).**

As Maggie Hassan stands in solidarity with President Biden, New Hampshire Republicans are taking action to protect Granite Staters from invasive federal overreach.

The efforts of Attorney General John Formella to protect NH residents is not only appropriate, but necessary, as D.C. Democrats look to infringe upon our constitutional rights. Formella’s firm stand for freedom mirrors Governor Sununu’s consistently strong stand against the power-grabs of the far-left authoritarian administration of Joe Biden.

I echo Attorney General Formella’s sentiment in saying that Biden’s one-size-fits-all approach is not only a massive overstep, but counter-productive in combating COVID-19. I myself decided to be vaccinated when the option was available, but I would never force such compliance upon those who are unvaccinated. In times like these we must find empathy for our fellow Americans and rally behind the freedoms on which our country was founded. I applaud Attorney General Formella and Governor Chris Sununu for leading New Hampshire against President Biden’s vaccine mandate, and I implore our Federal Delegation to awaken to the reality and join us in opposition - be sure to send them an email and let them know you’re in agreement with the NHGOP’s sentiment!**

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| **While the order itself appears to be confusing in terms of implementation and enforcement, Speaker Packard made it clear that the Legislature was on New Hampshire’s citizens’ side and would fight against this latest overreach coming out of Washington, D.C.**
**
As members of the lead****ership team stepped up to speak, each emphasized the importance of medical freedom, medical privacy and leaving the decision to get vaccinated up to individuals and businesses based on their own circumstances.**
**
This week, Speaker Packard filed legislation to help prevent federal overreach, protect our citizens, and prevent worker shortages should this mandate take place. LSR 2022-2262, prohibiting state or local enforcement of federal vaccine mandates, is currently being drafted, and will be released upon completion and approval.
Speaker Packard’s proposed legislation is one of many similar pieces of legislation from Republican House members filed this week.**
**
****“The end goal is to find a workable solution to this latest development out of Washington that is evolving as we all learn more about the mandate, its mechanisms and potential rollout,” Speaker Packard said. “In the interim, we ask all constituents to reach out to our United States Senators, their Member of Congress and State Representative and ask them to speak out against this tyrannical policy that would displace thousands of workers and devastate our economy. We have made it clear that government mandates are not the path to successful vaccination rates and will only cause further division in this country.”**

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

I hope everyone will continue to reach out to the “Young Republicans” within their community and encourage them to attend one of our upcoming events. Speaking of events, we are only a few weeks away from our annual Amos Tuck dinner, and I want to make sure you don’t miss out on this terrific event. We still have some tickets available so don’t wait to purchase yours! You can buy tickets . As Maggie Hassan stands in solidarity with President Biden, New Hampshire Republicans are taking action to protect Granite Staters from invasive federal overreach. The efforts of Attorney General John Formella to protect NH residents is not only appropriate, but necessary, as D.C. Democrats look to infringe upon our constitutional rights. Formella’s firm stand for freedom mirrors Governor Sununu’s consistently strong stand against the power-grabs of the far-left authoritarian administration of Joe Biden. I echo Attorney General Formella’s sentiment in saying that Biden’s one-size-fits-all approach is not only a massive overstep, but counter-productive in combating COVID-19. I myself decided to be vaccinated when the option was available, but I would never force such compliance upon those who are unvaccinated. In times like these we must find empathy for our fellow Americans and rally behind the freedoms on which our country was founded. I applaud Attorney General Formella and Governor Chris Sununu for leading New Hampshire against President Biden’s vaccine mandate, and I implore our Federal Delegation to awaken to the reality and join us in opposition - be sure to send them an email and let them know you’re in agreement with the NHGOP’s sentiment! | Stephan Stepanek NHGOP Chairman | | | Weekly Governor's Glance | | | | | | "Follow Governor Chris Sununu on Twitter!" | Upcoming Events | | September 18th Strafford County GOP Isle of Shoals Cruise | | | "Buy Tickets" | | September 21st NHYR Pints & Politics | | | "RSVP" | | September 29h NHYR Grand Ol' Beach Party | | | "RSVP " | | September 30th Hillsborough County Sheriff Connelly Fundraiser | | | "Buy Tickets" | | October 5th NHYR Night in Tuscany | | | "Buy Tickets" | | October 8th Amos Tuck Dinner Featuring Sen. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Wouldn't be reaching out if it weren't critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
I'm sorry to email you so late, Peter, but I wouldn't be sending this message if it weren't critical to defending our Democratic House majority.

My finance team just let me know that we still haven't reached our mid-month fundraising goal. We are working to make sure we hit our targets, and they asked me to reach out to you for help.

House Republicans are willing to do -- and spend -- whatever it takes to regain control of the House. We need to raise the resources now to fight back. So I'm humbly asking you to act quickly.

**[Will you rush a donation of $5, or whatever you're able, before midnight? Help us meet our mid-month fundraising goal and defend the House majority.](https://act.myngp.com/el/0Menvs-Y1l0mZzASLC7AgRVGnLNSfvGci0n7dgB855I=/JU5y_QKkiF1Ynrc-98AcTUNJ4Y8yUxEUNk7lDIao9bs=?refcode=em21_210917_MM2_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210917_MM2_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

Thank you and, as always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek
